subject: reaching out one last time

body:
I’ve dedicated this campaign to fighting for a future where our rights are protected, and every voice matters.

| Peter,

As we approach the final moments before polls close, I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support throughout this campaign.

I’ve dedicated this campaign to fighting for a future where our rights are protected and every voice matters. Regardless of the outcome, I know we gave it our all. We’ve worked tirelessly to connect with voters, share our vision for Maryland’s 6th District, and stand up for our values. Your commitment has made all the difference.

If you’ve yet to vote, I encourage you to do so! [_**You can find your nearest polling location through this link.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96647152/510704044/1688363822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Y2Y2UzMTItZDI5Yi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sIEwlrQptol3SfA3QpBNxGChsBs0eWttrpQbcMQPeb8=&emci=f5e5d69f-9a98-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=3f6ce312-d29b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=16017524)

Thank you for being a part of this journey with me.

April

name: Alma Adams
subject: A big thank you to each of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alma Adams for Congress
body:
Together, we’ve reached out to our neighbors, lifted up our community, and fought hard for the future of North Carolina. No matter what the final numbers say, please know that I am so proud of all we’ve achieved together.

| Peter,

**Tonight, as the polls close and the results start coming in, I want to take a moment to thank you.** Your commitment and belief in this campaign and your work to support Democrats mean the world to me.

Together, we’ve reached out to our neighbors, lifted up our community, and fought hard for the future of North Carolina. No matter what the final numbers say, _please know that I am so proud of all we’ve achieved together._

**And no matter what, I’ll continue fighting for North Carolina** —advocating for equal access to higher education and economic opportunities, protecting reproductive and LGBTQ+ rights, addressing our failing healthcare system, and anything else that I can do to improve my community.

Thank you again for being a part of this journey,

Alma

body:
Regardless of the outcome tonight, I’m incredibly proud of what we’ve built and know without a doubt that we gave it our all.

| Peter,

As we wait for polls to close and we await results, I want to take a moment to recognize everything we’ve accomplished together.

When we launched our campaign, we knew this wasn’t going to be an easy journey. But we also knew that Upper and Northern Michigan deserved a campaign that would show up and fight for every single community. Thanks to your support, encouragement, and relentless efforts, we’ve done just that.

Regardless of the outcome tonight, I’m incredibly proud of what we’ve built and know without a doubt that we gave it our all.

Every vote matters. If you haven’t cast your vote yet, [_**there’s still time to make your voice heard before polls close. Click here to find your polling location.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96647207/510704191/-1532177159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk2Y2UzMTItZDI5Yi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IMAkPWWbh1xnlKQOrFdkwJPEQbPNzzi6wJ-aUBw9dEs=&emci=e82f1e36-3999-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=496ce312-d29b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=9697413)

Thank you for everything, truly.

Callie

name: Greater Georgia
subject: KELLY LOEFFLER ISSUES STATEMENT ON TRUMP VICTORY IN GEORGIA
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 5 KELLY LOEFFLER ISSUES STATEMENT ON TRUMP VICTORY IN GEORGIA ATLANTA - Tonight, Greater Georgia Chairwoman and Former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler issued the following statement after President Donald Trump [won](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZgVZQihoWCDlq340ytYYO3qFQrRkzymKH2Ec_odKezKdalDjbYXctXV6Lk5vfL3KOTOfxdnFc14idZ4wVTaKySyzvJMnhfG6maniRQ-iUTmhJbjMPUlQ-5aXsZoD3hCOFLBDzBHCTMdjjgA7V7PjhKfcHr0JbT0sxREPRA0XHBHejEQCtRXTib9lQdqyOTJyrMN9OlHlU3k=&c=9zmND-qlMMbyIf_9DkrxdjmhLq2l_oazHB5JggGJ_gB8gvJ7lwx3AA==&ch=CjTNd2UiMQmaHngkCdmvi25CgLx699ZHHmYxf6Kpl34vo_15tRi_fw==) Georgia's 16 electoral college votes in the 2024 presidential election. "Tonight's win is one of the greatest political victories in modern history. Despite the relentless attempts to jail, bankrupt, slander, and assassinate him - Donald J. Trump has flipped the state of Georgia red in a decisive victory for his America First movement. Voters rejected Kamala Harris' failed record and, along with millions of their fellow Americans, cast their ballots to restore strength, security, and the American Dream.
"This is a significant milestone for Georgia, and I join our voters in thanking President Trump for his relentless commitment to making America greater than ever before, and for the sacrifices of the entire Trump family. The future of our nation is bright thanks to his willingness to fight for it. And as Chairwoman of Greater Georgia, I also thank our staff, volunteers, and interns who have spent nearly four years building a winning conservative infrastructure that just helped move our state back into the solidly red column." Senator Loeffler is the top donor to President Trump in Georgia, having contributed more than $6,000,000 in support of his re-election campaign. Greater Georgia has made over 14,000,000 voter contacts in the last six months, as part of the organization's effort to register and mobilize voters ahead of the presidential election.
---
| Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity. ###
Media Contact: [press@greatergeorgia.com](mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com)
---
| |
---
|
---

name: Schiff HQ
subject: Today’s the day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8146%2E5257348%2E0yrADE)
Derek, today is the day we’ve been waiting for — it’s Election Day!
649 days ago, Adam announced his campaign for the United States Senate — and we’re so grateful that you’ve been along for the ride with him.
From House Republicans’ partisan censure to Donald Trump and his MAGA allies’ countless attacks, the GOP has thrown every roadblock in Adam’s way to stop him from making it to the Senate.
**_But because of your support, Adam has prevailed after each challenge with a stronger grassroots team than we ever could have imagined._**
Today is the culmination of all of our hard work. But we’re not stopping our work until polls close at 8 PM in California.
Until then, we’re knocking on doors, making phone calls, and reaching every last voter to convince them to turn out to the polls in support of Democrats. After all, California is home to some _incredibly_ competitive races that could come down to a few hundred votes.
**[For the last time before polls close tonight, we’re asking you to chip in to Adam’s work to deliver for Democrats up and down the ballot in California — from our own Vice President Harris to the toss-up congressional seats and many others. Please, pitch in. Your support, even in these final hours, can still make a difference.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=nov2024_abs_em.SALZ0e&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20241105_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8146%2E5257348%2E0yrADE)**

name: Defeat Boebert PAC
subject: Last chance to drop your ballot! Let’s make it count!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC
body:

subject: LOADING: Election Results
body:
Democracy takes time, don't rush it!
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96647705/510708380/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzJiMTdjMS1kMjliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ggkaD5gNqGQJILYYKNvNsef32SkVui8dXGDJYGb8RTI=&emci=09488b71-b99b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=1c2b17c1-d29b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=6787172)
---
It's Election Day, folks. As the first polls start to close, disinformation will spread far and wide. _Regardless of the vote totals, lies about this election are going to pop up._
That's why it's so important to understand that **democracy takes time**. Vote totals are going to fluctuate tonight, and probably for the next few days.
NextGen is dedicated to bringing you the most accurate Election Day information. **So here's what you need to know about vote counting in battleground states:**
* **Pennsylvania and North Carolina** are legally forbidden from counting mail-in ballots before election night. While some ballots may have been processed early in certain localities, the vote counts will not be updated until after the polls close. In 2020, this led to some candidates having large leads in Pennsylvania that quickly eroded once mail-in votes were tallied.
* **Nevada** was among the states that took the longest time to tally votes in 2020. This year, however, they were able to start counting mail-in ballots on October 21 instead of waiting for Election Day. _Results will not be released until the very last vote has been cast._
* **Michigan** has updated its procedures to allow more time to count mail-in ballots. So it's possible that a candidate with an early lead can see it narrow as more early votes are counted.
* **Arizona** will release its first batch of election results at 10:00 p.m. ET. That includes mail-in ballots and early in-person votes.

If you've never voted before, it may be easy to expect results by bedtime. But realistically, we could be waiting a few days before any winners are announced. **And that's okay.**
[While we're waiting for the results to roll in, take our voter suppression quiz today and see if you know everything there is to know about our right to vote.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96647706/510708381/788890193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzJiMTdjMS1kMjliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ggkaD5gNqGQJILYYKNvNsef32SkVui8dXGDJYGb8RTI=&emci=09488b71-b99b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=1c2b17c1-d29b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=6787172)

_The Voter Protection Project_

**TODAY:** Kamala Harris will continue to tirelessly campaign until the LAST MINUTE in order to defeat Donald Trump.

**RIGHT NOW:** [**We need a SURGE of support, so we’re sending her a MASSIVE letter before the election concludes!**Chip in $7 tonight to give Democrats like Kamala Harris the support they need to WIN BIG and SAVE THE WHITE HOUSE! »****](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84555?t=9&akid=17971%2E878179%2EJ7TrMK)

---
To: Kamala Harris
FROM: Your Strongest Supporter
Subject: You got this, VP Harris! Dear Kamala Harris,

**We are ready to support you at the ballot box!**

You are a HUGE inspiration to me, and our country would be honored to have you in the Oval Office — _Democrats are giving this race everything we have!_

**We know MAGA Republicans will _send constant hate_ and _fight recklessly_ against the potential results, but don’t worry: you have TONS of grassroots Democrats behind you. Like you always say: _We’re NOT going back!_**

[**I wish you the best of luck, Madame VP and our future next President! name: Amanda Chase
subject: Watch Election Results Here
body:
as of 12am
| | |
---
|
# Looking for Election Results?
---
|
# 12AM UPDATE
---
|
# WATCH HERE
---
|
---
|
# VIRGINIA STAYS BLUE
---
|
---
Greetings! Here's where we are now.
Trump is winning nationally. But unfortunately Virginia is still leaning blue. Hung Cao did not prevail. No surprises in Virginia.
We didn't pick up any seats in the House, nor did we lose any seats.
Here are a few key races here in Virginia of note. John McGuire wins the 5th Congressional District Derek Anderson did not pick up a seat in the 7th Congressional District.
Despite an organized write in campaign (1,681 votes) in the 5th Congressional District, John McGuire won overwhelmingly.
The Virginia Board of Elections is the most official location for election results, but I also like to check out the results at VPAP Virginia Public Access Project.
Just click the links below.
For God & Country,
---
---

clean_body: as of 12am | | | | Looking for Election Results? | 12AM UPDATE | WATCH HERE | | VIRGINIA STAYS BLUE | Greetings! Here's where we are now. Trump is winning nationally. But unfortunately Virginia is still leaning blue. Hung Cao did not prevail. No surprises in Virginia. We didn't pick up any seats in the House, nor did we lose any seats. Here are a few key races here in Virginia of note. John McGuire wins the 5th Congressional District Derek Anderson did not pick up a seat in the 7th Congressional District. Despite an organized write in campaign (1,681 votes) in the 5th Congressional District, John McGuire won overwhelmingly. The Virginia Board of Elections is the most official location for election results, but I also like to check out the results at VPAP Virginia Public Access Project. Just click the links below. For God & Country, | | == | | == | == | == | JOHN MCGUIRE WINS | | LETS SUPPORT AMANDA! | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. | | Peter, the results for my race are in.

**I just WON my election to keep representing FL-10!**

Thanks to you – and the thousands of supporters and voters who made this happen – I just made history again, becoming the first member of Gen Z to ever be _re-elected_ to Congress.

In 2022, no one expected a working class, Afro-Latino, Gen Z organizer to actually win a Congressional election. But I defied the odds and got elected to the very institution that is designed to keep people like me from having a seat at the table.

**And now that I just won my re-election, we’re proving to everyone that this win was NEVER a fluke. It was a line in the sand, and we’re not going back behind it again.**

But votes are still being counted across the country as we speak, and we’re waiting to see which path our country will take.

I know it’s nerve-wracking, but I promise you this: No matter the outcome, I’ll NEVER stop fighting for the future we all deserve – but I’ll need _you_ on my side in this fight. Thanks to you – and the thousands of supporters and voters who made this happen – I just made history again, becoming the first member of Gen Z to ever be re-elected to Congress. In 2022, no one expected a working class, Afro-Latino, Gen Z organizer to actually win a Congressional election. But I defied the odds and got elected to the very institution that is designed to keep people like me from having a seat at the table. And now that I just won my re-election, we’re proving to everyone that this win was NEVER a fluke. It was a line in the sand, and we’re not going back behind it again. But votes are still being counted across the country as we speak, and we’re waiting to see which path our country will take. I know it’s nerve-wracking, but I promise you this: No matter the outcome, I’ll NEVER stop fighting for the future we all deserve – but I’ll need you on my side in this fight. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ~ | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~ Let's keep fighting, Maxwell Frost | Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~ ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

Friend, this is either hello or goodbye. After tonight, I’ll either be Michigan’s newest U.S. Senator and part of the Republican majority or the radical left will have a total grip on power and America’s future will look rather bleak.

I think we’ve done almost all we can. And I want to thank you in particular, Friend, for being one of our top online supporters!

We’re now in a strong position to WIN Michigan and flip the Senate majority.

**[But if there’s anything – and I mean anything – you can spare, we would appreciate your financial contribution right now.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8261fffc370244d6b06b205228b6fcfe&_e=ZyKOCDcCY7xwb_7GlmC-yeGjx09we2_QyLhTiQPIDNX7F-ia7Xhbop_CyAZ7jyyTLgqb7Oue3Eg-VDQyK3__R39X-G9f_dLPVoDLjepb3BELEBKxK2rjzsKGEQqfRaqVKO5v671EApQCWhUeC_ap235mc1R-EkCmYoD9vr8B-24oxgtV8MMXxbzswBcRErPPSnKEzW_yoHwlJfKweLwEzDSsF11VIQdXJg3x9h_WO_IxmgB_vV2kyBQ2t2etSPjXGD3eH2s4c6kj5YomnGCH-rLwNFMv3DM5aBLybCEIDX4zD7jUrNdwEF0UIrrqAYapJJ23-edZHmCsT2er9WAJxhe7_iIAehUTR0ttWK7opzLzxmRMDBKGeofVmT074HtWudzH51KX8VKduKsqxHao7wOcoQzZTWYjKByL0g_oXJADin4GOEMAykQdlQiSNWpx05s9XxGyYpcG0PAfjdh3BDHhR1mTHHwSAetiBjHaQx0%3D)**

My whole campaign has been about serving you. I served you in the Army, in the FBI, and in Congress. I have held the corrupt accountable, stood up to our foreign adversaries, and supported American workers.

I’m answering the call to serve once again but I have to be honest, **[this is the biggest battle of my life and I need your help to pull out a win.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8261fffc370244d6b06b205228b6fcfe&_e=ZyKOCDcCY7xwb_7GlmC-yeGjx09we2_QyLhTiQPIDNX7F-ia7Xhbop_CyAZ7jyyTLgqb7Oue3Eg-VDQyK3__R39X-G9f_dLPVoDLjepb3BELEBKxK2rjzsKGEQqfRaqVKO5v671EApQCWhUeC_ap235mc1R-EkCmYoD9vr8B-24oxgtV8MMXxbzswBcRErPPSnKEzW_yoHwlJfKweLwEzDSsF11VIQdXJg3x9h_WO_IxmgB_vV2kyBQ2t2etSPjXGD3eH2s4c6kj5YomnGCH-rLwNFMv3DM5aBLybCEIDX4zD7jUrNdwEF0UIrrqAYapJJ23-edZHmCsT2er9WAJxnIVywOjJgHrOxg4wUIuPGMtmMmyqVRUc7bnA2NOJzPua8q-1Ho9uQGXLpJ1YpSlK3l8k_GQxFF3vikBLv8IXhwxGQ4x2pQtE7t-IfMwyVC61ClnoUvQ7186vHYK0Swl5bnD8O8xfVWWUBh7K4TYSF4%3D)**

Our economy is crumbling, our streets are unsafe, our borders are wide open, and my radical opponent is cozying up to China all while they steal our military and business secrets.

My opponent Slotkin would be a rubber stamp for Kamala Harris. She already votes with Biden 100% of the time!

The question at the heart of this election is if we are better off than we were before Biden and Harris took office. And the answer is that we clearly are not.

It’s time for change. It’s time to Get America Back on Track! That’s exactly what I’ll do when I get to the Senate.

The polls are tight – this is the closest Senate race in America! That’s why I need your help to close out strong.

I hate to ask but I will one final time... **[Will you please make a donation to help me BEAT the Democrats?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8261fffc370244d6b06b205228b6fcfe&_e=ZyKOCDcCY7xwb_7GlmC-yeGjx09we2_QyLhTiQPIDNX7F-ia7Xhbop_CyAZ7jyyTLgqb7Oue3Eg-VDQyK3__R39X-G9f_dLPVoDLjepb3BELEBKxK2rjzsKGEQqfRaqVKO5v671EApQCWhUeC_ap235mc1R-EkCmYoD9vr8B-24oxgtV8MMXxbzswBcRErPPSnKEzW_yoHwlJfKweLwEzDSsF11VIQdXJg3x9h_WO_IxmgB_vV2kyBQ2t2etSPjXGD3eH2s4c6kj5YomnGCH-rLwNFMv3DM5aBLybCEIDX4zD7jUrNdwEF0UIrrqAYapJJ23-edZHmCsT2er9WAJxq8fiRWMoSdCI8IqksMr78RsgEzCsZqoJpNnC6JOuKuiNVmOub4G-HCzqyGwzBBoydVYBF58AgrTD2s0zVF5krYfYY13t1CXAOgYEDEi9vPstAh7Nz5uM4W7DxaPd8MXP8hawLBIQG4PGtnHkpwmCGA%3D)**
---
[**DONATE**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=8261fffc370244d6b06b205228b6fcfe&_e=ZyKOCDcCY7xwb_7GlmC-yeGjx09we2_QyLhTiQPIDNX7F-ia7Xhbop_CyAZ7jyyTLgqb7Oue3Eg-VDQyK3__R39X-G9f_dLPVoDLjepb3BELEBKxK2rjzsKGEQqfRaqVKO5v671EApQCWhUeC_ap235mc1R-EkCmYoD9vr8B-24oxgtV8MMXxbzswBcRErPPSnKEzW_yoHwlJfKweLwEzDSsF11VIQdXJg3x9h_WO_IxmgB_vV2kyBQ2t2etSPjXGD3eH2s4c6kj5YomnGCH-rLwNFMv3DM5aBLybCEIDX4zD7jUrNdwEF0UIrrqAYapJJ23-edZHmCsT2er9WAJxlG-YEJT2kwONvgU15tHQM4lkQUqWyu0HvGyFgxtHmuwZLXdLZcM2kzQwBArUwkW1ZxnZqDSOTQjq7qcMihh1BbSo-FOTKETSZR233LUpD2gNiMmGy33cVwSibEJP3bfBbF2Rr7SAoBRI8w7W2kUyBI%3D)

Thank you so much, Friend. I really mean it from the bottom of my heart. Now let’s go win!

| | |

While you might recognize me from my roles as an actor – _including one former (fictional) president_ – I’m reaching out to you today as an American citizen who’s concerned about the most important Senate race in the country.
**The Senate majority will come down to Senator Jon Tester’s race in Montana, where election experts are predicting a “toss-up” election. **
**[If you’re able, please split a donation right now between Jon Tester’s campaign and Jacky Rosen’s to help Jon defeat Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate and save the Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96648013/510723787/1743277108?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5384-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODY2N2ZmMS1kNjliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FHWkUzlMJKloaXlQSt-117TlKN1el9az9zyGkSpYykE=)**

We know what will happen if Jon loses his race in Montana.
If Republicans flip this seat, they’ll take back control of the Senate majority. They’ll launch an assault on women’s bodily autonomy. They’ll undermine voting rights and the foundations of our democracy. They’ll privatize health care, transfer off public lands, and pull the rug under Americans in favor of their extreme agenda.
To stop them, _Jon will need every bit of support he can get_ _._ Jon’s running against an out-of-state multimillionaire, and Republican groups are outspending his campaign.
**Jon is counting on your grassroots donation to combat the nearly $90 million Mitch McConnell’s cronies are pouring into Montana to flip his seat – a seat experts agree will determine control of the Senate.**

clean_body: Jon needs every bit of support | | | = Hi folks, it’s Martin Sheen. While you might recognize me from my roles as an actor – including one former (fictional) president – I’m reaching out to you today as an American citizen who’s concerned about the most important Senate race in the country. The Senate majority will come down to Senator Jon Tester’s race in Montana, where election experts are predicting a “toss-up” election. = | | = We know what will happen if Jon loses his race in Montana. If Republicans flip this seat, they’ll take back control of the Senate majority. They’ll launch an assault on women’s bodily autonomy. They’ll undermine voting rights and the foundations of our democracy. They’ll privatize health care, transfer off public lands, and pull the rug under Americans in favor of their extreme agenda. To stop them, Jon will need every bit of support he can get . Jon’s running against an out-of-state multimillionaire, and Republican groups are outspending his campaign. Jon is counting on your grassroots donation to combat the nearly $90 million Mitch McConnell’s cronies are pouring into Montana to flip his seat – a seat experts agree will determine control of the Senate. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Martin Sheen | *

name: Jane Fonda
subject: A personal message for the supporters who’ve made this moment possible.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I want to take a moment to simply say thank you.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96648489/510736766/1328794144?refcode=ea.18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ms=ea.18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4Njc1ODc0LWRhOWItZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gL-Fp06uM_VKUV3x4zP8OLWou_MS2hEnDfLbP3rvogc=&emci=d5ac9ce9-fb9a-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi there. As the polls begin to close on the East Coast, I want to pause and just say _thank you._ Your support for JanePAC, for the broader climate movement, and a planet free from the grip of the fossil fuel industry has brought us to this watershed moment. Whether you’ve been with us as a voter, donor, volunteer, or somewhere in between, you are a part of this team — and I couldn’t be more grateful. We’re all patiently waiting for results (and we need every ballot to be counted) **[but right now, I’d love for you to watch this personal message I’ve recorded just for you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96648490/510736767/-803653937?v=QEBSaVICvkc&refcode=ea.18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ms=ea.18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4Njc1ODc0LWRhOWItZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gL-Fp06uM_VKUV3x4zP8OLWou_MS2hEnDfLbP3rvogc=&emci=d5ac9ce9-fb9a-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=4823105)** | [**WATCH NOW →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96648491/510736768/-803653937?v=QEBSaVICvkc&refcode=ea.18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ms=ea.18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4Njc1ODc0LWRhOWItZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gL-Fp06uM_VKUV3x4zP8OLWou_MS2hEnDfLbP3rvogc=&emci=d5ac9ce9-fb9a-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=18675874-da9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=4823105)
---
You’ve been with us every step of the way, and that’s no small thing. Every dollar, every vote, every volunteer shift matters — and I am so in awe of the commitment I’ve seen from JanePAC’s supporters.
Whatever the results, the fight doesn’t end here. We’ll need you, and everyone in this incredible community, to keep moving forward. Your support fuels the work that comes next as we keep electing leaders who put people and our planet first — and holding them accountable when they win.
Thank you, truly, for everything you do.
Now, take a deep breath — and let’s keep fighting for the future we deserve.
With all my gratitude,
xx Jane

name: Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
subject: Riddle: What is anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-capitalist and promotes victimhood?
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=013ff60006334115bd8f9e5082372b03&_e=e_66gkMJwOQzlEFXJs1IQtIlymPydAFSrX3JKYMNOEYk1viSCVSQ4ZsekHVfC7xtAefkG3UTq4_ss95qFknOPvZnTOQwEhuZuzF_suR5yuwRM0kJmwg3IPUb7sQb7lirIM01T8aIJTUe9Xm1a-wm22RMAdy4LS9HzD_Uw6aMC3NMZqf50wc29f7rflFvyxVGWnKXOgmq8BzvMUjQZFphibQBO1jDRO2uXR6kK_5VbnrTYLUIQjwddzo99g6TmZgN1iVAkpZjXfN9STfGDen_mwz1BlkO0fQdssYvprWCe4tmlbAFX1axQkfL-j9AvZ2YUnwPUAtKl5cjcxj0y9zmJBc2xdTuJlSOVRh8068PeAFAahe8UbOb04D1lCNrR5JYpLhAnjBG17y7NjgcW2-8Ri5PK0DsHAmx2mWspovh2Xo%3D)
Peter,

Why are Hollywood movies so insufferable?

I believe it is because the entire industry has **-** for some time **-** embraced the narratives of collectivism and victimhood while promoting anti-capitalist, anti-business, and anti-Western themes.

What Ayn Rand, who worked in Hollywood, said back in 1947 remains largely true today:

_The purpose of the Communists in Hollywood is not the production of political movies openly advocating Communism. Their purpose is to corrupt our moral premises by corrupting non-political movies -- by introducing small, casual bits of propaganda into innocent stories -- thus making people absorb the basic premises of Collectivism by indirection and implication.

Few people would take Communism straight. But a constant stream of hints, lines, touches, and suggestions battering the public from the screen will act like the drops of water that split a rock if continued long enough.

**The rock they are trying to split is Americanism.**_

Anti-American woke ideology has corrupted the moral premises of writers, directors, actors, and even the consumer to advance collectivism.

It seems as if every writer is too afraid of the woke mob to think outside the boundaries of "recycled Marxism" and openly champion individualism and freedom.

As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I'm committed to exposing the moral bankruptcy of communism and upholding the moral superiority of capitalism by engaging young people with visually dramatic narrative content to educate them about history and inoculate them against the ongoing indoctrination they receive in school and through entertainment.

[We're turning Rand's stories into graphic novels and animated videos. Join me on this mission by donating $10, $35, $50, or more today to bring Ayn Rand's ideas to the younger generation. Donate $35 or more and get a copy of our graphic novel of _Anthem_ for yourself. >>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=013ff60006334115bd8f9e5082372b03&_e=e_66gkMJwOQzlEFXJs1IQtIlymPydAFSrX3JKYMNOEYk1viSCVSQ4ZsekHVfC7xtAefkG3UTq4_ss95qFknOPvZnTOQwEhuZuzF_suR5yuwRM0kJmwg3IPUb7sQb7lirIM01T8aIJTUe9Xm1a-wm22RMAdy4LS9HzD_Uw6aMC3NMZqf50wc29f7rflFvyxVGWnKXOgmq8BzvMUjQZFphibQBO1jDRO2uXR6kK_5VbnqDMNSCDz5odbYbZ80ZfjcU00EHd8PMhw8s8wOhwZe8N4M5PQPwYEZ-I21bB-Oib7xJoTEAiy5T6vJl-r6NvIi_E2rcZk_CN5fXhu02iifeXWc2BkGutwzIJIbMJreQTbdCZ5MyUEHIw9C0mD5fhnuT1QNiZ2tJ_FgGZ9KAisr6oZrwnmpA58C9nvsEtwf8hl8%3D)

Ask yourself this... Why are there so few movies about the atrocities committed under the Soviet Union?

There are dozens and dozens of movies about the horrors of Nazi Germany, as there should be. But where are the anti-Communist movies? Sure, there are a few **-** Dr. Zhivago, Mr. Jones, Ninotchka, and The Killing Fields come to mind.

Given that National Socialism lasted 12 years, while Communism spanned half the globe and lasted for over 75 years, you would expect there to be far more stories about the horrors of Communist rule. Yes, we should have movies that memorialize the 17 million killed by National Socialism, but what of the 100 million killed under Communist rule around the world?

Given the massive atrocities of the Communists **-** and the heroic stories of those who resisted their authoritarian repression **-** you'd think there'd be countless great stories to tell.

[Donate to The Atlas Society >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=013ff60006334115bd8f9e5082372b03&_e=e_66gkMJwOQzlEFXJs1IQtIlymPydAFSrX3JKYMNOEYk1viSCVSQ4ZsekHVfC7xtAefkG3UTq4_ss95qFknOPvZnTOQwEhuZuzF_suR5yuwRM0kJmwg3IPUb7sQb7lirIM01T8aIJTUe9Xm1a-wm22RMAdy4LS9HzD_Uw6aMC3NMZqf50wc29f7rflFvyxVGWnKXOgmq8BzvMUjQZFphibQBO1jDRO2uXR6kK_5VbnpIBGxDf1Koo_-8vfrYX1WTjIbc-aAui2LQads5KUWxKBTnDKJM9SBR0WK-tUP7-HGYbKwoK3IRxDxyRKi4In4JBdPTZ2h3WRkbSnbZUQl5NQ0YKN1VPwhUp2-Lw4J3-uu3UNv5UypIDNlDwnNE814lBG7PaOgCgoK6dD6MXnMMDMd7U8OI4WB6br9jX6MCxvMmbO9IVZbBtd7lpkz6md2S)

Ayn Rand called art the _" indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal."_

New movies and other forms of modern art are, indeed, communicating a moral ideal that is decidedly anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-white, anti-reason, and profoundly anti-American.

Nearly everything that is produced by modern, mainstream Hollywood is centered on a sense of victimhood.

_That 's why the work we do at The Atlas Society is so important! _

Along with my colleagues at The Atlas Society, I'm working to build a culture of innovation and achievement.

We do this by meeting young people where they are and making the moral case for liberty to a generation that is confused, dispirited, and alienated from the truth by an entertainment industry intent on subtly corrupting young minds with their woke messaging.

The rising generation must be taught that through hard work, individual effort, and a rational worldview, they can achieve great things and that the victim-oppressor mentality that has been forced upon them since grade school is FALSE.

**Peter, I invite you to join me and distribute copies of Anthem! **

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=013ff60006334115bd8f9e5082372b03&_e=e_66gkMJwOQzlEFXJs1IQtIlymPydAFSrX3JKYMNOEYk1viSCVSQ4ZsekHVfC7xtAefkG3UTq4_ss95qFknOPvZnTOQwEhuZuzF_suR5yuwRM0kJmwg3IPUb7sQb7lirIM01T8aIJTUe9Xm1a-wm22RMAdy4LS9HzD_Uw6aMC3NMZqf50wc29f7rflFvyxVGWnKXOgmq8BzvMUjQZFphibQBO1jDRO2uXR6kK_5VbnoRAYLMHy9Bwlvk_Q4sfiOtHjU7du1uWk2iJYG99Z1F9fVVXdNwpvmsH8ypX_kO9CkIZhYgjWua5uSC9aQjXoUFJ5uFXGSpK2YgBTEFGql5kNDVDNoQg6HyjtdM6My6g-WxbmEeIwKjV7Sh_sdF9qRNwCC4DwwYqhKRSRGMS_G_2WAW1CoJadQ5C9sNN2XKg08%3D)

Ayn Rand didn't write her dystopian fiction as a prediction of the future but rather as a warning to future generations about the consequences of letting envy, irrationality, and victimhood take root in the culture.

With only 12% of young people reading novels daily for fun, it's up to you, me, and The Atlas Society to reach the next generation in the digital realm with captivating art that presents Ayn Rand's ideals in a compelling and easily understandable way.

[I am personally asking for your immediate support to get graphic novels into the hands of students today. Chip in your best gift to help The Atlas Society promote Ayn Rand's philosophy of reason, ethical self-interest, and achievement to a generation badly in need of the truth. Your gift _can_ change the course of our society. clean_body: Peter, Why are Hollywood movies so insufferable? I believe it is because the entire industry has - for some time - embraced the narratives of collectivism and victimhood while promoting anti-capitalist, anti-business, and anti-Western themes. What Ayn Rand, who worked in Hollywood, said back in 1947 remains largely true today: The purpose of the Communists in Hollywood is not the production of political movies openly advocating Communism. Their purpose is to corrupt our moral premises by corrupting non-political movies -- by introducing small, casual bits of propaganda into innocent stories -- thus making people absorb the basic premises of Collectivism by indirection and implication. Few people would take Communism straight. But a constant stream of hints, lines, touches, and suggestions battering the public from the screen will act like the drops of water that split a rock if continued long enough. The rock they are trying to split is Americanism. Anti-American woke ideology has corrupted the moral premises of writers, directors, actors, and even the consumer to advance collectivism. It seems as if every writer is too afraid of the woke mob to think outside the boundaries of "recycled Marxism" and openly champion individualism and freedom. As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I'm committed to exposing the moral bankruptcy of communism and upholding the moral superiority of capitalism by engaging young people with visually dramatic narrative content to educate them about history and inoculate them against the ongoing indoctrination they receive in school and through entertainment. Ask yourself this... Why are there so few movies about the atrocities committed under the Soviet Union? There are dozens and dozens of movies about the horrors of Nazi Germany, as there should be. But where are the anti-Communist movies? Sure, there are a few - Dr. Zhivago, Mr. Jones, Ninotchka, and The Killing Fields come to mind. Given that National Socialism lasted 12 years, while Communism spanned half the globe and lasted for over 75 years, you would expect there to be far more stories about the horrors of Communist rule. Yes, we should have movies that memorialize the 17 million killed by National Socialism, but what of the 100 million killed under Communist rule around the world? Given the massive atrocities of the Communists - and the heroic stories of those who resisted their authoritarian repression - you'd think there'd be countless great stories to tell. Ayn Rand called art the " indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal." New movies and other forms of modern art are, indeed, communicating a moral ideal that is decidedly anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-white, anti-reason, and profoundly anti-American. Nearly everything that is produced by modern, mainstream Hollywood is centered on a sense of victimhood. That 's why the work we do at The Atlas Society is so important! Along with my colleagues at The Atlas Society, I'm working to build a culture of innovation and achievement. We do this by meeting young people where they are and making the moral case for liberty to a generation that is confused, dispirited, and alienated from the truth by an entertainment industry intent on subtly corrupting young minds with their woke messaging. The rising generation must be taught that through hard work, individual effort, and a rational worldview, they can achieve great things and that the victim-oppressor mentality that has been forced upon them since grade school is FALSE. Peter, I invite you to join me and distribute copies of Anthem! Ayn Rand didn't write her dystopian fiction as a prediction of the future but rather as a warning to future generations about the consequences of letting envy, irrationality, and victimhood take root in the culture. With only 12% of young people reading novels daily for fun, it's up to you, me, and The Atlas Society to reach the next generation in the digital realm with captivating art that presents Ayn Rand's ideals in a compelling and easily understandable way. - I'm honored to have you beside me on the front lines of the philosophical battle to determine the future of Western civilization. Thank you in advance for your support! Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG) CEO The Atlas Society The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. |

In that message I shared:
**_I can feel it so clearly, moments like this when we’re on the verge of making history._** _If we do our jobs right and tell the truth to Nevadans about their choice at the ballot box,**we will make history**. We will elect a strong Black woman of humble beginnings, raised by a single immigrant mother, with decades of experience in public service, as our next president._

Everything we’ve been building and working towards will come down to tonight. The team and I cannot thank you enough for getting us to this point.
That being said, we still have a job to do for the White House, for the Senate, for Congress, for reproductive rights, for our democracy, for our futures, and more.

clean_body: If we do our jobs right and tell the truth to Nevadans about their choice at the ballot box, we will make history. | | | | Sharing this again, friends. I shared a message, with a photo of baby me, right before early vote began. In that message I shared: I can feel it so clearly, moments like this when we’re on the verge of making history. If we do our jobs right and tell the truth to Nevadans about their choice at the ballot box,we will make history. We will elect a strong Black woman of humble beginnings, raised by a single immigrant mother, with decades of experience in public service, as our next president. Everything we’ve been building and working towards will come down to tonight. The team and I cannot thank you enough for getting us to this point. That being said, we still have a job to do for the White House, for the Senate, for Congress, for reproductive rights, for our democracy, for our futures, and more. Thanks, . Now let’s make history together. — DMM P.S. If you’re in line to vote by 7pm stay in line! You can also skip the line altogether by dropping off a completed ballot at a vote center. Find more details here: Nevada is a critical battleground state for Democrats to keep the Senate and White House in 2024. Unlike Republicans with their war chest full of dark money, we rely on grassroots supporters for the resources needed to win. | | Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS.com, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: How to follow the MI Senate results
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2191%2E135344%2EfuVqsC)

All but a handful of polls are closed in Michigan, so I wanted to take a quick moment to reach out and express my thanks for your support throughout this campaign.
This has been one of the most competitive (and expensive) Senate races in the country. It's going to be close. In fact, it could end up being so close that when we go to bed tonight, we might have a good idea of where the results will land – but we might not.
It’s still possible that significant portions of the vote won’t be in until Wednesday.
Until then, here are a few helpful resources for you in the hours and days ahead.
1. For more on Michigan, please see AP Decision Notes: **[AP Decision Notes: What to expect in Michigan on Election Day](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3149?t=2&akid=2191%2E135344%2EfuVqsC)** – and for a guide to what to look for nationally, from the AP: **[Want to follow election results like a pro? Here’s what to watch in key states.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3155?t=3&akid=2191%2E135344%2EfuVqsC)

2. Want to keep up with the real-time Michigan updates? Follow along here: **[https://apnews.com/projects/election-results-2024/michigan/?r=24453**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3154?t=4&akid=2191%2E135344%2EfuVqsC)

3. Please follow our campaign on **[Twitter](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/3150?t=5&akid=2191%2E135344%2EfuVqsC)** and **[Facebook](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/206?t=6&akid=2191%2E135344%2EfuVqsC)** for updates in real-time from our campaign.

We’ll also share any larger developments via this email list. In short – you’ll know big developments and results when we know!
Thank you again for your continued support. It means a lot to me.
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=2191%2E135344%2EfuVqsC).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=2191%2E135344%2EfuVqsC)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

We have a chance to make history here in Georgia by keeping our state blue and electing Kamala Harris as the first woman president.
And we couldn’t be more fired up and ready to win.

| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ex2MxgpcaQrvRLfn-WqG2GFwM0bct92DDBgMOyeirOwyCJSjNJS69IIkbR7Pa38FfW5OL2piI5yZHPlzeCbcTawZo1vOxSNeh_IvajIKIt0ZoAAB6f2hdgeEhdpBAx84SCwucxDIHwaGtssdqR6Giw==&c=HocHd0jdqsW42d2HOuM3DuPGpIBpXYHJnbPuLS0j3lCIOhJEBFKiNQ==&ch=0J_HdPzGpBVDUYT4RwYT_qUZBmyxX2qdaLbEfJK-WCvWCwev3Ljsgg==)
---
| MassGOP Triumphs with Historic Seat Gains on Beacon Hill, Signaling a New Era in Massachusetts Politics
---
---
| Election results this evening point to Republicans gaining seats on Beacon Hill. The Republican Caucus will gain multiple seats in the state legislature. The significance of these gains in a presidential election year in Massachusetts, particularly without a Republican in the corner office, cannot be overstated.
Massachusetts Republican Party Chair, Amy Carnevale, provided comment on the successful night stating, "If there was any question about the strength of the MassGOP, I think we answered that tonight. Since 1984, only one Republican has flipped a state legislative seat in a presidential election year. Tonight, we flipped three legislative seats including an incumbent Democrat who was the speaker pro-tem. All while protecting all of our incumbents that sought reelection. This evening's results send a clear warning to Democrats on Beacon Hill that the days of 'business as usual' are over. Massachusetts voters are stepping up at the ballot box to demand more accountability and transparency."
Chair Carnevale continued, "The wins this evening are a testament not only to the issues that our Republicans campaigned on, but also to the candidates themselves, who are a part of the fabric of the communities in which they ran. These candidates also worked incredibly hard to get their message out to voters."
The electoral gains continue the trend begun in 2023 with the special election win by Senator Peter Durant, the first legislative seat that had been flipped by Massachusetts Republicans in seven years. Before this win, the last Republican legislative flip in a presidential cycle was in 2016, then breaking a 32-year drought.
The 2024 cycle is a direct contrast to 2022. That year, even with the momentum of a gubernatorial election, the MassGOP not only failed to gain seats but suffered additional losses.
The MassGOP is pleased that Ballot Question #1 to allow the Auditor to Audit the Legislature has passed by a comfortable margin. The MassGOP joined with Auditor DiZolgio in favor of this common sense measure to provide accountability and greater transparency to taxpayers. We are closely monitoring the incoming numbers for Ballot Question #5 and sincerely hope that it will be voted down for the sake of the restaurant industry and its patrons.
The MassGOP extends its heartfelt gratitude to John Deaton for his fearless and honest approach to campaigning. His dedication has been truly admirable and has played a vital role in enlightening voters about what strong leadership on the national stage should embody. As Party Chair Amy Carnevale stated, "John's commitment to transparency and integrity has opened voters' eyes to the qualities we need in our leaders." His unwavering principles have set a powerful example for the future of our party and our nation.
Despite the challenges of a presidential election year, Massachusetts voters saw through the Democratic supermajority's complete failure to address the migrant crisis that has left taxpayers with a staggering burden, exceeding $1 billion in spending this fiscal year alone. Projections indicate that these costs will continue--and potentially increase--in the coming years.
High taxes and burdensome regulations under Democratic leadership have created an economic climate that drives businesses and families away, contributing to a mass exodus of residents leaving Massachusetts.
Meanwhile, a profound lack of transparency on Beacon Hill keeps voters in the dark about their elected officials' stances on critical issues, allowing spending on the migrant crisis and other key matters to be hidden from public view.
These failures pushed residents to the brink, compelling them to elect Republicans who are committed to real solutions, transparency, and putting Massachusetts families first.
The MassGOP wants to take a moment to congratulate Senator-elect Kelly Dooner, Representative-elect John Gaskey, Representative-elect Justin Thurber, and Representative-elect Ken Sweezey on their election victories and to express deep gratitude to the candidates who, despite not achieving the outcome they sought, worked tirelessly and sacrificed to improve our Commonwealth. We also extend congratulations to those who successfully defended their seats--marking the first time in recent memory that every Republican incumbent held their seat.
This is a historic night for Republicans in Massachusetts and we're just getting started. We're on to 2026.
###

Hi Peter, The polls have closed, the votes are tallied up, and I’m honored to have been re-elected to serve as your Congresswoman, representing North Carolina’s Fourth Congressional District. I am beyond humbled by the wave of support you exhibited during my campaign and all the way through to Election Day. Having you by my side on this journey has been invaluable — and the reason I am able to continue my public service mission. None of this would be possible without you, and for that, I cannot express my gratitude enough. Never underestimate the power of your generosity, your time, and your commitment to this mission. Every ounce of effort you have invested into my campaign will be repaid tenfold with immeasurable progress for NC-04, our state, and our nation — I can promise you that, Peter. I’ve made a commitment to build a better future for our children, and a better life for our communities. Thank you for believing in me, supporting my campaign, and voting to uplift the common good. Together, we are unstoppable. | McGuire Wins VA 05:
Thanks to God, My Family, Voters, and President Trump!
---
|
---
| Team,
Through the grace of God, I am now your Congressman Elect for the 5th Congressional District. Representing the people of this district will be a great honor and I deeply appreciate the team effort and support from so many people that got us here. I especially want to thank God, my family, President Trump, and the people of the 5th District. As a veteran, I know it really is amazing what we can achieve when we work as a team. I look forward to fighting for this great district -- our country needs to change course, and I will be a strong, consistent voice to get us back to President Trump's America First conservative principles and values.
The count is not over but, we are praying the AP will call it for Trump soon! We are praying we get Republican control of the Senate and grow Republican control in the House!
---
|

| For God and Country,

clean_body: | | | | == | == | McGuire Wins VA 05: Thanks to God, My Family, Voters, and President Trump! | | Team, Through the grace of God, I am now your Congressman Elect for the 5th Congressional District. Representing the people of this district will be a great honor and I deeply appreciate the team effort and support from so many people that got us here. I especially want to thank God, my family, President Trump, and the people of the 5th District. As a veteran, I know it really is amazing what we can achieve when we work as a team. I look forward to fighting for this great district -- our country needs to change course, and I will be a strong, consistent voice to get us back to President Trump's America First conservative principles and values. The count is not over but, we are praying the AP will call it for Trump soon! We are praying we get Republican control of the Senate and grow Republican control in the House! | | For God and Country, Senator John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria -Republican Nominee VA 05 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. body:
I'm standing inside the Trump VICTORY party in West Palm Beach, Florida.
| | |
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uK9XXKxsCsH9YfW9qn9_7aYuYfqG6BTLyXaqY3OMA7tvAqK_obcZTMoFw25Aok75wyUgEKaSezjZ8OiIWDnMo0CwluuNxEGzA7GFkqGUgqk_oVGoUc3fCO5yvZFhefPT8P9CyS-1SVtl6aH7HMtwfzAG7bkn8Lcuy1TKT54cQ4SpoHPPVmeRfnUBXiwEosMszJ4NuQXBWSsV9vj860q2F41IwanStpOYgYldeYIoWw0=&c=v5_cfwmuK_C8yvBLUeUvvVC-NJtDgu1xAIJz3KdNRtwul4VlyubzhA==&ch=0EeW9zSAY4JNzM63NWz_ciQtXczlvRFamxXAe27aYpvxoswBkLJ_cw==)
---
| Friends,
My hands are trembling as I write this. America has THE opportunity to return to greatness.
President Donald J. Trump. He's back. Tonight, we can finally say "My President" will be heading back to the White House!
This couldn't have happened without you.
---
| With your help, WE FOUGHT, we have poured over $18 million into advertisements that exposed the democratic fraud showing how they:
---
|
* Promoted sex change procedures for minors and illegal immigrants
* Dumped 20,000 Haitian migrants in small towns
* Harmed working families abilities to make ends meet
* Continued and started forever wars
* Destroyed America's economy with BAD trade deals that hurt manufacturing

---
| THAT ALL ENDS NOW.
---
| This is all thanks to people like YOU - our content received more than 82 million views across swing states like Pennsylvania, Arizona, and North Carolina (change based on which ones we win.) This could not have happened without your support! On behalf of the President, myself and families across our country - THANK YOU!
While we celebrate this great victory tonight, our family-first agenda will be at the forefront of the important days ahead. We must KEEP FIGHTING.
---
* APP will be ready on Day 1 of the new Trump Administration to influence Executive Orders that protect women's sports, kick the woke and destructive policies out of our military and take down transgender ideology.

* Our team will also be working to ensure the White House and government agencies are filled with staffers who support family values and will fight against the globalist agenda.

---
Our work won't stop in the White House...
---
* We're committed to flooding the halls of Congress so every member who vowed to protect children is armed with the facts and the tools necessary to enshrine those protections into law.

* We will continue working with Republican Governors and State Legislatures to make sure our schools are teaching values that align with parents, not bureaucrats put in place by Soros-backed machines.

---
| I will make sure that we won't stop until Big Family is the largest special interest group in the country.
The real fight has just begun and we need your help to keep the pressure on the left and to hold Republicans accountable to the campaign promises they made.
Can you contribute to our mission?

---
VICTORY

name: Andy Kim
subject: We won! Thank you for everything.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649372/510747888/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGJjNGMxMi1lNDliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NEGaE5FqJ11saaOUJMGxaJODHBbObTbLHU1PbHEcEIE=&emci=c3bd6909-f39a-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=f8bc4c12-e49b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **Thank you for placing your trust in me to be New Jersey's next Senator.** I am humbled and grateful for your support throughout our campaign. New Jersey is the state that welcomed my two immigrant parents, the state that raised me, the state that gave me a chance to give back as a member of Congress representing the place where I grew up, and now the state **I will work every day to make proud as**** _your next United States Senator_****.** We began this journey more than a year ago to restore trust and integrity to this seat and our politics. The images of gold bars and accusations of incredible corruption were shocking, but as I talked with people across our state, I heard a common refrain: "That's Jersey." At a time when 84 percent of New Jerseyans believe their politicians are corrupt, that shouldn't surprise anyone. People told me they simply didn't trust their public servants. They simply didn't believe that their politics was working for them. They didn't think that the big challenges we face as families and as a state were solvable because they thought nobody was looking out for them. So when I stepped up to run, it wasn't just stepping up to challenge an indicted Senator, it was to challenge a politics that had led too many to give up or give in. **There's a line I've said in conversations across this state over the past year – the opposite of democracy is apathy – and we couldn't let it win.** So I stepped up to give people a chance to fight back and hope that their voice would be heard. In those first few months, we had our doubters, but we showed New Jersey there's a better way. We showed the nation that the common refrain – "That's Jersey" – doesn't have to mean corruption and a politics for the well-off and well-connected. **It could mean a politics that lifts people**** _up_****, that gives people**** _hope_****, that delivers for**** _everyone_****.** So in conversations from house parties to volunteer phone calls to convention floors, our movement grew. And over the past months, those conversations have gone from small gatherings to big rallies from small groups of dedicated volunteers to a massive statewide coordinated campaign, and from a movement that nobody believed would win, **to**** _one that is bringing my voice – and YOUR voice – to the United States Senate_****.** **When your voice gets to the United States Senate, we will work to usher in a new era of public service, where the challenges faced by working families are met with a dedication to delivering results.** It is my mission because public service has always been my mission. It was always my mission because that's what my parents raised me to believe. As I look at my parents and look at my own two boys – I hope to give them the same opportunities and certainty that my parents gave us when we first came to New Jersey nearly forty years ago. But as a parent, uncertainty is inescapable. While we celebrate this victory, we can't help but keep an eye on what's happening across the country. **We hold out hope that Vice President Harris is our next president.** We hold out hope that I can tell my two boys that someone of her grace, empathy, and intelligence will be serving our nation in the White House. We hold out hope that our Democrats up and down the ballot across the country will win not just because we have work to do for the people, but because we must reject the hate, division, and corruption that is Donald Trump's agenda. But as every parent knows, uncertainty means that not everything goes your way; but when it doesn't, you fight like hell for your family. Tonight, I thank you not at the finish line, but at the starting line. I thank you not just for being with me on this journey, but for being with me on the journey ahead. And I thank you for the incredible honor – for this Jersey kid who never thought he'd be able to say this – to be _your next United States Senator_. Thank you for everything, _Andy_ |
---|---|---

clean_body: | | | | Thank you for placing your trust in me to be New Jersey's next Senator. I am humbled and grateful for your support throughout our campaign. New Jersey is the state that welcomed my two immigrant parents, the state that raised me, the state that gave me a chance to give back as a member of Congress representing the place where I grew up, and now the state I will work every day to make proud as your next United States Senator. We began this journey more than a year ago to restore trust and integrity to this seat and our politics. The images of gold bars and accusations of incredible corruption were shocking, but as I talked with people across our state, I heard a common refrain: "That's Jersey." At a time when 84 percent of New Jerseyans believe their politicians are corrupt, that shouldn't surprise anyone. People told me they simply didn't trust their public servants. They simply didn't believe that their politics was working for them. They didn't think that the big challenges we face as families and as a state were solvable because they thought nobody was looking out for them. So when I stepped up to run, it wasn't just stepping up to challenge an indicted Senator, it was to challenge a politics that had led too many to give up or give in. There's a line I've said in conversations across this state over the past year – the opposite of democracy is apathy – and we couldn't let it win. So I stepped up to give people a chance to fight back and hope that their voice would be heard. In those first few months, we had our doubters, but we showed New Jersey there's a better way. We showed the nation that the common refrain – "That's Jersey" – doesn't have to mean corruption and a politics for the well-off and well-connected. It could mean a politics that lifts people up, that gives people hope, that delivers for everyone. So in conversations from house parties to volunteer phone calls to convention floors, our movement grew. And over the past months, those conversations have gone from small gatherings to big rallies from small groups of dedicated volunteers to a massive statewide coordinated campaign, and from a movement that nobody believed would win, to one that is bringing my voice – and YOUR voice – to the United States Senate. When your voice gets to the United States Senate, we will work to usher in a new era of public service, where the challenges faced by working families are met with a dedication to delivering results. It is my mission because public service has always been my mission. It was always my mission because that's what my parents raised me to believe. As I look at my parents and look at my own two boys – I hope to give them the same opportunities and certainty that my parents gave us when we first came to New Jersey nearly forty years ago. But as a parent, uncertainty is inescapable. While we celebrate this victory, we can't help but keep an eye on what's happening across the country. We hold out hope that Vice President Harris is our next president. We hold out hope that I can tell my two boys that someone of her grace, empathy, and intelligence will be serving our nation in the White House. We hold out hope that our Democrats up and down the ballot across the country will win not just because we have work to do for the people, but because we must reject the hate, division, and corruption that is Donald Trump's agenda. But as every parent knows, uncertainty means that not everything goes your way; but when it doesn't, you fight like hell for your family. Tonight, I thank you not at the finish line, but at the starting line. I thank you not just for being with me on this journey, but for being with me on the journey ahead. And I thank you for the incredible honor – for this Jersey kid who never thought he'd be able to say this – to be your next United States Senator. Thank you for everything, Andy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Text "ANDY" to 89754 to opt-in to text messages from our campaign. name: Wesley Bell
subject: Beyond overwhelmed.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Today, we celebrate. Tomorrow, we get to work. Peter –

Thanks to your hard work, dedication, and unwavering support, **I’m officially heading to Congress to represent the people of St. Louis!**

Make no mistake about it: **This victory belongs to each and every one of you who believed in my vision for a better future.** Together, we ran a campaign built on the values that matter most to St. Louisans _and drove it all the way to victory._

But this campaign wasn’t just about winning, Peter. It was always about our community’s future. I want to thank my incredible team, volunteers, and everyone who knocked on doors, made phone calls, and spread the word. And most importantly, I want to thank **you.**

**Your efforts made all the difference.** As we move forward, let us remain committed to the work that still lies ahead. We have much to do, and I promise to be a voice for every person in our district _and for every American who needs it._ Together, we will build the future I know we deserve. **Thank you for believing in me.**

With heartfelt appreciation,

Wesley Bell
MO-01 Congressman-elect | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649391/510747969/1027040668?refcode=em24_241105_win_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241105_win_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b6a62281-e49b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjZhNjIyODEtZTQ5Yi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0e08sLAmqR20qeIgoAeeOksWc_z9m4TcbgrxMKOIhEk=)

body:
| | | | |

| MassGOP Congratulates President-Elect Donald Trump on Election Victory
---
---
| BOSTON, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party congratulates President-Elect Donald Trump on his victory. In a time when Americans are largely united in their belief that the country is on the wrong track, this election signals a mandate for change.
"In Massachusetts, we've felt the failures of the Biden-Harris Administration profoundly," said MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale. "Our Commonwealth faces an unprecedented migrant crisis that will cost the Commonwealth billions, and inflation has combined with our state's poor fiscal policies to push more residents out than we attract."
The MassGOP looks forward to supporting President Trump's renewed focus on America First policies, confident that better days lie ahead for both Massachusetts and the nation.
###
---

In a time when Americans are largely united in their belief that the country is on the wrong track, this election signals a mandate for change. "In Massachusetts, we've felt the failures of the Biden-Harris Administration profoundly," said MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale. "Our Commonwealth faces an unprecedented migrant crisis that will cost the Commonwealth billions, and inflation has combined with our state's poor fiscal policies to push more residents out than we attract." The MassGOP looks forward to supporting President Trump's renewed focus on America First policies, confident that better days lie ahead for both Massachusetts and the nation. | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The polls are closed. Here we go…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Thank you so, so much for everything you’ve done to get me to this point.
#

Peter —
The polls are closed in Arizona. Now, we wait.
Thank you so, so much for everything you’ve done to get me to this point.
Your support... It means the world to me. Truly.
Semper Fi,
Ruben
🌵 Wait — before you go! 🗳️
It’s going to take a little while before we know which direction this race goes. We’re going to use every tool at our disposal to ensure the votes are counted.
But we can’t forget who we’re up against. Kari Lake isn’t going to go quietly. There’s no telling what she’ll throw our way tonight and over the next few days. We’ve got to make sure Ruben has everything he needs to fight back.
[**You’ve already done so much, but if you can, please:**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24.6f99Bw&refcode=em241105-4-160&t=1&akid=3537%2E734936%2Eu8Fvp8)

Whether it was knocking on doors, making phone calls, or donating to our mission to **Bright Hope** , all of our hard work has led to this incredible moment for the First State. Right now, I’m thinking about my late husband Charles; my father Ted; and my grandmothers. They are the reason why I decided to be a public servant and to live life every day with **Bright Hope**. My campaign has always been about much more than being the **fourth Black woman to _ever_ serve in the U.S. Senate, and the first Black woman Senator to represent Delaware.** It’s been about making a difference for ALL Americans. name: John McGuire For Congress
subject: Thank God, Trump Wins!

| Trump Wins!

---
| Team,
Through the grace of God, Donald J. Trump will be our next President of the United States (#47)! It feels like "morning in America again". Donald J. Trump loves our country and he loves the American people. The American Dream will be alive again under his America First Policies.
Thank you to all the volunteers and thank you for all the prayers from all over our country. I am excited to represent the 5th Congressional District under a Trump America First presidency. Congratulations to JD Vance as well. We will protect your life, liberty, and pursuit of happiness. Are you ready to help us Make America Great Again?

body:
thank you, patriot

Patriot, **__****_THANK YOU, THANK YOU, THANK YOU, PATRIOT!_** Thanks to all of your dedication and support to Saving America and Keeping North Carolina Great, I'm thrilled to announce that the results are in - and we won. There's simply no way I could've done this without you, and I can't begin to tell you how grateful our family is for your support. It's Americans like you who give me so much hope for the future of our great nation. **It 's time** to get to work in Washington and turn our economy around, secure our border, bring safety back to our streets, and stand up for our First Amendment rights. **It 's time** to make NC-10 the BEST place to live, work, and raise a family in our entire great state. **It 's time** for brand new, battle-tested leadership to represent NC-10 in Washington. **It 's time** to take back our country. Patriot, I'm here to serve YOU - let's get it done. ___Pat Harrigan_
**_P.S. -_**[**_Make sure you 're signed up for Team Harrigan updates here._**](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=3337441441d2485295a23920d1ac5a25&_e=IqC79ZX1rM4vRk_vnITnklcVauC58Hm2lxGQVRMb2UrOUFoKIiVfPzfQN9AcdCF8aDz6FhoCaB6EXtUFTTEBwEzi6tPa3byLKMUOLsNHwjldmxl2pOuds3z7gIVHo68x4MF14S79KyzZ1jxyFBmmDw2RJQaL81RGchfTKZBnKEnugsIwHE1SAdESWSSjSedGcOd_8RY4ZIv8DZ3BJYWfljW-LFc_w6kWI2MOhf4ABuHPqc4MnIaDSk8sza9yH9QJzWz8XEHStMiWNVvJWpbxCp6_60UH4tSlx-yahrm1OPOjXf5gRPvN1hTRHVWwvjco1a5g-PhzcZTAAAGhIuIjgQ%3D%3D)**_We 've got a lot of work to do and I want to make sure you don't miss a thing! _**

body:
As the polls close and we await the results, I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you. This campaign has been an incredible experience, and we couldn't have made it this far without your support, energy, and belief in our movement.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649638/510749372/-1808454379?refcode=BLU_EM_LOW_2024-11-05_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMDk4NTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTE5MmQ4MzctZWI5Yi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZMwRIbris0QqREeFZKXUymJoObAqAm9_mRWylyjWktc=)

| Wow—what a journey it’s been, team.

**As the polls close and we await the results, I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you.** This campaign has been an incredible experience, and we couldn't have made it this far without your support, energy, and belief in our movement.

From day one, we set out to build something special—an inclusive campaign powered by people like you, fighting for a brighter future for all of us. And together, we’ve done that.

**Whether you donated, volunteered, spread the word, or simply believed in what we stand for, you’ve been an essential part of this effort.**

No matter what happens tonight, we can be proud of what we’ve accomplished together. This campaign has shown the strength of our community and the power of hope, determination, and working together.

Thanks for everything. See you on the other side **✌️**

Evan
---

| | **Throughout his time in public service, Evan has defended our most vulnerable and built coalitions to deliver solutions. Now, he's running for Congress at an inflection point for Silicon Valley and the nation.

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: We did it, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS
body:
This victory is historic, and it belongs to all of us.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649732/510749824/2145040083?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=241105_ya_historic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJmOWM0YS1lZTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8TncJWIXanNwOSAl18CstuMahLxsvsjHA-H4DtJ_ws=)
---
Peter, we did it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649733/510749825/634502765?refcode=241105_ya_historic_img&ms=241105_ya_historic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJmOWM0YS1lZTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8TncJWIXanNwOSAl18CstuMahLxsvsjHA-H4DtJ_ws=) This victory is historic, and it belongs to all of us. It belongs to everyone who chipped in to power our work and the tireless volunteers who knocked over 180,000 doors in the scorching heat and the pouring rain. It belongs to our incredible team, who made nearly 30,000 phone calls and sent over half a million texts. Most importantly, it belongs to everyone who believed a better future was possible and had the courage to fight for it. **[Our work's not done, Peter. We're still helping voters cure their ballots - a very important process in Arizona that helps to certify unverifiable signatures - because every single vote counts in our battleground state. Can you pitch in to help with that work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649734/510749826/634502765?refcode=241105_ya_historic_l1&ms=241105_ya_historic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJmOWM0YS1lZTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8TncJWIXanNwOSAl18CstuMahLxsvsjHA-H4DtJ_ws=)** **[Pitch in →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649735/510749827/2145040083?refcode=241105_ya_historic&ms=241105_ya_historic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJmOWM0YS1lZTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8TncJWIXanNwOSAl18CstuMahLxsvsjHA-H4DtJ_ws=)** While our race was called early, many pivotal races hang in the balance, including who our next President will be. Our curing work in AZ-03 will matter for who takes the state. If Kamala Harris wins the Presidential race, you can count on me to stand with her to pass the most progressive agenda in recent American history. And if Trump wins, you can count on me to fight to protect our rights and hold his unhinged presidency in check. When I take office in January, I'll be the youngest woman in Congress and the only Iranian-American Democrat. I'll go to work every single day and fight like hell for our Phoenix and Glendale communities — because we deserve bold climate action, affordable housing, and an economy that works for working people. I'm so proud to be in this work with you, Peter. Onward,
— Yassamin
| **Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03,** and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help.

**Will you support her campaign? ** **[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649736/510749828/2145040083?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=752f9c4a-ee9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ms=241105_ya_historic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJmOWM0YS1lZTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8TncJWIXanNwOSAl18CstuMahLxsvsjHA-H4DtJ_ws=)** **[GIVE Weekly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649737/510749829/2145040083?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=752f9c4a-ee9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ms=241105_ya_historic&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTJmOWM0YS1lZTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8TncJWIXanNwOSAl18CstuMahLxsvsjHA-H4DtJ_ws=)**

clean_body: This victory is historic, and it belongs to all of us. | | = Peter, we did it. = This victory is historic, and it belongs to all of us. It belongs to everyone who chipped in to power our work and the tireless volunteers who knocked over 180,000 doors in the scorching heat and the pouring rain. It belongs to our incredible team, who made nearly 30,000 phone calls and sent over half a million texts. Most importantly, it belongs to everyone who believed a better future was possible and had the courage to fight for it. = = While our race was called early, many pivotal races hang in the balance, including who our next President will be. Our curing work in AZ-03 will matter for who takes the state. If Kamala Harris wins the Presidential race, you can count on me to stand with her to pass the most progressive agenda in recent American history. And if Trump wins, you can count on me to fight to protect our rights and hold his unhinged presidency in check. When I take office in January, I'll be the youngest woman in Congress and the only Iranian-American Democrat. I'll go to work every single day and fight like hell for our Phoenix and Glendale communities — because we deserve bold climate action, affordable housing, and an economy that works for working people. I'm so proud to be in this work with you, Peter. Onward, — Yassamin | Yassamin Ansari is the Democratic nominee for AZ-03, and former Vice Mayor of Phoenix. She has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help.
