name: Sarah McBride
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
With a heart full of hope and gratitude, I’m proud to share with you that I have been elected as Delaware’s next member of the United States House of Representatives.
#
_We did it!_
**With a heart full of hope and gratitude, I’m proud to share with you that I have been elected as Delaware’s next member of the United States House of Representatives.**
Tonight is a testament to Delawareans: that here in our state of neighbors, we judge candidates based on their ideas, not their identities.
And while we await what message this nation will send the world — in this election, Delaware has sent a message loud and clear that we must be a country that protects reproductive freedom, that guarantees paid leave and affordable child care to all our families, that ensures that housing and health care are available to everyone, and that this is a democracy that is big enough for _all_ of us.
Through the power of our proximity, in this state, we have come to see our fellow citizens as neighbors with shared hopes and a common destiny. We know that the division and nastiness that we too often see nationally, must not — and do not have to — be our new normal. **That a different kind of politics is possible: a politics of hope, not of hate; of grace, not of grievance; of progress, not of pettiness.**
This is our charge as Delawareans and as Americans — and mine as Delaware’s next representative.
This opportunity to serve is only possible due to all those who have helped me carry this campaign forward — especially this grassroots team.
Together, we built an incredible, strong, and diverse coalition of supporters up and down Delaware and across the country. _Thank you, Thank you, Thank you!_
Growing up, I never imagined that I would one day serve in my state legislature as my authentic self — let alone the People’s House.
But tonight, YOU changed that! We shattered the national lavender glass ceiling and _finally_ elected an out trans person to Congress.
And while, at this moment in America’s journey, hope sometimes feels hard to come by, we must never forget that we are the beneficiaries of seemingly impossible change becoming a reality; that it’s always been in our most significant challenges that we take our biggest steps forward as a country.
**Because no matter what obstacles stand in our way, so long as we breathe, we hope — and, together, we can once again turn that hope into historic progress.**
[**This is far from the end of our journey. This is just the beginning, and I need your help to start laying the groundwork for bold change. Can you pitch in $5 to celebrate this historic victory?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241105-2?refcode=em20241105-1552&amount=5&refcode2=1552_21716_dxKJhj&akid=1552%2E21716%2EdxKJhj)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241105-2?amount=5&refcode=em20241105-1552&refcode2=1552_21716_dxKJhj&akid=1552%2E21716%2EdxKJhj)**
Thank you for believing in me,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241105-2&t=1&refcode2=1552_21716_dxKJhj&akid=1552%2E21716%2EdxKJhj)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1552%2E21716%2EdxKJhj)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1552%2E21716%2EdxKJhj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1552%2E21716%2EdxKJhj)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

subject: A big thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
Regardless of tonight’s outcome, please know that what we’ve accomplished together has made an undeniable impact. And with your help, I will continue to champion policies in Congress that benefit the lower and middle class, protect women’s healthcare and rights, improve our failing immigration system, and so much more.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649778/510750102/-1667771354?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2024-11-05_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGVlZWE5Yy1mMTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4nsWdtCbW0dPdvIsuLVs70VK6GKLvfyeCKsxL6jDr1Y=)

| Peter,

Tonight, as the votes are counted, I want to take a moment to thank you for standing with me through every step of this election cycle.

Your support, resilience, and dedication to this campaign have been truly inspiring. Together, we’ve built a movement grounded in defending our democracy, protecting our communities, and ensuring every voice is heard. We fought tirelessly to ensure that our values are protected, and I am so grateful to have had you alongside me.

Please know that what we’ve accomplished together has made an undeniable impact. And with your help, I will continue to champion policies in Congress that benefit the lower and middle class, protect women’s healthcare and rights, improve our failing immigration system, and so much more.

As long as I have you all at my side, I know we can overcome anything. And all that’s left to do is wait!

Thank you again, Peter.

Linda

**_P.S._** Regardless of the outcome, the work to elect progressives up and down the ballot and make progress on the issues that matter most–protecting Social Security and Medicare, codifying reproductive rights at the federal level, and building an economy that works for everyone–continues. name: George Latimer
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=EayifECZsVWNDoBpi4%2BYCR778OJYc6cDviADtQBYpImjcenz7fPFC561AeIEU%2FimmBr1WIaJROf4OXfJPRLukCP9MuxmXFzczF%2FdkfwmmbasxPOUHnAfxYNT4CKVpMSGrJg4VF6quICo%2B5wvHHiKt4O3HeFaRFyb9S97NETzh6kdMBnbGuprV6gkhmEDn6CSz57fB7cfdaqG6SFBonthEw9HjX0UOxX%2FKpZBo1w4AYHOV8SJ5UgqLzHO8Q8vpJ5eIU%2FJALamS0vOPkRJ5nobkneHQRD1NujHizA86fw1FpcsohtBi9QxSLfANtkNmyzaKPrt58Lt0Hidqz7iiFigh2HyZioOjV0%2Bjze23Ch4KLidmusdKjZM%2FdMpB6Df4vTmJzhwXeK%2FMCmlx9awWO%2F5pfC7Uoe49dAqJ5Ag9iR02bI86LXj5AubAe4WK2X2TmxL]

# [#]
Hey Peter,

The polls have closed, the votes were tallied up, and I have officially been elected to serve as the next Congressman representing New York’s 16th Congressional District.

Above all else, I want to express my gratitude. Whether you have donated to my campaign, volunteered in the field, or shared my mission with your family and friends – it’s thanks to YOU that I am able to continue serving the people of New York.

I am looking forward to continuing to deliver real results on issues that impact our communities most, like protecting a woman’s right to choose, improving and updating our infrastructure, building affordable housing, and creating jobs for working New Yorkers.

When I’m sworn in this January, I promise to continue fighting for you, and putting results over rhetoric.

Thanks for supporting me, Peter. I hope to make you proud.

George Latimer

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Still waiting on the results…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
While ballots are being counted, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649823/510750292/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWFhNmI5YS1mMzliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AoOEwEMipRoi9LbAhUqVLYmx2W4ioj85cuE9vbdzkZg=&emci=63d1874f-cb9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=51aa6b9a-f39b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

As Election Day is coming to a close, the results for Washington's 8th District are still coming in.

**While the remaining ballots are being counted, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you.** To every volunteer who knocked on doors, made calls, hosted events, and powered this campaign forward, I'm incredibly grateful. To everyone who cast a ballot in support of me, I'm deeply honored by your continued trust in me. I also want to recognize the tremendous work of our election officials who have been working tirelessly for weeks and months ahead of this historic election to deliver clear and complete results.

I haven't taken a single vote for granted. _Until every vote is counted, we'll keep our focus on ensuring everyone's voice is heard._

I'm proud of what we've accomplished together. **This campaign has been about choosing the right representation for our district, and my record reflects the dedication I have to Washington's 8th.**

**Serving as your representative is the privilege of a lifetime, and I'm hopeful that, once every vote is counted, I'll have the honor of continuing to serve you all in Congress.**

Thank you for standing with me.

– Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649824/510750293/136987150?refcode=em24_241105_closed_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241105_closed_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=51aa6b9a-f39b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWFhNmI5YS1mMzliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AoOEwEMipRoi9LbAhUqVLYmx2W4ioj85cuE9vbdzkZg=)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649885/510750646/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241105_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDJjZmY5Mi1mNTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ONq5uZK3Dr5rqG5R7ym87gWRD5OJKksQTh6G3tj71xY=&emci=ab076bad-c89b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=d02cff92-f59b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=252045)
---
It's official: **We have won another term to keep fighting for New Mexico in the United States Senate.** For me, this is a moment of deep gratitude and renewed commitment to each of you. I want to thank everyone who made this victory happen: our volunteers, our organizers, our supporters, our campaign staff, and most of all, the amazing people of New Mexico. You have put your trust in me once again, and I am humbled and ready to get to work. To my family, Julie, Micah, and Carter, thank you for your boundless support. I could never do this without you. And most importantly, thank you for the sacrifices that each of you have made to make me a more effective advocate for our state. And to every person who knocked on doors, made phone calls, hosted events, and showed up for New Mexico: thank you from the bottom of my heart. You are the reason we made it across the finish line. I also want to acknowledge Nella Domenici and her supporters. Campaigns are hard-fought endeavors, and I respect the commitment it takes to run and the dedication of those who stand behind their candidate. Tonight’s victory belongs to every New Mexican who shares our belief that we can build a better, brighter future for our people. We’ve worked hard all year long, and it’s because of your hard work that we can all celebrate this victory tonight. **But even as we take in this moment, we know that our work is far from over.** This election was about much more than any one campaign or candidate. It was about the future we’re building together for New Mexico. A future where good-paying jobs are available in every community, where every family has access to affordable healthcare, where children feel safe in their classrooms, where our lands and waters are protected for future generations, and where every woman has the right to make her own decisions about what happens to her body. This election was about standing up for the values that unite us and rejecting the politics of division and fear. Tonight, the people of New Mexico sent a clear message that they want a future built on freedom, opportunity, and hope. As we look ahead, I’m energized by the chance to continue working with all of you to tackle the challenges we face. In the Senate, we have a lot to do to build on what we’ve accomplished and safeguard the progress we’ve made. The stakes are too high for us to rest on past victories. Whether it’s defending women’s rights, combating climate change, bringing down costs on prescription drugs and energy, protecting our Social Security and Medicare, addressing the fentanyl crisis, or ensuring every child in New Mexico has access to a quality education, there is still so much more we can, and must, accomplish. Tonight, we celebrate. Tomorrow, the hard work continues. Thank you again, New Mexico. Thank you for standing by me, for putting your faith and trust in me, and for believing in our shared vision. I am honored, humbled, and ready to keep fighting for our future. Thank you, Martin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649886/510750647/-1809892047?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241105_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDJjZmY5Mi1mNTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ONq5uZK3Dr5rqG5R7ym87gWRD5OJKksQTh6G3tj71xY=)

---
| | | | | Friends,
With election results in, the people of the 1st District of Kansas have spoken and they have selected Mr. Tracey Mann as their Representative for the next two years.
I have said from day one of my campaign that I would fully support the great people in our District and would absolutely, and without hesitation, respect their choice.
I congratulate Mr. Mann and wish him the very best.
I am incredibly grateful to everyone who supported me in this campaign journey.
Take great care, my friends,Paul

name: Tony Wied for Congress
subject: Tony Wied Wins WI-08
body:
Wied Wins WI-08 Race to Replace Mike Gallagher | | | | |
---
| | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASENovember 5, 2024
---
| **Tony Wied Wins WI-08 Race**
De Pere, WI – Small businessman and political outsider Tony Wied released the following statement after winning the election to represent WI-08 in Congress.
---
| “I’m overwhelmed by the support shown to our campaign from the people of Wisconsin’s 8th Congressional District. I want to thank the voters in Northeast Wisconsin for giving me this opportunity. Only in America can you go from complete political outsider to representing Wisconsin families in Congress.
“Now it’s time to bring some Wisconsin commonsense to Washington to lower everyday costs, secure the southern border, and reign in out-of-control government spending. Let’s get to work!”
---

name: Rick Larsen
subject: As results come in Washington state and across the country:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Everyone who has taken the time to cast a ballot has strengthened our democracy.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96649965/510751016/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2I1NWI3Yi1mODliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RBN_p1d2bpDvHWENzwjDlTSpd8LxZlzTSi2hNUuMIYE=&emci=988909ea-e69b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=4cb55b7b-f89b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=9494239)
---

| | I am grateful for the support my campaign has received in the initial election results. There are many more ballots to be counted in Washington state, and I am confident that our election officials are fair and nonpartisan and that the final ballot count will be accurate. Everyone who has taken the time to cast a ballot has strengthened our democracy and has my thanks. I also want to thank my staff and the volunteers who supported our campaign. Your hard work helped tens of thousands of people make informed decisions in this critical election. Thank you also to my spouse, Tiia, for her constant support. My work for our community would not be possible without her. And of course, thank you to all my supporters across the 2nd District. Representing my friends and neighbors in Congress is an honor I never take for granted. Regardless of what the final results of this election are, I know there is more work to be done – to protect reproductive freedom, to combat the opioid epidemic, and to keep the jobs engine going. As results come in Washington state and across the country, I urge everyone to remain peaceful. It is the most essential promise of our democracy that the outcome of this election be determined by, and only by, the voters. More soon, _Rick_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen.
---

clean_body: Everyone who has taken the time to cast a ballot has strengthened our democracy. | | | | I am grateful for the support my campaign has received in the initial election results. There are many more ballots to be counted in Washington state, and I am confident that our election officials are fair and nonpartisan and that the final ballot count will be accurate. Everyone who has taken the time to cast a ballot has strengthened our democracy and has my thanks. I also want to thank my staff and the volunteers who supported our campaign. Your hard work helped tens of thousands of people make informed decisions in this critical election. Thank you also to my spouse, Tiia, for her constant support. My work for our community would not be possible without her. And of course, thank you to all my supporters across the 2nd District. Representing my friends and neighbors in Congress is an honor I never take for granted. Regardless of what the final results of this election are, I know there is more work to be done – to protect reproductive freedom, to combat the opioid epidemic, and to keep the jobs engine going. As results come in Washington state and across the country, I urge everyone to remain peaceful. It is the most essential promise of our democracy that the outcome of this election be determined by, and only by, the voters. More soon, Rick | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: VICTORY! Thank you once again to the 5th district
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our race in Minnesota’s 5th district was just called in our favor.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1383%2E791427%2Epjqr_K)

WE DID IT! 🎉🎉🎉
**Our race in Minnesota’s 5th district was just called in our favor. This is VICTORY!**
Thank you once again to the voters of the 5th district for trusting me to represent you and fight for our interests in Congress for another two years. Serving this caring, diverse, proud community is the honor of my life, and it’s a privilege to continue that service and continue working on the issues that affect my neighbors.
While we are still waiting on final election results across the country, including who wins the White House and control of the House and Senate, we should take a moment to acknowledge all of the hard work that went into this victory.
To everyone on this incredible team who donated, made phone calls, knocked doors, or otherwise pitched in, both during our hard-fought primary and over the last few weeks: my campaign team and I can’t thank you enough.
Even just opening emails like these goes a long way towards building this progressive movement and making tonight’s victory possible.
Now our job must be continuing to strengthen that movement and focusing on the tough fights ahead. Because no matter who the next president is, it’s going to be up to us to push for the progress we want to see: strengthening workers rights, restoring abortion rights, passing urgent climate action, bringing an end to the genocide in Gaza, and much much more.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
_PS: If you are ready to start building capacity to fight for our progressive agenda in the coming Congress,**[you can make a contribution to my campaign at this link.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov24.Rlm1iX&refcode=em241105-1-90&t=2&akid=1383%2E791427%2Epjqr_K)**_

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1383%2E791427%2Epjqr_K)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=1383%2E791427%2Epjqr_K)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=5&akid=1383%2E791427%2Epjqr_K)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1383_791427_pjqr_K&akid=1383%2E791427%2Epjqr_K)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Thank you. I am honored to have your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96650058/510751631/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWUzYjhlZi1mZTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UTcaXVNgsDibKrpplQupVv7MkpMoKX3J3PGAsyh6RUw=)
Team —
I am writing to thank you today. Tonight, we won my first re-election campaign, and this truly would not have been possible without your support. I am deeply honored to have earned your support and the trust of our community.
Over the past two years, we have all fought long and hard against MAGA extremism — each in our own way. I have been holding fraudulent lawmakers like Marjorie Taylor Greene accountable, supporting freshmen Democrats in their competitive races, and campaigning for VP Harris. Others have been volunteering, donating, and knocking on doors to defeat Donald Trump. And some have been supporting our movement in whatever way they can, voting or even simply opening an email like this one.
Whatever you did this cycle to fight MAGA extremism and defend our democracy means a great deal. But our fight does not end here.
We are facing the greatest threat to our democracy in generations as extremists challenge our fundamental freedoms every day, and I am grateful and honored that you trust me to continue fighting for the America we all deserve in Congress.
I love this country, and I am proud to call myself a patriot. I believe it is up to all of us to remind each other that patriotism is not America First, but America for All.
Thank you,
Congressman Robert Garcia
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96650059/510751632/2008734706?refcode2=b5e3b8ef-fe9b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&refcode=em241105&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWUzYjhlZi1mZTliLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UTcaXVNgsDibKrpplQupVv7MkpMoKX3J3PGAsyh6RUw=)**

* * *
Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze11q8t01jlavna9usnr8n3ddo88bmhfgnmhkgb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ge9o36c9h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlrcp8lfqmms5vhovt2i58semub2j886ohuah9g0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ge9o36c9h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztfgo1mon9cjich11uoquq7vf0iutopqolthdna0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ge9o36c9h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq25fmt36l39b4u8vct7ee9flc17gsskpd0pubjo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpimco70sph238h1e8he4937cpg61o74s1j64oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmlsioaljgfp4ka4am60bi7a8d2r84e6ms3rhas0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ge9o36c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zacadbmmmjc0tcafobupv97eu5klp9rr9ift25hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ge9o36c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: EMILYs List
subject: [ELECTION UPDATE] Where things stand tonight
body:
We don't know everything yet, but... |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96650067/510751700/162262288?refcode=WTEFEW37_20241106_NothingToReport_PL&sourceid=1055343&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmUzODIzYi0wMTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4DesNfirDrgBt3X9ALtUl6P30A31PSKSm6uBNlLo52o=) Peter,

We know — it's nerve-wracking to wait for election results; especially when so much is at stake.

While we don't know yet who has won the presidential election, and there are dozens of House and Senate seats still outstanding, we do know the importance of making sure every vote is counted. So we'll have to wait a little longer for some of the biggest results to come in.

That said, we've already seen some history-making wins for our women tonight. In fact, 47 victories have been called (so far!) for EMILYs List-endorsed candidates up and down the ballot. This COULD NOT have happened without your support, Peter.

No matter what happens tomorrow and in the days ahead, EMILYs List will be here, working to elect Democratic pro-choice women, protect reproductive rights, and build women's long-term political power — just like we've been doing for the last 39 years.

**Given how tight these races are, we are prepared for recounts and election battles, many of which will take time and money. If you'd like to support the work of electing more pro-choice Democratic women everywhere, please donate now:** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96650068/510751701/162262288?refcode=WTEFEW37_20241106_NothingToReport_PL&sourceid=1055343&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmUzODIzYi0wMTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4DesNfirDrgBt3X9ALtUl6P30A31PSKSm6uBNlLo52o=)
---
Thank you — more to come,

the EMILYs List team

clean_body: We don't know everything yet, but... | = Peter, We know — it's nerve-wracking to wait for election results; especially when so much is at stake. While we don't know yet who has won the presidential election, and there are dozens of House and Senate seats still outstanding, we do know the importance of making sure every vote is counted. So we'll have to wait a little longer for some of the biggest results to come in. That said, we've already seen some history-making wins for our women tonight. In fact, 47 victories have been called (so far!) for EMILYs List-endorsed candidates up and down the ballot. This COULD NOT have happened without your support, Peter. No matter what happens tomorrow and in the days ahead, EMILYs List will be here, working to elect Democratic pro-choice women, protect reproductive rights, and build women's long-term political power — just like we've been doing for the last 39 years. Given how tight these races are, we are prepared for recounts and election battles, many of which will take time and money. If you'd like to support the work of electing more pro-choice Democratic women everywhere, please donate now: | = Thank you — more to come, the EMILYs List team = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Dr. Mark M. Yarbrough
subject: The Word of God Speaks
body:
Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible?

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbhdbn4iacschif8mr8s7var06r46700kc4tipu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c3h2bs)
Dear Friend, Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible?

You read for a few minutes, shut your Bible, and then go about your day without another thought about what you've read. In some cases, it's become more of a task than inspiration. Or you've given up on reading the Bible altogether because it's just too overwhelming.

Maybe you've said to yourself: "I don't even know how to begin." [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbfr4iu6f62l04psjlubjrko6m5emm5e7c8h1mb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c3h2bs)
__ I understand. We all go through this in our spiritual journey.

Please let me encourage you that God loves it when you read His Word and offer you some guidance. **The goal of studying the Bible is not information --it's transformation.**

To help you grow stronger in your faith and spiritual maturity as you read the Bible, we've put together a free online course, ["How to Read the Bible Like a Seminary Professor."](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp7gf5qijud7ki850l37ditgs7rln4dincmvdgbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c3h2bs)

In this course, Dr. Howard G. Hendricks uses his 3-step approach of observation, interpretation, and application to help you get the most from reading the Bible.

I pray, as you go through the course, you'll discover the personal joy of reading God's Word.

If you want to deepen your faith and transform your life, access your free course now: [https://courses.dts.edu/courses/how-to-read-the-bible-like-a-seminary-professor](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsv908uru6a993238uah0iok3dtk09ip1k6nbvmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c3h2bs)

Blessings, Dr. Mark Yarbrough President P.S. Reading the Bible can change your life. Access your free online course, "How to Read the Bible Like a Seminary Professor." >> [https://courses.dts.edu/courses/how-to-read-the-bible-like-a-seminary-professor](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zorj5i7gg2l2o8amql4ml9pkr51qn7nojvsnqnsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c3h2bs)
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrejnt0souuoglpkm14vt6ost9891h8hgtt6ad60_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4493tciquoqob4cuagutdl5eqrhdfc3laivguf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c5h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkuabtqpgepiq33q590mirq8m8a9qn5dk6s4thd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c5h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn7lv6hqfph2np8g04vpf9psji3rbvkghu4vupso_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9fgrb4gega8vfnvcl7vmf03tj74l2q3sil92l9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmgvcakhjgq5b39mvkqhqkbmrao4tgvqke5bteoo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o71c5h2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Election integrity in America
body:
Election season is upon us and the future of our country is at stake.

Lord knows we need it

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zn2r40v069tfenk7bvn1sok57rfosqmktfm4fgjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o76c5h2bs)
---
|
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0dsvv83panhn5l648kua40vm2ra2f7c7js6q048_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o76c5h2bs)
---
# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Dear Reader,

Election season is upon us and the future of our country is at stake.

Make no mistake, this is as serious as it gets. Election integrity in America is no longer a sure thing.
**
It’s for exactly this reason that our nation needs The New York Sun.**
---
| | [JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ →](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqps33v2vm3hgdi3taqelr727lk6cln5hbj0t438_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o76c5h2bs)
---
| | It’s a tenacious newspaper that pulls no punches in the battle for truth. It has been since it was founded in 1833. The Sun will watch this election like the press hawk that it is. **It will expose any and all misdeeds.****
****
** There’s no paper in this country that’s covered the prosecution by Democrats of their chief political opponent as doggedly as the Sun has. Its reporters, editors and analysts miss nothing and know exactly where the Constitution stands every step of the way.

I’ll be there too, publishing my thoughts as we go in my exclusive weekly Sun column.

I don’t have to tell you though that we’ll be up against a media machine that is many times our size. The cards will be stacked against us.

That's why we need every American to join us. If we win the battle for truth, we can take back our country. And I know that if we join together we will win.

Membership in the Sun starts at just a penny a day. Don’t delay. We need you with us.

subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkcb5gdeq1fmuktc59pli3mq95ko99hfirpinod0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o75chh2bs)

| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze1hkolies63vieahbcjpdh61nptpa60jvismang_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie0o75chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

name: Val Hoyle
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
https://www.valhoyle.com/ [https://www.valhoyle.com/]
Peter, thanks to the support of this incredible team, I won re-election to continue representing Oregon’s 4th District in Congress!

This wouldn’t have been possible without every single person who volunteered, donated, and expressed their support for our campaign.

We came together around our collective values of protecting reproductive rights and our environment, and building an economy that works for all — and we succeeded!

Now, we have the opportunity to turn those values into lasting results.

Oregon can be a leader in combating climate change, fighting for clean air and water, and protecting our natural treasures.

We can fight to protect and cover contraception, abortion, and postpartum care.

And we can continue bringing prices down and driving wages up.

I look forward to going back to Congress and working to improve the lives of everyone in Oregon’s 4th Congressional District.

Thank you, Peter, for making this victory possible!

— Val

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hi friends,
I’m so honored to have earned the continued trust of my constituents and to be re-elected to Congress for a third term.
From the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU for your support throughout this entire campaign. This win is not about me – it’s about the people who have chosen facts, integrity, and compassion over rhetoric, extremism, and bigotry. And for that, I am endlessly grateful.
I first got into public service because I earnestly believed in the government’s ability and responsibility to help improve people’s lives. From my time with UNICEF and the United Nations, to Secretary Hillary Clinton’s presidential campaign, to working at the State Department and serving in Congress, I have seen firsthand the power of these organizations – and the people who are a part of them – to make a meaningful difference.
Heading into my third term, my mission remains the same: to restore faith and rebuild trust in our government — especially for those who don’t feel seen, heard, or included. I’ve said from the very beginning that I’ll work with anyone to deliver for my community, and that’s what I will keep doing — to implement big and bold solutions to the most stubborn problems we’re facing.
Throughout this campaign and my time in Congress, I’ve heard from so many San Diegans who are struggling to find and afford child care and housing. I’ve heard from parents who are worried about their kids’ ability to go to school safely, get a job, and grow up in a livable world. And I’ve heard from so many young people about how important it is that we consistently uphold our values around the world. These issues will be among my top priorities next term.
I will keep working to live up to the trust my constituents have put in me and I promise to always show up, to listen, and to be honest with people, even when we may disagree.
No matter what, I’ll always keep fighting to protect our kids’ futures, our reproductive freedoms, and our democracy. I will keep working to make child care, housing, and prescription drugs more affordable. And I will do everything in my power to rebuild trust for far too many people who feel government has let them down or left them behind.
Thank you again for everything you’ve done for me and for Democrats this year.
More to come.
-Sara

California’s 51st District

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpvelcj0ebqj4ibp32aj9bvrj7v7rcm8f9jekkc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcj989sq1avc20j4jo89eqhqko7jdhtj3vier6b8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4c5h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5ped8oprgu9tcvgceg2shb0s7t3hnrc2m76ue90_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4c5h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zika0gkg5fvvt2dtrn8c439hlgkffibv2sfq5ke8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj5cpge9pj24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zotsq1kpnso1saoqsdl3edruuafu7443mb16v5no_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0kvqggpu6ut4ghnee04ivcghdf3g381hgsrfv88_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Preserving and strengthening America's families
body:
I have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American families today.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z53i1rv9dsvtigathadfrfdfaht472805l71r9f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

My name is Dr. Ben Carson, and along with my wife, Candy, I have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American families today.

Our new book, _The Perilous Fight_ , addresses these issues head-on, offering practical insights and solutions to restore and strengthen the family unit.

Why is this important? Because the family's pivotal role in our society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges, our foundational values may be lost. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7gofenbkd2db1pigduds2qqvt84jv3k4h740d1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs) In _The Perilous Fight_ , we dive deep into the social and economic pressures that families face, dissect the erosion of traditional values, and present actionable steps for rebuilding familial bonds. This book isn't just a series of observations; it's a roadmap to a healthier, more stable society through strong family units.

**[**As someone committed to the promotion of truth and values, I am offering to send you my new book _"The Perilous Fight" with_ a gift of $45 or more.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcq7fpfnonkfg17b4qfekhl39q58fn75102i6rq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)** _The Perilous Fight _with allow you to:
* Understand the current challenges American families face;

* Discover actionable steps to strengthen your family and community; and

* Be part of a broader effort to uphold traditional values and promote societal stability

The American Cornerstone Institute is devoted to advancing faith, liberty, community, and life. By making a gift, you are taking a crucial step towards healing our nation, starting at its very heart--the family.

[Click here to make your gift of $45 or more and receive your own copy of _The Perilous Fight_ now and join us in the mission to strengthen American families.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziq6pc2tqsn5aqu0n1a0cb5nmv5k5gkr5ar29isg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

clean_body: I have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American families today. | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, My name is Dr. Ben Carson, and along with my wife, Candy, I have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American families today. Our new book, The Perilous Fight , addresses these issues head-on, offering practical insights and solutions to restore and strengthen the family unit. Why is this important? Because the family's pivotal role in our society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges, our foundational values may be lost. In The Perilous Fight , we dive deep into the social and economic pressures that families face, dissect the erosion of traditional values, and present actionable steps for rebuilding familial bonds. This book isn't just a series of observations; it's a roadmap to a healthier, more stable society through strong family units. The Perilous Fight with allow you to: Understand the current challenges American families face; Discover actionable steps to strengthen your family and community; and * Be part of a broader effort to uphold traditional values and promote societal stability The American Cornerstone Institute is devoted to advancing faith, liberty, community, and life. By making a gift, you are taking a crucial step towards healing our nation, starting at its very heart--the family. Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
subject: Riddle: What is anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-capitalist and promotes victimhood?
body:
Why are Hollywood movies so insufferable?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zje71eoa00ne9g5svnntsgnlk7pi4tfiklgcc2bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs) Friend,

Why are Hollywood movies so insufferable?

I believe it is because the entire industry has **–** for some time **–** embraced the narratives of collectivism and victimhood while promoting anti-capitalist, anti-business, and anti-Western themes.

What Ayn Rand, who worked in Hollywood, said back in 1947 remains largely true today:
_The purpose of the Communists in Hollywood is not the production of political movies openly advocating Communism. Their purpose is to corrupt our moral premises by corrupting non-political movies — by introducing small, casual bits of propaganda into innocent stories — thus making people absorb the basic premises of Collectivism by indirection and implication.

Few people would take Communism straight. But a constant stream of hints, lines, touches, and suggestions battering the public from the screen will act like the drops of water that split a rock if continued long enough.

**The rock they are trying to split is Americanism.**_
Anti-American woke ideology has corrupted the moral premises of writers, directors, actors, and even the consumer to advance collectivism.

It seems as if every writer is too afraid of the woke mob to think outside the boundaries of “recycled Marxism” and openly champion individualism and freedom.

As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I’m committed to exposing the moral bankruptcy of communism and upholding the moral superiority of capitalism by engaging young people with visually dramatic narrative content to educate them about history and inoculate them against the ongoing indoctrination they receive in school and through entertainment.

[We’re turning Rand’s stories into graphic novels and animated videos. Join me on this mission by donating $10, $35, $50, or more today to bring Ayn Rand’s ideas to the younger generation. Donate $35 or more and get a copy of our graphic novel of _Anthem_ for yourself. >>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z85tmeffl5gnitbao0pq080in16okfv1c3p6mbfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

Ask yourself this... Why are there so few movies about the atrocities committed under the Soviet Union?

There are dozens and dozens of movies about the horrors of Nazi Germany, as there should be. But where are the anti-Communist movies? Sure, there are a few **–** Dr. Zhivago, Mr. Jones, Ninotchka, and The Killing Fields come to mind.

Given that National Socialism lasted 12 years, while Communism spanned half the globe and lasted for over 75 years, you would expect there to be far more stories about the horrors of Communist rule. Yes, we should have movies that memorialize the 17 million killed by National Socialism, but what of the 100 million killed under Communist rule around the world?

Given the massive atrocities of the Communists **–** and the heroic stories of those who resisted their authoritarian repression **–** you’d think there’d be countless great stories to tell.
[Donate to The Atlas Society >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkahvbbp34j89rm99cac232rvf7mtq4nmdd1cei0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs) Ayn Rand called art the _“indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_

New movies and other forms of modern art are, indeed, communicating a moral ideal that is decidedly anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-white, anti-reason, and profoundly anti-American.

Nearly everything that is produced by modern, mainstream Hollywood is centered on a sense of victimhood.

_That’s why the work we do at The Atlas Society is so important! _

Along with my colleagues at The Atlas Society, I’m working to build a culture of innovation and achievement.

We do this by meeting young people where they are and making the moral case for liberty to a generation that is confused, dispirited, and alienated from the truth by an entertainment industry intent on subtly corrupting young minds with their woke messaging.

The rising generation must be taught that through hard work, individual effort, and a rational worldview, they can achieve great things and that the victim-oppressor mentality that has been forced upon them since grade school is FALSE.

**Friend, I invite you to join me and distribute copies of Anthem! **
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfinuofcbv95ukdq7hehg6e4g0f7hj51if45r9c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)
Ayn Rand didn’t write her dystopian fiction as a prediction of the future but rather as a warning to future generations about the consequences of letting envy, irrationality, and victimhood take root in the culture.

With only 12% of young people reading novels daily for fun, it’s up to you, me, and The Atlas Society to reach the next generation in the digital realm with captivating art that presents Ayn Rand’s ideals in a compelling and easily understandable way.

[I am personally asking for your immediate support to get graphic novels into the hands of students today. Chip in your best gift to help The Atlas Society promote Ayn Rand’s philosophy of reason, ethical self-interest, and achievement to a generation badly in need of the truth. Your gift _can_ change the course of our society. Click to make your tax-deductible contribution today. >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrkg405jthdrhdp68a3ab5kep1mnopa2jt5ta5pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj7kfhd3s62vuarg3cb8e1jq80tq37io4cb0r0h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zijlhsk6gjks3ogci086h3336t6hr3hkhk6aqpf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znjf5ijh6cvs4jt0b49uj0hrcgo8jo9crednn2o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8bno9st60fed8vgaeqbat91gvrmfqievs673ico_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z33vv48mfplskh634k3dk4a7886b7cbvsa4d4soo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf19vv9q2f7vumi9h5bf4m6mijrj9q10nbjo1cpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zen5ftqpans7kih8t92klcai3a090egc0gp1o83g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zos0el0h52bhg5idvc48qo6mjhgni58oo9aksvt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie2ob4clh2bs)
I’m honored to have you beside me on the front lines of the philosophical battle to determine the future of Western civilization.

_Thank you in advance for your support!_

Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
CEO
The Atlas Society

name: Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
subject: Riddle: What is anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-capitalist and promotes victimhood?
body:
Why are Hollywood movies so insufferable?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp5r6d2q3ohb8m71vsfb83ku75labiir7238s748_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs) Friend,

Why are Hollywood movies so insufferable?

I believe it is because the entire industry has **–** for some time **–** embraced the narratives of collectivism and victimhood while promoting anti-capitalist, anti-business, and anti-Western themes.

What Ayn Rand, who worked in Hollywood, said back in 1947 remains largely true today:
_The purpose of the Communists in Hollywood is not the production of political movies openly advocating Communism. Their purpose is to corrupt our moral premises by corrupting non-political movies — by introducing small, casual bits of propaganda into innocent stories — thus making people absorb the basic premises of Collectivism by indirection and implication.

Few people would take Communism straight. But a constant stream of hints, lines, touches, and suggestions battering the public from the screen will act like the drops of water that split a rock if continued long enough.

**The rock they are trying to split is Americanism.**_
Anti-American woke ideology has corrupted the moral premises of writers, directors, actors, and even the consumer to advance collectivism.

It seems as if every writer is too afraid of the woke mob to think outside the boundaries of “recycled Marxism” and openly champion individualism and freedom.

As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I’m committed to exposing the moral bankruptcy of communism and upholding the moral superiority of capitalism by engaging young people with visually dramatic narrative content to educate them about history and inoculate them against the ongoing indoctrination they receive in school and through entertainment.

[We’re turning Rand’s stories into graphic novels and animated videos. Join me on this mission by donating $10, $35, $50, or more today to bring Ayn Rand’s ideas to the younger generation. Donate $35 or more and get a copy of our graphic novel of _Anthem_ for yourself. >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5v08eubugv8naere9thng17lst34qubdqeg9gp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)

Ask yourself this... Why are there so few movies about the atrocities committed under the Soviet Union?

There are dozens and dozens of movies about the horrors of Nazi Germany, as there should be. But where are the anti-Communist movies? Sure, there are a few **–** Dr. Zhivago, Mr. Jones, Ninotchka, and The Killing Fields come to mind.

Given that National Socialism lasted 12 years, while Communism spanned half the globe and lasted for over 75 years, you would expect there to be far more stories about the horrors of Communist rule. Yes, we should have movies that memorialize the 17 million killed by National Socialism, but what of the 100 million killed under Communist rule around the world?

Given the massive atrocities of the Communists **–** and the heroic stories of those who resisted their authoritarian repression **–** you’d think there’d be countless great stories to tell.
[Donate to The Atlas Society >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj1j3iv4ob4n0r4g2nuklfhqp3pms2drh3bjcvng_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs) Ayn Rand called art the _“indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_

New movies and other forms of modern art are, indeed, communicating a moral ideal that is decidedly anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-white, anti-reason, and profoundly anti-American.

Nearly everything that is produced by modern, mainstream Hollywood is centered on a sense of victimhood.

_That’s why the work we do at The Atlas Society is so important! _

Along with my colleagues at The Atlas Society, I’m working to build a culture of innovation and achievement.

We do this by meeting young people where they are and making the moral case for liberty to a generation that is confused, dispirited, and alienated from the truth by an entertainment industry intent on subtly corrupting young minds with their woke messaging.

The rising generation must be taught that through hard work, individual effort, and a rational worldview, they can achieve great things and that the victim-oppressor mentality that has been forced upon them since grade school is FALSE.

**Friend, I invite you to join me and distribute copies of Anthem! **
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5o6q2osddot8j2mq5th6ubik0nrsstdjfdtrto0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)
Ayn Rand didn’t write her dystopian fiction as a prediction of the future but rather as a warning to future generations about the consequences of letting envy, irrationality, and victimhood take root in the culture.

With only 12% of young people reading novels daily for fun, it’s up to you, me, and The Atlas Society to reach the next generation in the digital realm with captivating art that presents Ayn Rand’s ideals in a compelling and easily understandable way.

[I am personally asking for your immediate support to get graphic novels into the hands of students today. Chip in your best gift to help The Atlas Society promote Ayn Rand’s philosophy of reason, ethical self-interest, and achievement to a generation badly in need of the truth. Your gift _can_ change the course of our society. Click to make your tax-deductible contribution today. >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7k7kcvi8i5b2chjcn88ctkpsg9dujoh7hsjevb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8nph249uv2c153c963vf1l67bfkv9t02pet4lkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrp52a1fmdmt51vq5p6mltuq8j5b2sl4m523oe80_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z143htql8njdlkq2kt4irrm3s5picdevpc4do5qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrdrdfqh4c6g8mfamsksn7p7adlp62r3rqru76k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zft388ecatjcpshqqj1thu6kt0lauiqdoii7no5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zktte75muoviqnsbg5uneb7k8ui9rrterodcj7a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf0qcep4nnmaa4o4klj1ciu49c55tcs88o92hi68_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn1j6m0625v0ba6iu4v8cppv3o2giorq7o0abobo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie6oj4c9h2bs)
I’m honored to have you beside me on the front lines of the philosophical battle to determine the future of Western civilization.

_Thank you in advance for your support!_

Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
CEO
The Atlas Society

name: Dave Min for Congress
subject: Dave Min Campaign Issues Statement as Ballots are Counted and CA-47 Remains Too Early to Call
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bbd41c6d7bf9/dave-min-campaign-issues-statement-as-ballots-are-counted-and-ca-47-remains-too-early-to-call-18230131?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For immediate release:** November 5, 2024
**Contact:** press@davemin.com
**Dave Min Campaign Issues Statement as Ballots are Counted and CA-47 Remains Too Early to Call**
**Irvine, CA** — Today, the Dave Min for Congress campaign released the following statement on the campaign in California’s 47th Congressional District as ballots continue to be counted and election results are too early to call:

**“The voter turnout in this election has been historic, and there are many ballots that remain to be counted,”** said Dave Min.**“From the beginning of this race, our team has been closely monitoring the elections process. We owe it to every Orange County resident who showed up at the polls to make sure that every voice is heard and every vote is counted.”** ###

_California’s 47th is an open_[ _DCCC Red To Blue_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=635922efe3&e=7017cc100e) _Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Democratic Representative Katie Porter is not running for re-election. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44%. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Jennifer Grossman (JAG)
subject: Riddle: What is anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-capitalist and promotes victimhood?
body:
Why are Hollywood movies so insufferable?

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zscqqr0qcugqaht1mj4lr96jndqnj7u5p9b7qcq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs) Friend,

Why are Hollywood movies so insufferable?

I believe it is because the entire industry has **–** for some time **–** embraced the narratives of collectivism and victimhood while promoting anti-capitalist, anti-business, and anti-Western themes.

What Ayn Rand, who worked in Hollywood, said back in 1947 remains largely true today:
_The purpose of the Communists in Hollywood is not the production of political movies openly advocating Communism. Their purpose is to corrupt our moral premises by corrupting non-political movies — by introducing small, casual bits of propaganda into innocent stories — thus making people absorb the basic premises of Collectivism by indirection and implication.

Few people would take Communism straight. But a constant stream of hints, lines, touches, and suggestions battering the public from the screen will act like the drops of water that split a rock if continued long enough.

**The rock they are trying to split is Americanism.**_
Anti-American woke ideology has corrupted the moral premises of writers, directors, actors, and even the consumer to advance collectivism.

It seems as if every writer is too afraid of the woke mob to think outside the boundaries of “recycled Marxism” and openly champion individualism and freedom.

As the CEO of The Atlas Society, I’m committed to exposing the moral bankruptcy of communism and upholding the moral superiority of capitalism by engaging young people with visually dramatic narrative content to educate them about history and inoculate them against the ongoing indoctrination they receive in school and through entertainment.

[We’re turning Rand’s stories into graphic novels and animated videos. Join me on this mission by donating $10, $35, $50, or more today to bring Ayn Rand’s ideas to the younger generation. Donate $35 or more and get a copy of our graphic novel of _Anthem_ for yourself. >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9mvsqk592kd6tt4pre5rppu7agcdafis2ii6aco_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)

Ask yourself this... Why are there so few movies about the atrocities committed under the Soviet Union?

There are dozens and dozens of movies about the horrors of Nazi Germany, as there should be. But where are the anti-Communist movies? Sure, there are a few **–** Dr. Zhivago, Mr. Jones, Ninotchka, and The Killing Fields come to mind.

Given that National Socialism lasted 12 years, while Communism spanned half the globe and lasted for over 75 years, you would expect there to be far more stories about the horrors of Communist rule. Yes, we should have movies that memorialize the 17 million killed by National Socialism, but what of the 100 million killed under Communist rule around the world?

Given the massive atrocities of the Communists **–** and the heroic stories of those who resisted their authoritarian repression **–** you’d think there’d be countless great stories to tell.
[Donate to The Atlas Society >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zumnhn68j8u3d51af6k2adct2qmtm0ekihf4r980_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs) Ayn Rand called art the _“indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_

New movies and other forms of modern art are, indeed, communicating a moral ideal that is decidedly anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-white, anti-reason, and profoundly anti-American.

Nearly everything that is produced by modern, mainstream Hollywood is centered on a sense of victimhood.

_That’s why the work we do at The Atlas Society is so important! _

Along with my colleagues at The Atlas Society, I’m working to build a culture of innovation and achievement.

We do this by meeting young people where they are and making the moral case for liberty to a generation that is confused, dispirited, and alienated from the truth by an entertainment industry intent on subtly corrupting young minds with their woke messaging.

The rising generation must be taught that through hard work, individual effort, and a rational worldview, they can achieve great things and that the victim-oppressor mentality that has been forced upon them since grade school is FALSE.

**Friend, I invite you to join me and distribute copies of Anthem! **
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6nutjffmfdg827fa11d30csm6d12d4jnl5khavg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)
Ayn Rand didn’t write her dystopian fiction as a prediction of the future but rather as a warning to future generations about the consequences of letting envy, irrationality, and victimhood take root in the culture.

With only 12% of young people reading novels daily for fun, it’s up to you, me, and The Atlas Society to reach the next generation in the digital realm with captivating art that presents Ayn Rand’s ideals in a compelling and easily understandable way.

[I am personally asking for your immediate support to get graphic novels into the hands of students today. Chip in your best gift to help The Atlas Society promote Ayn Rand’s philosophy of reason, ethical self-interest, and achievement to a generation badly in need of the truth. Your gift _can_ change the course of our society. Click to make your tax-deductible contribution today. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp21fijgmd7canp0kdfa2a5h96fgl46b5k0d67v0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqoad02ak3asq9pp5v4vheguqe146025e3vkq33g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqf410nf9m6ntv8paumn7t05f4f6qs4725it2888_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmdkmje7h400mb0kgv74561kpih5qe01lolpgbu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq60ng48n5uqjrb730tggil6gqmlqljedfpkrr18_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z294js3gn9utp4e4pjkkidn66qub7kktnp7e5qjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8elm2onn4uhf64kro4n6o5gla057k82622s1s6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zeb5tonqu0ku5l02v4kt2r361e54ag32vnvnrob8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqp0bhbbfcsrpaad49g4843rj83cq84uvsiunegg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0c3ie1o36cjh2bs)
I’m honored to have you beside me on the front lines of the philosophical battle to determine the future of Western civilization.

_Thank you in advance for your support!_

Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG)
CEO
The Atlas Society
