Given that National Socialism lasted 12 years, while Communism spanned half the globe and lasted for over 75 years, you would expect there to be far more stories about the horrors of Communist rule. Yes, we should have movies that memorialize the 17 million killed by National Socialism, but what of the 100 million killed under Communist rule around the world?

Given the massive atrocities of the Communists **–** and the heroic stories of those who resisted their authoritarian repression **–** you’d think there’d be countless great stories to tell.
[Donate to The Atlas Society >>](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyM0D9rwzAQBfBPI282suQ_8qChELyla0dzPl9sEVkS0qUl374k0L3zezx-vK_rcgXnXdg_4SR7x7zkssTEC0Opj-j9s045pkVJ1dVtW8th0dVmtwkHGCqy7ailMWbsZXXYqSMpt3UY1bQqY3Brp95oNCMqI3uJlbOvnbaVgzSd6cfG0Crb0ehuI7jB7SY6CZ4yN3eihDHsmUrJlB6rdwihwXhW3h7MqQj9IdQs1FwIH5kaCLRFfjWEmvmgGthDqUtER_wUak5QA7KLQej5weeCcCZwexD68qcSangnMTAFFvpyx1xlu6Uf570rwyg6uZ_g_BvC__3r26rfAAAA__-bsXRO) Ayn Rand called art the _“indispensable medium for the communication of a moral ideal.”_

New movies and other forms of modern art are, indeed, communicating a moral ideal that is decidedly anti-male, anti-meritocracy, anti-white, anti-reason, and profoundly anti-American.

Nearly everything that is produced by modern, mainstream Hollywood is centered on a sense of victimhood.

_That’s why the work we do at The Atlas Society is so important! _

Along with my colleagues at The Atlas Society, I’m working to build a culture of innovation and achievement.

We do this by meeting young people where they are and making the moral case for liberty to a generation that is confused, dispirited, and alienated from the truth by an entertainment industry intent on subtly corrupting young minds with their woke messaging.

The rising generation must be taught that through hard work, individual effort, and a rational worldview, they can achieve great things and that the victim-oppressor mentality that has been forced upon them since grade school is FALSE.

**Friend, I invite you to join me and distribute copies of Anthem! **
[](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyM0D9rwzAQBfBPI282suQ_8qChELyla0dzPl9sEVkS0qUl374k0L3zezx-vK_rcgXnXdg_4SR7x7zkssTEC0Opj-j9s045pkVJ1dVtW8th0dVmtwkHGCqy7ailMWbsZXXYqSMpt3UY1bQqY3Brp95oNCMqI3uJlbOvnbaVgzSd6cfG0Crb0ehuI7jB7SY6CZ4yN3eihDHsmUrJlB6rdwihwXhW3h7MqQj9IdQs1FwIH5kaCLRFfjWEmvmgGthDqUtER_wUak5QA7KLQej5weeCcCZwexD68qcSangnMTAFFvpyx1xlu6Uf570rwyg6uZ_g_BvC__3r26rfAAAA__-bsXRO)
Ayn Rand didn’t write her dystopian fiction as a prediction of the future but rather as a warning to future generations about the consequences of letting envy, irrationality, and victimhood take root in the culture.

With only 12% of young people reading novels daily for fun, it’s up to you, me, and The Atlas Society to reach the next generation in the digital realm with captivating art that presents Ayn Rand’s ideals in a compelling and easily understandable way.

[I am personally asking for your immediate support to get graphic novels into the hands of students today. Few people would take Communism straight. But a constant stream of hints, lines, touches, and suggestions battering the public from the screen will act like the drops of water that split a rock if continued long enough. clean_body: Election season is upon us and the future of our country is at stake. Lord knows we need it | | | | FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH | | Dear Friend, Election season is upon us and the future of our country is at stake. Make no mistake, this is as serious as it gets. Election integrity in America is no longer a sure thing. It’s for exactly this reason that our nation needs The New York Sun. | | | | It’s a tenacious newspaper that pulls no punches in the battle for truth. It has been since it was founded in 1833. The Sun will watch this election like the press hawk that it is. It will expose any and all misdeeds. There’s no paper in this country that’s covered the prosecution by Democrats of their chief political opponent as doggedly as the Sun has. Its reporters, editors and analysts miss nothing and know exactly where the Constitution stands every step of the way. I’ll be there too, publishing my thoughts as we go in my exclusive weekly Sun column. I don’t have to tell you though that we’ll be up against a media machine that is many times our size. The cards will be stacked against us. That's why we need every American to join us. If we win the battle for truth, we can take back our country. And I know that if we join together we will win. Membership in the Sun starts at just a penny a day. Don’t delay. We need you with us. | | | | Help us save American journalism and we can save America. Now is our time. Join us today. | | | Newt Gingrich Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Newt Gingrich Columnist for The New York Sun | | | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~_

body:
I need your immediate support.
| | |
---
Here's where things stand, friend: **Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.**
We cannot afford to lose a single Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban.
Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: **[Please, will you rush $5 now – or whatever you can spare – to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96650462/510752988/-1820320011?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5309-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGFhMjM0OC0yMTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB0BNX7gLXc2AbUZT_mW27reBVTafSL3tsPoNNCkVS8=)**

---
We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country.
Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win.
So please, friend, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment of this race: **[Rush $5 or more right now to help my campaign get across the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96650464/510752990/1399532297?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5309-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGFhMjM0OC0yMTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SB0BNX7gLXc2AbUZT_mW27reBVTafSL3tsPoNNCkVS8=)**

So please, friend, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment of this race: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much. – Jacky | By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. name: George Logan
subject: My heartfelt thanks
body:
While this wasn’t the outcome we had hoped for, my heart is full of gratitude for everyone who joined me on this journey.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.email.georgeloganforcongress.com/?qs=116de4d067d3a7933a44daec6d75fb18e5bfc2ebce5515c728087c16c00f62c440dc8df2399f87fe8df717b0edc1b0c7efd8a2f6ac25b7ac0076615c8cd22bec)
---
Peter,

Last night, I called Congresswoman Jahana Hayes to congratulate her on a hard-fought victory. While this wasn't the outcome we had hoped for, my heart is full of gratitude for everyone who joined me on this journey.

To my family, friends, incredible supporters, and the amazing campaign team - thank you for giving your all. Your dedication, kindness, and belief in me have meant the world.

And to the people of Connecticut's 5th District, thank you for welcoming me so warmly into your communities and sharing your lives with me. From front-porch conversations to diner booth chats, from every handshake to each story shared, meeting you and your families across our 41 towns has been the most rewarding part of this campaign. You reminded me why our district is such an extraordinary place to call home - because it's filled with people like you.

>From the bottom of my heart, thank you. It's been a true privilege.

Sincerely,
George Logan

---
|
---
| | Paid for George Logan For Congress
---

Ridgefield, CT, 06877

name: Dr. Mark M. Yarbrough
subject: The Word of God Speaks
body:
Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible?

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iNLO2El7xdOy9pilJ6GGeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDd54P0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvY291cnNlcy9ob3ctdG8tcmVhZC10aGUtYmlibGUtbGlrZS1hLXNlbWluYXJ5LXByb2Zlc3Nvcj91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249aG93dG9yZWFkdGhlYmlibGVsaWtlYXByb2Zlc3NvciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djJfQUUtUk9ONTc1NzVXA3NwY0IKZxKsPCtnzIRV-1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Dear Friend, Do you ever feel like you go through the motions when you read the Bible?

You read for a few minutes, shut your Bible, and then go about your day without another thought about what you've read. In some cases, it's become more of a task than inspiration. Or you've given up on reading the Bible altogether because it's just too overwhelming.

Maybe you've said to yourself: "I don't even know how to begin." [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iNLO2El7xdOy9pilJ6GGeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDd54P0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvY291cnNlcy9ob3ctdG8tcmVhZC10aGUtYmlibGUtbGlrZS1hLXNlbWluYXJ5LXByb2Zlc3Nvcj91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249aG93dG9yZWFkdGhlYmlibGVsaWtlYXByb2Zlc3NvciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djJfQUUtUk9ONTc1NzVXA3NwY0IKZxKsPCtnzIRV-1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
__ I understand. We all go through this in our spiritual journey.

Please let me encourage you that God loves it when you read His Word and offer you some guidance. **The goal of studying the Bible is not information --it's transformation.**

To help you grow stronger in your faith and spiritual maturity as you read the Bible, we've put together a free online course, ["How to Read the Bible Like a Seminary Professor."](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iNLO2El7xdOy9pilJ6GGeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDd54P0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvY291cnNlcy9ob3ctdG8tcmVhZC10aGUtYmlibGUtbGlrZS1hLXNlbWluYXJ5LXByb2Zlc3Nvcj91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249aG93dG9yZWFkdGhlYmlibGVsaWtlYXByb2Zlc3NvciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djJfQUUtUk9ONTc1NzVXA3NwY0IKZxKsPCtnzIRV-1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

In this course, Dr. Howard G. Hendricks uses his 3-step approach of observation, interpretation, and application to help you get the most from reading the Bible.

I pray, as you go through the course, you'll discover the personal joy of reading God's Word.

If you want to deepen your faith and transform your life, access your free course now: [https://courses.dts.edu/courses/how-to-read-the-bible-like-a-seminary-professor](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iNLO2El7xdOy9pilJ6GGeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDd54P0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvY291cnNlcy9ob3ctdG8tcmVhZC10aGUtYmlibGUtbGlrZS1hLXNlbWluYXJ5LXByb2Zlc3Nvcj91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249aG93dG9yZWFkdGhlYmlibGVsaWtlYXByb2Zlc3NvciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djJfQUUtUk9ONTc1NzVXA3NwY0IKZxKsPCtnzIRV-1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Blessings, Dr. Mark Yarbrough President P.S. Reading the Bible can change your life. Access your free online course, "How to Read the Bible Like a Seminary Professor." >> [https://courses.dts.edu/courses/how-to-read-the-bible-like-a-seminary-professor](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iNLO2El7xdOy9pilJ6GGeA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpDd54P0S_aHR0cHM6Ly9jb3Vyc2VzLmR0cy5lZHUvY291cnNlcy9ob3ctdG8tcmVhZC10aGUtYmlibGUtbGlrZS1hLXNlbWluYXJ5LXByb2Zlc3Nvcj91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249aG93dG9yZWFkdGhlYmlibGVsaWtlYXByb2Zlc3NvciZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9djJfQUUtUk9ONTc1NzVXA3NwY0IKZxKsPCtnzIRV-1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5a5bc2dcdfe44045a0271973eacf6f7a&_e=DpHAaL9mnr3t4br89RiEUHE5Xmn-wI5SiOMVE4cqL6132xaTXp9UdIlQPGQujTakv-9OmwsuVdwyq5QqprPXe03ilwblFqHvGD8t1qjpuNVK6sli0nnW8Pol_I2WWmneOxA3YdCfrUvBFFZhUwSA11e8M3XLXzefgoOehTxrjpK66AjDtLqpppGa3MTjc2Fi891L-oB2pF488xwWglrXlnZF1yatxUOg8NGumzJRdfvqvQMg_hg4CvJFt1g8_7i03tveqWllzujbSTMc7SIcSu11Qs9ksEUXo15oqdvKKkNOzjZT9HrerGoHtNb__kAZk1k3vthWGA45JkeaVgJbLNFI0ysMnCy2WwQ-CkGWAKf-YbUHrWTprxem2aiDL26En_YP3MWu_1sspge3bYia7Q%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5a5bc2dcdfe44045a0271973eacf6f7a&_e=DpHAaL9mnr3t4br89RiEUHE5Xmn-wI5SiOMVE4cqL6132xaTXp9UdIlQPGQujTakv-9OmwsuVdwyq5QqprPXe03ilwblFqHvGD8t1qjpuNVK6sli0nnW8Pol_I2WWmneOxA3YdCfrUvBFFZhUwSA11e8M3XLXzefgoOehTxrjpK66AjDtLqpppGa3MTjc2Fi891L-oB2pF488xwWglrXlnZF1yatxUOg8NGumzJRdfvqvQMg_hg4CvJFt1g8_7i04Hxgc2FmQu7zp8H2ZREGY-D-2vnIjGWpi9DIXwH-KKSTGbCjNZVgjuoVo8xkn_OAfcOBafHiyqLyRJajmKUCzairmVWPStautA-GKA26CaYf6hB9cdE0Ijj6u0zEhhz-1IcL-bYZ7DYWU9WYLWwLMg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5a5bc2dcdfe44045a0271973eacf6f7a&_e=DpHAaL9mnr3t4br89RiEUHE5Xmn-wI5SiOMVE4cqL6132xaTXp9UdIlQPGQujTakv-9OmwsuVdwyq5QqprPXe03ilwblFqHvGD8t1qjpuNVK6sli0nnW8Pol_I2WWmneOxA3YdCfrUvBFFZhUwSA11e8M3XLXzefgoOehTxrjpK66AjDtLqpppGa3MTjc2Fi891L-oB2pF488xwWglrXlnZF1yatxUOg8NGumzJRdfvqvQMg_hg4CvJFt1g8_7i0kHJDbeCatkS8RHmrLOWOdMF8gwhrnLSEoyJnLYqoG7Uprauyr9kXh_BN62OR8C1_dnyFeb4mmHJJe5D3OvJj6SUAao59mPuDkoymkT-SjychtM3030cFGl-StTgrT6VqM_zreJbrdMac_PYUlPqrWg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Katie Porter
subject: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39271%2E3422442%2E8Yn_ut)
Dear Derek,
I know these election results aren’t what we hoped. It’s downright terrifying to think about Donald Trump back in the White House and Republicans in control of the Senate.
We can feel sad, upset, and scared, but we can’t stay down. Our fundamental freedoms, our planet, and our democracy are too precious to give up without a fight. **[If you agree, will you chip in so that we’re ready to stand up to Trump and his cronies?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241106?refcode=em20241106-39271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39271_3422442_8Yn_ut&akid=39271%2E3422442%2E8Yn_ut)**
I know what it means to take on Donald Trump. I ran for Congress as a first-time candidate to stand up to him on behalf of Californians. When I got to the House, I wasn’t afraid to stare down Trump officials when they tried to hurt families, or to call out his attempts to sell our federal agencies to the highest bidder.
Soon, Americans across the country are going to look to California to defend our rights—from environmental protection to reproductive care to LGBTQ+ rights. We are going to meet this moment, and we aren’t going to give MAGA extremists an inch.
**[Our work starts today to stand up for freedom and to build a movement that withstands everything Trump and his allies try to throw at us. Will you join us by donating $5, $25, or more?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241106?refcode=em20241106-39271&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39271_3422442_8Yn_ut&akid=39271%2E3422442%2E8Yn_ut)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241106?refcode=em20241106-39271&refcode2=39271_3422442_8Yn_ut&akid=39271%2E3422442%2E8Yn_ut)
Thank you for getting back up and for staying engaged.
Katie Porter

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241106-39271&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39271_3422442_8Yn_ut&akid=39271%2E3422442%2E8Yn_ut)**

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Dear Reader,

Election season is upon us and the future of our country is at stake.

Make no mistake, this is as serious as it gets. Election integrity in America is no longer a sure thing.
**
It’s for exactly this reason that our nation needs The New York Sun.**
---
| | [JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ →](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8064580937ce4a3388c1f0be7c2ea650&_e=Jjwjfdaa03wfJrVjdGbyy2kdMLc8OfkW4HUoEDMWaFwxzVQLKgKYukJDSFP6breW_ra6OaDFaJG7W4AYHIT4nnPSia4QHmjTo5EdKisgvRL0iIgbwJIqJXTSdimqVV4xO2RhdRS-cMGA8WV5hm3diHkq2s1NxOd9MwSHhqc2bynmrLhbuw3n38IwvojJT9T9wOyY-j7bFWLZOc4FIL3SlqBGQCQ4iCBiybkhyV8gYoRJ-KFRO2fDXfKRy5zu1Ky9Pr6GF4WW852kCDfD_-ciTQo6tG00UQMPKJ67AVOyqsRZOzHZ457gvz0rQMMWfLKuiSy50CXCuVttseyGtpX6yW61oJlJy9CNhISyDOummWttJnrMZaONi64ZDLNZC_PP2wpSF5dM3kn2Z05wK6oL3e45QfxPvNXXP9i8Z8k3rRjx-x60q2Gn5TKwg8gKyLzh)
---
| | It’s a tenacious newspaper that pulls no punches in the battle for truth. It has been since it was founded in 1833. The Sun will watch this election like the press hawk that it is. **It will expose any and all misdeeds.****
****
** There’s no paper in this country that’s covered the prosecution by Democrats of their chief political opponent as doggedly as the Sun has. Its reporters, editors and analysts miss nothing and know exactly where the Constitution stands every step of the way.

I’ll be there too, publishing my thoughts as we go in my exclusive weekly Sun column.

I don’t have to tell you though that we’ll be up against a media machine that is many times our size. The cards will be stacked against us.

That's why we need every American to join us. If we win the battle for truth, we can take back our country. And I know that if we join together we will win.

Membership in the Sun starts at just a penny a day. Don’t delay. We need you with us.
---

clean_body: Lord knows we need it | | | | FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH | | Dear Reader, Election season is upon us and the future of our country is at stake. Make no mistake, this is as serious as it gets. Election integrity in America is no longer a sure thing. It’s for exactly this reason that our nation needs The New York Sun. | | | | It’s a tenacious newspaper that pulls no punches in the battle for truth. It has been since it was founded in 1833. The Sun will watch this election like the press hawk that it is. It will expose any and all misdeeds. There’s no paper in this country that’s covered the prosecution by Democrats of their chief political opponent as doggedly as the Sun has. Its reporters, editors and analysts miss nothing and know exactly where the Constitution stands every step of the way. I’ll be there too, publishing my thoughts as we go in my exclusive weekly Sun column. I don’t have to tell you though that we’ll be up against a media machine that is many times our size. The cards will be stacked against us. That's why we need every American to join us. If we win the battle for truth, we can take back our country. And I know that if we join together we will win. Membership in the Sun starts at just a penny a day. Don’t delay. We need you with us. | | | | Help us save American journalism and we can save America. Now is our time. Join us today. | | | Newt Gingrich Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Newt Gingrich Columnist for The New York Sun | | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith – if he doesn’t get enough support, his case against Trump could TOTALLY COLLAPSE.

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump Wins Presidential Election
body:
Donald Trump [won the White House](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFu9CAQBOCngc6nZfGPj4Lib9xd2pQWwct5I2wQkLPy9pHzAKln9Gk074_l4Tnx8XzzO7ke84KA46DUAGYpNbdCoS9Kri4SIWlJTk0a7lZNk5abM2Ctoajp3xhwDcqQvn9oDJH83VBEye4ClQKjYLQAN_JgotUBQCOtehIj0Mo919tn5qNvFNN3flG9hbzL5LbeSxP6v8BZ4Nw32jilKxM4b3mng84mcA5-L56fh8B5tMaCUUOvX3sZTj7aUCo1Xuno7NNAiULnfFVldWs5OSVu5hry3D3_4rL_8cXL4U8AAAD__8tiYvI) for a second time early Wednesday morning, according to media projections, taking Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, North Carolina, and Georgia, and leading in the other swing states as of 2:30 a.m. ET.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7FuhSAUxvGngU1zAAUdGJo2brdrR4NyUBoUguhN376xS7c7f8nvy__rMT6MD35fPs2Gurg4cuBNxVgFckw5HgnnMjJqtUPkKChqpgR0PVNK0FVLmCenkBnTccksd1Pftdi1TTs5NVtJvb5BxkAyaHqAGg1I14sZQHC0QpEG0PoSc_0d_V5WdOEnXpjrOW406LWUdBDxRvhA-PDEqS7ndd4j4cPhl706ExFDynGL79EiER__Bs3apqcPwR_yPlo248MfXF60Xpr_BgAA__8ZVlg_) | |
# Wednesday, November 6, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** President-elect Donald Trump won his bid for the White House last night in convincing fashion, sweeping up four battleground states and ending the night with leads in three more. We weren't sure we'd have election results by today, but Trump's electoral win became clear late last night, and he gave his [victory speech](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z8FqhDAYBOCnSW4rf_KriYccCkXoYQuFwh4lJn_WlLgRzSr79sU-QK8z8A1zuw5XG1N83D_tTKaEPEiQ9UWIC7TDsuZtIVcGwb0JRJKQkxEKQXdCKeSTsbVsUFFohPXeq6Bq7RoltR7FaHWreTQnKAS0AuoOoCILbejQAaAkj4rVQD6WvFY_OT7KRCG98k5r5fLMk5lKWTaGb0z2TPbHcVSv_CzPkc7-TGxxE8N-Z_h---jCOH5d7Hfmq_HLEVOKW3tO3Gcb0x9Z_nm5G_kbAAD__4pIVMM) after 2:30 a.m. in West Palm Beach, Fla., vowing to deliver a "_bigger, better, bolder, richer, safer, and stronger_ ,” future for America. We've got a full breakdown for you below, along with the other important results. Today, we're supported by our newest sponsor, [TUVU](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z7FuhSAUxvGngU1zAAUdGJo2brdrR4NyUBoUguhN376xS7c7f8nvy__rMT6MD35fPs2Gurg4cuBNxVgFckw5HgnnMjJqtUPkKChqpgR0PVNK0FVLmCenkBnTccksd1Pftdi1TTs5NVtJvb5BxkAyaHqAGg1I14sZQHC0QpEG0PoSc_0d_V5WdOEnXpjrOW406LWUdBDxRvhA-PDEqS7ndd4j4cPhl706ExFDynGL79EiER__Bs3apqcPwR_yPlo248MfXF60Xpr_BgAA__8ZVlg_), helping Christians leave toxic social media behind.
|
---
## Donald Trump Wins Presidency
President-elect Donald Trump [won the White House](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFu9CAQBOCngc6nZfGPj4Lib9xd2pQWwct5I2wQkLPy9pHzAKln9Gk074_l4Tnx8XzzO7ke84KA46DUAGYpNbdCoS9Kri4SIWlJTk0a7lZNk5abM2Ctoajp3xhwDcqQvn9oDJH83VBEye4ClQKjYLQAN_JgotUBQCOtehIj0Mo919tn5qNvFNN3flG9hbzL5LbeSxP6v8BZ4Nw32jilKxM4b3mng84mcA5-L56fh8B5tMaCUUOvX3sZTj7aUCo1Xuno7NNAiULnfFVldWs5OSVu5hry3D3_4rL_8cXL4U8AAAD__8tiYvI) for a second time last night, taking Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, North Carolina, and Georgia and leading in the other swing states. Nationally, Trump also appeared to win the popular vote. At 2 a.m., he had 66.5 million votes to Vice President Kamala Harris’ 61.6 million. In his first election, Trump won the Electoral College but lost the popular vote. Harris campaign officials said she would make [no statement Tuesday night](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL2unDAUhJ_GdEb-C14KFzR0m5Qp0cEcFicGW_Zh0b79FfcBbjUjjfTp0_x9Tk8IMRyv37CjozVNSijDpeSim3JJNaOnSTaLWxEV6gadtFo8emmtbja3_gI592K2djHeqIfpHga0nUH42QDIJrgbKKXopDC9EC2C6NZeeyG0wkVbZgQugVJp_6Vw0IZr_KQ3ltanvYluI8qV6YGpkanxuq52r8e9MTXiwc_K1HjgdUdOMVDwd92glFD5FWLkRyJeM8J_DpUTQlnPyOuZcyqEpfKI8EZ-AfmNZyj0YWqEwodB0vDnDE1xS75BoXa37GuHEL_l6Ie_3k59BQAA__8PvHB6) as her supporters began leaving her watch party at Howard University. Trump [spoke to his supporters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8z8FqhDAYBOCnSW4rf_KriYccCkXoYQuFwh4lJn_WlLgRzSr79sU-QK8z8A1zuw5XG1N83D_tTKaEPEiQ9UWIC7TDsuZtIVcGwb0JRJKQkxEKQXdCKeSTsbVsUFFohPXeq6Bq7RoltR7FaHWreTQnKAS0AuoOoCILbejQAaAkj4rVQD6WvFY_OT7KRCG98k5r5fLMk5lKWTaGb0z2TPbHcVSv_CzPkc7-TGxxE8N-Z_h---jCOH5d7Hfmq_HLEVOKW3tO3Gcb0x9Z_nm5G_kbAAD__4pIVMM) around 2:30 a.m. this morning. "_Look what happened_?" he said. "_Isn’t this crazy? This is a magnificent victory for the American people_."
## GOP Wins Senate
The GOP [won control of the Senate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8j7FuxCAQRL8GurN2Fx--KyjS0F3alBaB5UyEjWVWF-XvI-cDUs_MG72Px_wIpZbt-R5WdpLbTEDjBfECdt6P1neOMqNOLjMTG80OJwO3O06T0YsLKdGVyaaAt3DLKRNPiCl-5hQtj1dd3AlEBIsw3gEGDmDz3UQAQ5zMpEbgVKQdw1crmyyc60978THEturqFpG9K_OmyCvyXDlKaVs_oYMsvJRaz6Yin9vBMXRR5M9Uke-8BWFFXh8u7d-l1tLtefhcQ_mbafnH-eXoNwAA__8CL1ng) Tuesday, flipping two seats on their way to an early 51 to 46 majority with several races yet to be called. Republicans [scored upsets](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kD1u4zAQhU9DdSPwR5asgoUXCwFbeJstFqkEmhxZTChSIMdmfPtAOUCqGeDhPeD7_l_nq_HBx_tfs6GmJc2Syw6EAN7Pe05lR0uzaJxeECWqBrUYFD-PYhhUs2pxG05cSRy5xNu4nEfbDfJkl0W5bhCja7w-BoXgveDdyHmLhvfLqCw_ak4NrOPoPKXcvicfacUlvNITc2vT1gS9Eu2FqQuTE5NTrbXdSjwyJieM8ChMThHrcfYUPHl7vAoI8wYOt2SzISgr5pwc3HKqESh7LEAJ1hQcfOALHgUKRkMIBQ2Bj4CfO8binwjZWGRyMhkuF0H19OeNqSlZ75j6_eswh7X8w7w3Wbu9-hB86Q-q-2Z8-KagH8Q-tfwKAAD__-RsfhI) as Jim Justice claimed Democrat Joe Manchin's West Virginia seat while Trump-backed businessman Bernie Moreno defeated longtime Democratic U.S. Sen. Sherrod Brown in Ohio. Democrats [entered Election Day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80LFuwyAQxvGngc3RcVAIA0MXb-na0cJwji_CxrJporx95T5A50_66dP_-zbcIhde719xodCmOiCg6ZTqwA7bXo-NUhuUzGEiQtKSgnIarl45p-UcjFUfVqWrGcec00g5W-udRchGT9YbyeEElQKrwHiAC0Wwk9cJQCNl7YQBytzqfnlUXttMU3nXJ-2XVBdZwtzadgj9KbAX2LeZZi7l3AT2c11opdchsE9x2SLfV4G98U57p7uD1tio22n7GQunuB7dEh915_YW2Ms95O3FpfBhzw_3JfKfK9s_GZ4BfwMAAP__e9lgoQ) with a two-seat majority but faced a tough map, defending seats in two Trump-won states and in six tight races, while having only two Republican-held seats considered possible pickups. Senate Republicans fended off challenges in Nebraska and Texas, where independent Dan Osborn threatened Sen. Deb Fischer and Rep. Colin Allred, a former NFL linebacker, trailed Sen. Ted Cruz by just a few points late in the race. The GOP held a 183-154 advantage in the House at 1 a.m. ET, but the majority of races [remained uncertain,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8j71uwyAYRZ_GbEQfP7XDwNDFW7p2tChcYipikCGO-vaV-wCdr3TPOZ-35eZSTtv9wz1geyyLJKm5EJzGpe6lVfi-CBZsBCQUgxWToqsR06TYar9I66uA1trE6K9GavjgjTEiGoOoWLLnoRA0CtKG6AJHYzTKEymJoKZBE0LqZb98l7T1FTH_lAP7xZcHy3btvbZBvQ9yHuTs6oZXO6dBzjkdGOTcsLkOvpZnA0eG76ls_FmD62hnyRs_FdhuQ32lnFMbT-j94VL-g_R_ug8rfwMAAP__6DVa_w) with several districts still uncalled.
## Florida Only State to Reject Abortion Amendment
Florida [voters rejected a measure](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx80DGO6yAUheHV4I7ocnHsuKB4DV1eO6VF4BIYYbCAxMruR54FTH2kT7_O1329m5hifv43G6nuy4qAIxeCw7TutbSdbF_F4JQnQpIDKTFLuC1inuUQlLALXaWd0D2ExJv3cnHWWfC0PAzMfojqBIWAScC4AFzIwOQXaQEkkpMzG4Fc7KVevkvMPZBPn_KmerFlG5IKve-NyX8MNUOdP3tp_ZwY6hNmqIVgqOHKUL8az3Q0htqnUqMzjZuNstsodz7yI0Qb-FFeyfFg3sT3WjrZTo6bR6k9lsxrfIbeeDa1liN9uDcxneBQlduPmFJs05n83ExMv4n9j9feCn8CAAD__zpNcbM) to add abortion rights to the state constitution, the only one of 10 states with abortion measures on the ballot Tuesday to do so. The Florida measure needed approval from 60% of the voters and fell short, keeping in place the state's six-week ban on abortion. The other nine states with [abortion-related measures on their 2024 general election ballots](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8j7Fu9CAQhJ8GurOWxT-cC4q_cXdpU1oYlvNG2FiGnJW3j3wPkHZGmm--z8f08Jx5e374lVxLZULA_qbUDcy0H6XuFNqkZHSJCElLcspquA_KWi0XZ-LQqzsGsCHCrJJNyWgMvbnbpMz8T7K7BpUCo6AfADryYNKgA4BGitqKHihyK0f3VXhrC6X8U150dKGsMrultb0K_V_gKHA8z7Pb5rDRWa9e4LiXzI1DFTi-n1Om0LhsVzD7nEu7reTr90FVHi7uJ-fM1VzY5-o5vzHtD_OXw98AAAD__5yBXG8) were Arizona, Colorado, Maryland, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, New York, Nevada, and South Dakota. Pro-abortion groups [raised over $160 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL2u4yAUhJ_G7oj4MRAKim3SZdstLQznOGeFAWGUaPfpr3wf4HYzGmn0zfx5rs9Amcr-OxzgB9ZVcrkwIRg3a-v1bBDHKubkEUCCmsELq_jdCWvV_PIYldJ3hy7dY9q0EzIAOgMGtVWbUjP5q1AIbgRfHOc3CNygU5FzJSEpOy0cEo3ab38rlfECzP_qG_ot1mPO_jVGOyf1a5KPST5CK_A5r-gyfVDMcKmt9kG1sHBASQeUwWI4WqC9sLNBSVR2hrl2SoGFTv9rCUwrJ4UFt6BBZyTngGg1XNNAS73N3af2oZzpNBflfgTK31Tjh6PeXn4FAAD__7L7a-I)—six times more than opponents—to promote ballot measures in those states, with most funds directed to ad spending in Florida’s high-stakes campaign.

clean_body: Donald Trump for a second time early Wednesday morning, according to media projections, taking Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, North Carolina, and Georgia, and leading in the other swing states as of 2:30 a.m. ET. | | | | | | Wednesday, November 6, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! President-elect Donald Trump won his bid for the White House last night in convincing fashion, sweeping up four battleground states and ending the night with leads in three more. We weren't sure we'd have election results by today, but Trump's electoral win became clear late last night, and he gave his after 2:30 a.m. in West Palm Beach, Fla., vowing to deliver a "bigger, better, bolder, richer, safer, and stronger ,” future for America. We've got a full breakdown for you below, along with the other important results. Today, we're supported by our newest sponsor, , helping Christians leave toxic social media behind. | Donald Trump Wins Presidency President-elect Donald Trump for a second time last night, taking Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, North Carolina, and Georgia and leading in the other swing states. Nationally, Trump also appeared to win the popular vote. At 2 a.m., he had 66.5 million votes to Vice President Kamala Harris’ 61.6 million. In his first election, Trump won the Electoral College but lost the popular vote. Harris campaign officials said she would make as her supporters began leaving her watch party at Howard University. Trump around 2:30 a.m. this morning. "Look what happened?" he said. "Isn’t this crazy? This is a magnificent victory for the American people." GOP Wins Senate The GOP Tuesday, flipping two seats on their way to an early 51 to 46 majority with several races yet to be called. Republicans as Jim Justice claimed Democrat Joe Manchin's West Virginia seat while Trump-backed businessman Bernie Moreno defeated longtime Democratic U.S. Sen. Sherrod Brown in Ohio. Democrats with a two-seat majority but faced a tough map, defending seats in two Trump-won states and in six tight races, while having only two Republican-held seats considered possible pickups. Senate Republicans fended off challenges in Nebraska and Texas, where independent Dan Osborn threatened Sen. Deb Fischer and Rep. Colin Allred, a former NFL linebacker, trailed Sen. Ted Cruz by just a few points late in the race. The GOP held a 183-154 advantage in the House at 1 a.m. ET, but the majority of races with several districts still uncalled. Florida Only State to Reject Abortion Amendment Florida to add abortion rights to the state constitution, the only one of 10 states with abortion measures on the ballot Tuesday to do so. The Florida measure needed approval from 60% of the voters and fell short, keeping in place the state's six-week ban on abortion. The other nine states with were Arizona, Colorado, Maryland, Missouri, Montana, Nebraska, New York, Nevada, and South Dakota. Pro-abortion groups —six times more than opponents—to promote ballot measures in those states, with most funds directed to ad spending in Florida’s high-stakes campaign. I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

subject: Defend traditional values – Receive “The Perilous Fight” with your gift

the family's pivotal role in our society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges, our foundational values may be lost.

| Dear Fellow Patriot,

My name is Dr. Ben Carson, and along with my wife, Candy, I have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American families today.

Our new book, _The Perilous Fight_ , addresses these issues head-on, offering practical insights and solutions to restore and strengthen the family unit.

Why is this important? Because the family's pivotal role in our society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges, our foundational values may be lost. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f90700829aaa4021894dae27d0be5026&_e=uzPpRuZV4IiCbtpnQniUiAIM4pK6JWkfJJtVmgVF9A_BdqEiQjR_Zl2Gg5SMuaNzrpDgamGYD9qVyLhTnPDwDYfD_hISfDKUSwXpF7JQ5UC15867yf52qg1qXtr6K9H0B-nlAYUFvwBcce6mawB8_tgvv91-B1sToBqVq_mj_YxqKVzUbGTvo5GrQ4tMOiwGXXst_4eypEKq3CZQxMaYH0wxZgpfk7IC3j0RHX59vdHyHpDxjTXJAzSw5icKPuqpovKwOrah_OjiYPkTIy1QV0EiZ4eB7vttilzisClOyBX8CMn8rW1sq3dq0JYVTqVCs1IHvwHVxlXBo_f5oaGId_eaZh20FpQB6neNTXEP8kePAHTn8trVGbeX5iXGFIOzx8aqbRONkEuy7KHRpi8LLxYbmEfxQwzLQDIW2dXcWt8%3D) In _The Perilous Fight_ , we dive deep into the social and economic pressures that families face, dissect the erosion of traditional values, and present actionable steps for rebuilding familial bonds. This book isn't just a series of observations; it's a roadmap to a healthier, more stable society through strong family units.

**[**As someone committed to the promotion of truth and values, I am offering to send you my new book _"The Perilous Fight" with_ a gift of $45 or more.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f90700829aaa4021894dae27d0be5026&_e=uzPpRuZV4IiCbtpnQniUiAIM4pK6JWkfJJtVmgVF9A_BdqEiQjR_Zl2Gg5SMuaNzrpDgamGYD9qVyLhTnPDwDYfD_hISfDKUSwXpF7JQ5UC15867yf52qg1qXtr6K9H0B-nlAYUFvwBcce6mawB8_tgvv91-B1sToBqVq_mj_YxqKVzUbGTvo5GrQ4tMOiwGXXst_4eypEKq3CZQxMaYH0wxZgpfk7IC3j0RHX59vdHyHpDxjTXJAzSw5icKPuqpovKwOrah_OjiYPkTIy1QV9-J3B9Zfqs23t6vatrK-Ec1TlKRWJbL9RaJE81e-7q1HoJv2mIiUYfwd6I_EMgTigGFqC6qJ5PXEkeX_3mccW5DNIG-phHp4i2k0FUIAiByJc_RBepjjKrY0sFRmA7Eq1N7Nq5sIY834uROZIIqkdw%3D)** _The Perilous Fight _with allow you to:
* Understand the current challenges American families face;

* Discover actionable steps to strengthen your family and community; and

* Be part of a broader effort to uphold traditional values and promote societal stability

The American Cornerstone Institute is devoted to advancing faith, liberty, community, and life. By making a gift, you are taking a crucial step towards healing our nation, starting at its very heart--the family.

[Click here to make your gift of $45 or more and receive your own copy of _The Perilous Fight_ now and join us in the mission to strengthen American families.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f90700829aaa4021894dae27d0be5026&_e=uzPpRuZV4IiCbtpnQniUiAIM4pK6JWkfJJtVmgVF9A_BdqEiQjR_Zl2Gg5SMuaNzrpDgamGYD9qVyLhTnPDwDYfD_hISfDKUSwXpF7JQ5UC15867yf52qg1qXtr6K9H0B-nlAYUFvwBcce6mawB8_tgvv91-B1sToBqVq_mj_YxqKVzUbGTvo5GrQ4tMOiwGXXst_4eypEKq3CZQxMaYH0wxZgpfk7IC3j0RHX59vdHyHpDxjTXJAzSw5icKPuqpovKwOrah_OjiYPkTIy1QVyOEEcuDlp0isTdj-mHQfVqpmdy15_-mDwNEcVeca-JnSbjRyQI_H9L723ZClRVZ1L8n3xGEoKhVSPNf8BGj4xi2Dpnfa4HeInFRDpocLKHHhHfx7SPdo6KDdfy7Iu-6-S0y5O-iAUtUTTyHWa-jb_I%3D)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson

body:
Donald Trump [won the White House](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO6yAQxvGngc7RDGAwBcVp3OW0W1oExvFI-CLD5vL2q2y_9ffpV_y_rtM1cuHt_j-uFNpr3icFynSIHdgpRy7vqZc53CB7lBTQaRi8soOTS3CzTs57beebgZ608Q5MTENvne1dNpLDB0MEiwhGucuQhqTRw80R6oggDFDmtp-XtlCjV6xzee8POi9pX2UJS2tHFfqfUKNQY1to4VI-m1Djsq-00bMKNaa4HpHvm1Cj8daDxa6d3-vRPXmr3XFS5Uxb41g6KpQa75-rPEM-nlwKV-uEgfsa-ReX7c8Sj6B-AgAA__-7vl_P) for a second time early Wednesday morning, taking Pennsylvania, North Carolina, and Georgia, and leading in the other swing states as of 2 a.m. ET.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAUheGnsbege6-xDYOHShFZGoYuHZGxTbBqSmTckLx9RffO5-iT_s_rcLUxxe9bb5dgynNaBwKqT4gnUIO3Mb0Gyb0ZwbfIg0EtoGlJNZrPZsKghSRQSgslRxS2DahVIz2NDtzEozkwRFCIUJOuGtc4gS2MOqCwCKyG4GNZc1XmUMLTblN6rY-QK7cuPJm5lPvGxBujjlG373uVXJ5L_jp2Rt3HRff9mVEnruryju3xE932MyITZ6lrybPx9z2mFDelWQ23xcb0h5d_ax-GfgMAAP__4ytS6Q) | |
# Wednesday, November 6, 2024
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1528, [Álvar Nuñez Cabeza de Vaca](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GurCAUheGngU7DRkagoLiN3dz2lGYrGyVBmSAZx7c_cfpT_dX6kvXzHJ8YU9yX_7iRq5-QRymkagAa0Y8eY7rGB_duEt4CJwe6E8bK3mi-Oo0PHZQC5QECBWPnYG1AYyYLfUeaR3djAKIHEErq1sxm7sCKSRN0CIIpQT7WXNq6UqUPHiFd-U2lnfPGk1trfR2s-8fkwORwnmdbjxXznuJObS4Lk8N31Xi8mum6w-RAey13pTK8OP86Y0rx6DVTYtkwpi9e_3z7dvI3AAD__0NbVpM) and 80 other survivors of the Narvaez expedition washed up on Galveston Island after sailing on makeshift rafts from Florida. Cabeza de Vaca and his companions were the first Europeans to set foot in Texas and live to tell the tale. **The results are in! **President-elect Donald Trump won Texas' 40 electoral votes on his way to a resounding victory last night. Senator Ted Cruz defeated Rep. Colin Allred, and Texans made important decisions on a host of issues. We've got a breakdown for you in today's _Roundup_. Today's sponsor is [Gundry MD](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAUheGnsbege6-xDYOHShFZGoYuHZGxTbBqSmTckLx9RffO5-iT_s_rcLUxxe9bb5dgynNaBwKqT4gnUIO3Mb0Gyb0ZwbfIg0EtoGlJNZrPZsKghSRQSgslRxS2DahVIz2NDtzEozkwRFCIUJOuGtc4gS2MOqCwCKyG4GNZc1XmUMLTblN6rY-QK7cuPJm5lPvGxBujjlG373uVXJ5L_jp2Rt3HRff9mVEnruryju3xE932MyITZ6lrybPx9z2mFDelWQ23xcb0h5d_ax-GfgMAAP__4ytS6Q), offering health and nutrition advice. Check them out in today's edition.

|
---
## Trump Wins 2nd Term as President
Donald Trump [won the White House](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO6yAQxvGngc7RDGAwBcVp3OW0W1oExvFI-CLD5vL2q2y_9ffpV_y_rtM1cuHt_j-uFNpr3icFynSIHdgpRy7vqZc53CB7lBTQaRi8soOTS3CzTs57beebgZ608Q5MTENvne1dNpLDB0MEiwhGucuQhqTRw80R6oggDFDmtp-XtlCjV6xzee8POi9pX2UJS2tHFfqfUKNQY1to4VI-m1Djsq-00bMKNaa4HpHvm1Cj8daDxa6d3-vRPXmr3XFS5Uxb41g6KpQa75-rPEM-nlwKV-uEgfsa-ReX7c8Sj6B-AgAA__-7vl_P) for a second time early Wednesday morning, taking Pennsylvania, North Carolina, and Georgia, and leading in the other swing states as of 1 a.m. CT. In Texas, Trump beat Harris 56.7% to 42.1%, giving him the state's 40 electoral votes. He won nearly every county in South Texas, reflecting gains among Hispanics. Nationally, Trump also appeared to win the popular vote. At 2 a.m. he had 66.5 million votes to Vice President Kamala Harris' 61.6 million. In his first election, Trump won the Electoral College but lost the popular vote. Harris campaign officials said she would make [no statement Tuesday night](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2PtCAUhX8NdhhABSwobOzmfcstzVWuI1n8CFzHmX-_cfutzklO8uTk-XoMDwgxbM9_sKKj97wPSqiaS8mFHjyE-BmawrtR-FYW6KSphG2VtqZYnG4ab1qrazV6a5t51MoYq6upnqWvRlUEd8OkFFpKUStT2slOlWzFaFBWIAWrBfpAeyppQcI35Dl-9hemctrXIrqF6Mis6pjqmeqv6yrXvN0bUz1u_MxM9Rtedxx7DBSmuy6QUsj8CjHybSeeD4RvDpkTQprPyPN5HHsiTJlHhBfyC2ha-AGJPkz1kHjXSer-n6FIzh83KGRtWC2eK4T4e47-tPVy6icAAP__B8Ft0Q) as her supporters began leaving her watch party at Howard University. Trump spoke to his supporters at 1:30 a.m. CT.
## Cruz Wins Reelection
Sen. Ted Cruz [won reelection yesterday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtu6zAQRL9G6mhwlxQfBYvbuPNtUwqr5comQEuGxPiRrw_sPuVgMIOD83UaT1RqWc7_6SqpPed1RI1WASjtxkylvsahz2nSOUIvCbzRIaILvr8kNjoE4yMTOAxhwMHZYcI4Bc6Tnakv6X0GoB2AtugPgQMbiHryAoZAd1ZLLm3dDu0iTZ60z_W13mU78Hrta7q0dts786_DY4dHui3y2N_VO2ytcJUOj7ss1ER95qpJVrx9_yhea1kU1bpJVuIjsHHoEGQmjjOxD2QIrJu9z9BvKd8epdayO99Zfb5SqR-G9qeUe8LfAAAA____jWKC), defeating his Democratic opponent Colin Allred 51% to 42%, according to results as of press time. The race was one of the most closely watched in the nation, with both campaigns [raising close to $170 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZI1swwIOHExCtpdeiBq7B1pnbGR7l5n7-hOXb1QllfRUer8_l0_kwHH7hQfZ-nqmRUvdg1Igh8Ujh_fy0Xi7Sm9UQ1aNnZyMHqax2a2Ro0KUzpih_9AKaZ2e2kipHfmVSDdsb5hSclBK9npsJze5Thm5jqQ6VFL0kjzXlNu6U6UXlmd4p2_KrUtHE-xe61lE9xB6Fnq-rqs9Srw3oWeK8FWEniNdd5wpcGV314vrDhiOVCqoUcLBIXCKkJELeajkweWvv4DRg0uBI2AImTxgJsj4h-MGHKHuBA6PE3mL4LDsQs-Y4fFQddKGmmz9ed3oMoyil9uBHP7_rj-K_Lb6XwAAAP__dkZ2pQ) and outside groups investing millions more. Throughout the race, Cruz touted his support for former President Donald Trump’s border security and immigration policies, while Allred tried to tie Cruz to the state’s strict abortion ban and [repeatedly attacked him](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd7Z2FwK4oLiGLtdeaRFYJ0jEjgwXJ39_ivtr52lmNPNzns4hl7xcv8OdXXvN60RAqkfsQU8p5PKeTl1yF0gjduzQSLAjaWu6m4tByxFmBVFbY044K6llNHyak9YkbZfdJwwRNCIoMoONNkoc4WIYZUAQCjjltm5Du3HjV6hzea9P3oa43rvibq09qpBfgrwgv-_7EC914b1-uCB_WAT5jyTIb1x_S6v9MeFgfeUlNO63ELnnwrHldRHku82lx55LyVUboeB6D7kcpe3fF56O_gIAAP__cDdepA) for his trip to Cancun during a winter storm in 2021. Despite repeated efforts to flip the state amid changing demographics, Democrats have not won a statewide office in Texas since 1994.
## Texans Vote on Schools, Marijuana, and Abortion
Voters in Houston, Dallas, and Amarillo weighed in on some high-profile propositions yesterday. Houstonians [rejected a two-part $4.4 billion school bond](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd7Z21w7gguIad7n2SmsNJEYiYBkSJ39_SqQrr543o9H7Oc9nDjGk6zffvKnPS54JaGgRW5Cz4xBf86lxZgE3YuMNqh70SFKrZjUXqfpesR1IWpBKW3diYKZBLmSRbRPMewwRJCIMpDptte1xhEV57BlBDOBdqHnv6uqrf3K5xFd--L2z-dZEs9a6FdF_CZoETcdxdHbdc3qngqbkjyJoWvO91JzaT1_Q5N3dcg05CZp4r8FG_6ZCce2Sk2v_eBy1Uic9dtu6Nbtx2xFiDEUqMcD1xiF-TtR_rTwM_QYAAP__OHpkoA), the largest in state history and the district’s first since 2012, by a margin of 60% to 40%, according to preliminary results. Meanwhile, Dallas residents [approved a city charter amendment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUhJ8Gd8cC_AMuKNK4y9XVNltax-Y4ZoUhAhInefpV0m_1jTTSaPR9n6czOu_C5R_uZMpjjZPksgUhgPeTReefU1dZM3M7iIqMUA3Xg-y1qjazdlYueh6GrpOrUo2V2up5VVYvK0crKmfeY0LwXgjeSlXrRS-NGPisSDQoOGs5WVdiqstGhR6YV_-Md0r1EvfKm62Ua2bNicmRyfE4jnrP4d0xOVKAW2ZyDHS88ckbJYIMx4cWvccMhMk_4R4LpQy5YLAQA1hakttdQO9eLlwg7-g94B5voWSIKxxElskRE5xOory-_v9Uydjr4bx3uVes5Zcdnf8cLX-auxv5GwAA__8_R3Li) decriminalizing possession of less than four ounces of marijuana. Early results show the amendment passing 65% to 35%. Finally, 57% of Amarillo voters [rejected a measure](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D1u6zAQBODTUJ2E3dUfWbB4DTu_NqVASWubAeUVSEKybx84Qcr0H2YG83GZLj7E8Lj99xvb8rzKREBdjVjDMK0-xNfUV6udYTVYscWxBW1o0GN1t2gQoDNaD30PMBPP2La9MYZ7bXjEKth3GCIMiNDR2OhFLy0amEfG1iOoDngNRVJT7lz46fM1vuTg1CyyVdHeS9mzav8pcorceZ6N33wKMcoe5ME_TpGbo9wUuXebIoeoyPWK3C-uDymccp34k5dSb5JLvSfZJYcS5JGrZNf9DDGGPIyqg9vmQ_yeUP785LD0FQAA___nW2LD) to designate the city as a Sanctuary City for the Unborn, which would have banned the use of abortion-inducing drugs and prohibited people from transporting a pregnant woman to another state to receive an abortion.

clean_body: Donald Trump for a second time early Wednesday morning, taking Pennsylvania, North Carolina, and Georgia, and leading in the other swing states as of 2 a.m. ET. | | | | | | Wednesday, November 6, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1528, and 80 other survivors of the Narvaez expedition washed up on Galveston Island after sailing on makeshift rafts from Florida. Cabeza de Vaca and his companions were the first Europeans to set foot in Texas and live to tell the tale. The results are in! President-elect Donald Trump won Texas' 40 electoral votes on his way to a resounding victory last night. Senator Ted Cruz defeated Rep. Colin Allred, and Texans made important decisions on a host of issues. We've got a breakdown for you in today's Roundup. Today's sponsor is , offering health and nutrition advice. Check them out in today's edition. Abilene ☀️ 76/47° | Amarillo ☁️ 58/37° | Austin 🌤️ 76/49° | Brownsville 🌤️ 85/61° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 82/60° | DFW ☀️ 72/49° | El Paso ⛅ 74/42° | Houston 🌥️ 79/60° | Lubbock ☀️ 72/40° | San Antonio ☀️ 77/50° | Texarkana 🌦️ 72/52° | Trump Wins 2nd Term as President Donald Trump for a second time early Wednesday morning, taking Pennsylvania, North Carolina, and Georgia, and leading in the other swing states as of 1 a.m. CT. In Texas, Trump beat Harris 56.7% to 42.1%, giving him the state's 40 electoral votes. He won nearly every county in South Texas, reflecting gains among Hispanics. Nationally, Trump also appeared to win the popular vote. At 2 a.m. he had 66.5 million votes to Vice President Kamala Harris' 61.6 million. In his first election, Trump won the Electoral College but lost the popular vote. Harris campaign officials said she would make as her supporters began leaving her watch party at Howard University. Trump spoke to his supporters at 1:30 a.m. CT. Cruz Wins Reelection Sen. Ted Cruz , defeating his Democratic opponent Colin Allred 51% to 42%, according to results as of press time. The race was one of the most closely watched in the nation, with both campaigns and outside groups investing millions more. Throughout the race, Cruz touted his support for former President Donald Trump’s border security and immigration policies, while Allred tried to tie Cruz to the state’s strict abortion ban and for his trip to Cancun during a winter storm in 2021. Despite repeated efforts to flip the state amid changing demographics, Democrats have not won a statewide office in Texas since 1994. Texans Vote on Schools, Marijuana, and Abortion Voters in Houston, Dallas, and Amarillo weighed in on some high-profile propositions yesterday. Houstonians , the largest in state history and the district’s first since 2012, by a margin of 60% to 40%, according to preliminary results. Meanwhile, Dallas residents decriminalizing possession of less than four ounces of marijuana. Early results show the amendment passing 65% to 35%. Finally, 57% of Amarillo voters to designate the city as a Sanctuary City for the Unborn, which would have banned the use of abortion-inducing drugs and prohibited people from transporting a pregnant woman to another state to receive an abortion. The Flyover is just like The Texas Flyover, except it covers news from all fifty states. ! | One of America’s top doctors is hoping you’ll read this before you set foot in another grocery store. Renowned cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry has found an “invisible problem” affecting almost everything we eat. But almost nobody knows it’s happening — except the big food companies responsible for it. And Dr. Gundry’s research shows it could be the true cause of low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain in millions of Americans over 35. | ➤ The U.S. Department of Justice agreed to keep its election monitors outside Texas polling places in response to a lawsuit from Attorney General Ken Paxton to block their access. Meanwhile, Paxton deployed a rapid response legal team to address election concerns in major counties. () ➤ Texas Comptroller Glenn Hegar awarded $18.5 million to 17 rural counties to install poles for broadband internet service. The funding comes from the new Broadband Infrastructure Fund, which Texas voters approved last year. () ➤ New Braunfels: Cameron Darrick Peterson, 20, pleaded guilty to planning attacks at the local Buc-ee’s, several area high schools, and a grocery store. () ➤ Dallas: The city’s Parks and Recreation Department is deploying robotic lawnmowers at the 277-acre Kiest Softball Complex. Department Director John Jenkins said the $250,000 investment will not eliminate any current jobs. () ➤ Harris County: Former Sheriff’s Office Sergeant Garret Hardin was found not guilty by a jury Monday in the 2023 killing of Roderick Brooks, 47, who tried to grab Hardin’s taser while the officer was arresting him for attempted shoplifting. () ➤ Bastrop County: The lone registered voter in a proposed Municipal Utility District approved the creation of the special jurisdiction and the imposition of a property tax to fund bonds totaling $1.2 billion. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Defend traditional values – Receive “The Perilous Fight” with your gift
body:
the family's pivotal role in our society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges, our foundational values may be lost.

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0822272940764a56a1e1ea23c0ed5968&_e=mF17JHEXgHhlc6yRQvoD3Eg2bPk8GtMc4011ffY2uWTcUNO4UCAXGbL-3sD5S5HcHHcXywNdthbTXq9nY3fE-fEVJsQtp71x5EE5XPXmzeP_qqbnJe6YlPM95_5Y3qaAmuQO9edKrYjI1TfS5wWAxxjOIrY4CIr5fZJQf_7jTHoDPoJYvBFaw3DRjyJ0AdZKRavqf6cIqXwFTytGm6P2TeBmya1FDa9joXxhlBdGVVRQtnq9kKZKpdTuTYAlW6ufwmsL2KJzO09mb-7_DAB8mxKzfB8X7L8Lq83PY0GBXfYB2GMlSVjiO72sLriMF0HVvMrkH8C00-36pmVHulKmXCm6qv5Xc2h6CzGUJxZ-nOP-H7gPKSpA8euGkExmy0oEVbVPjHaEadsUgy8z7hZtqdLB9N_x7Hcn6vrADHIyz4LNTQ-Nj4NrlQrUkNTWXgRl)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

My name is Dr. Ben Carson, and along with my wife, Candy, I have spent years contemplating the challenges facing American families today.

Our new book, _The Perilous Fight_ , addresses these issues head-on, offering practical insights and solutions to restore and strengthen the family unit.

Why is this important? Because the family's pivotal role in our society is under threat, and without addressing these challenges, our foundational values may be lost. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0822272940764a56a1e1ea23c0ed5968&_e=mF17JHEXgHhlc6yRQvoD3Eg2bPk8GtMc4011ffY2uWTcUNO4UCAXGbL-3sD5S5HcHHcXywNdthbTXq9nY3fE-fEVJsQtp71x5EE5XPXmzeP_qqbnJe6YlPM95_5Y3qaAmuQO9edKrYjI1TfS5wWAxxjOIrY4CIr5fZJQf_7jTHoDPoJYvBFaw3DRjyJ0AdZKRavqf6cIqXwFTytGm6P2TeBmya1FDa9joXxhlBdGVVRQtnq9kKZKpdTuTYAlW6ufwmsL2KJzO09mb-7_DAB8mykeQeKZIvb11OKvAjcWd6-lniAxSPdYrv0DBuNx9TFReuDVN1VszF4g0HTNEE5aWIIl1LIaW9ae_kWztsUNoa4bOxhipBocQI1FdLIBt1DbRpI63LBqmvynKPAIxLWuWb4cqA0G7MeaTyd7aArnT-Uj7luiB8WbTzbDIg4bdbBN) In _The Perilous Fight_ , we dive deep into the social and economic pressures that families face, dissect the erosion of traditional values, and present actionable steps for rebuilding familial bonds. This book isn't just a series of observations; it's a roadmap to a healthier, more stable society through strong family units.

**[**As someone committed to the promotion of truth and values, I am offering to send you my new book _"The Perilous Fight" with_ a gift of $45 or more.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0822272940764a56a1e1ea23c0ed5968&_e=mF17JHEXgHhlc6yRQvoD3Eg2bPk8GtMc4011ffY2uWTcUNO4UCAXGbL-3sD5S5HcHHcXywNdthbTXq9nY3fE-fEVJsQtp71x5EE5XPXmzeP_qqbnJe6YlPM95_5Y3qaAmuQO9edKrYjI1TfS5wWAxxjOIrY4CIr5fZJQf_7jTHoDPoJYvBFaw3DRjyJ0AdZKRavqf6cIqXwFTytGm6P2TeBmya1FDa9joXxhlBdGVVRQtnq9kKZKpdTuTYAlW6ufwmsL2KJzO09mb-7_DAB8m9W9LNnWdghgpw6xjY21Oi2mvEUbvOsFMPlL1MhoX5K_g_U5UByV4KnbGsP5o71oxaTHXl5VosMCYH-aiTian-pD_E1jtcWH1Z-FMTmhg2vl7TYbweiTkjXu8IiKZ_N6merdg58gBzrQtfwJoX1pcSJnlRgofQYfKktKj1yW6Sm0)** _The Perilous Fight _with allow you to:
* Understand the current challenges American families face;

* Discover actionable steps to strengthen your family and community; and

* Be part of a broader effort to uphold traditional values and promote societal stability

The American Cornerstone Institute is devoted to advancing faith, liberty, community, and life. By making a gift, you are taking a crucial step towards healing our nation, starting at its very heart--the family.

[Click here to make your gift of $45 or more and receive your own copy of _The Perilous Fight_ now and join us in the mission to strengthen American families.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0822272940764a56a1e1ea23c0ed5968&_e=mF17JHEXgHhlc6yRQvoD3Eg2bPk8GtMc4011ffY2uWTcUNO4UCAXGbL-3sD5S5HcHHcXywNdthbTXq9nY3fE-fEVJsQtp71x5EE5XPXmzeP_qqbnJe6YlPM95_5Y3qaAmuQO9edKrYjI1TfS5wWAxxjOIrY4CIr5fZJQf_7jTHoDPoJYvBFaw3DRjyJ0AdZKRavqf6cIqXwFTytGm6P2TeBmya1FDa9joXxhlBdGVVRQtnq9kKZKpdTuTYAlW6ufwmsL2KJzO09mb-7_DAB8mxyX8N-fmrQmlGMO6cS0qlZsF3a5YUrmHCL2uuNXSomk-k73GFjYwvGANBWl6rXuuUe71HXveCY5DzxVnDViRrSs3-oPm13pqt4lG550vrcZEMl2EbrLhz_QGR4b736M01nJ9SkOYa3EUtt2Zw6H0T-ne1GhqtdB12q_tUviECNd)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Aditya Pai from Pai's Politics
subject: 10 quick reactions to tonight's result
body:
Trump wins and the Senate flips. House majority or not, Democrats must now learn a crucial lesson: live in reality and respect the voters - even if legacy media doesn't.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..GMZe9If4xFoPC4rZhpdOENnJ2oGrTljczyZPb_Sq8WE?) for more
---
# [10 quick reactions to tonight's result](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=151253864&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjUzODY0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzA4OTMwMDYsImV4cCI6MTczMzQ4NTAwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.VdCm8EM7V1tSj6Yd3gAI6HvDFsB1XDwTxHHqmADxt8o)
### Trump wins and the Senate flips. House majority or not, Democrats must now learn a crucial lesson: live in reality and respect the voters - even if legacy media doesn't.
| | [Aditya Pai](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---
| Nov 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@adityapai)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=151253864&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjUzODY0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMDg5MzAwNiwiZXhwIjoxNzMzNDg1MDA2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTExNzMwIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.GpWQZJ7_0sLvjZOkgQ84EqSYwqg1bCMBeiIA5_lnOKM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=151253864&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjUzODY0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzA4OTMwMDYsImV4cCI6MTczMzQ4NTAwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.VdCm8EM7V1tSj6Yd3gAI6HvDFsB1XDwTxHHqmADxt8o&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=111730&post_id=151253864&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjUzODY0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzA4OTMwMDYsImV4cCI6MTczMzQ4NTAwNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMTczMCIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.VdCm8EM7V1tSj6Yd3gAI6HvDFsB1XDwTxHHqmADxt8o)
---
| | [](https://substack..Nysespa6wW_nlktH5Q-oEVYk0EG35Yq4ITEwegudmSU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paipolitics/p/10-quick-reactions-to-tonights-result?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
### **1\. If Trump wins, this is a victory for POPULISM -**_**a diverse coalition**_**of Trump, Vance, RFK jr., Tulsi, Vivek, Elon Musk, Joe Rogan et al -- not conservatism. **
_See_ ICYMI, [The presidential race is about populism vs. the establishment, not D vs. R.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/27aeb940-2ad1-4d66-b697-21e474d296e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Trump is a former Democrat, not a conservative. Just ask Romney or Cheney.
* RFKJ, Tulsi, Elon are former Democrats; DNC corruption drove them to Trump.
* J.D. Vance was a never Trumper -- and probably still is. He likes Trump's _policies_.
* Joe Rogan was a Bernie bro -- and probably still is. He likes Trump's _independence_.

[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f9e958c5-0e7a-40c3-aa9a-e44c9822ae2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_Arizona Republican Party billboard, Sept. 19, 2024._
**Democrats ran an empty establishment suit in an obviously populist moment -- not just here in America, but around the world.**
_**Of course she 's losing. **_
We did not listen to the customers.
We scolded, dismissed, and condescended to them.
[The NY suburbs might yet save the House.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/36b43696-a9c5-43a0-8b8b-2581320227df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If we lose the rest, it should surprise no one.
### **2a. It 's (still) "the economy, stupid."**
_See_ ICYMI, [The Occam's Razor Election](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/df103686-899f-4f8f-8fe6-6ddc21b3ba5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [13 days](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/39b38206-58bc-4017-82d7-9bcf1e128d00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **2b. Republicans now have a better claim to being the party of the working class; Democrats have become the party of the college-educated, white collar urbans/suburbans.**
This is not news to anyone paying attention...which means it's news to CNN.
It should concern every single Democrat, but _especially_ labor leaders, that so many rank-and-file union members of every race voted for Trump.
Two helpful books on this:
_**Patrick Ruffini**_ -- [Party of the People: Inside the Multiracial Populist Coalition Remaking the GOP](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cf02b248-9c2c-484c-8c59-e25de57c6f30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**Ruy Teixeira -- **_[Where Have All the Democrats Gone?: The Soul of the Party in the Age of Extremes](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/261f80d4-76ca-41c5-aca6-bbfe3d337746?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And a related interview to understand what happened today:
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b5ad6b7a-f4d2-4333-82b8-5d4e75f39fc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### 3\. Kamala Harris was never a competent candidate and didn't do the obvious things she _had to_ do to win.
_See ICYMI,_ [MEMO: 3 strategic adjustments would help VP Harris beat Trump](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/893a4b21-15ce-46be-8d0d-2ac43cbb91e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- it suggests a set of totally Captain Obvious things that Harris never did:

**(1) Stop talking about fascism and start talking about feminism.**

**(2) ORANGE MAN BAD is not a winning strategy. Tell us why YOU want to be president.**

**(3) Focus on the economy -- and distinguish the Harris vision from the Biden record.**
### **4\. Race and gender hurt Harris in the general. Race and gender also made her vice president. Both are wrong.**
_See ICYMI_ , [The case for reality](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/39fcb5e6-6943-4883-b775-1f0d46fda296?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and why [American deserves better.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/52dcb8e1-a84c-45ec-a1be-b96cba0d720b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **5\. Woke race ideology is a electoral loser.**
My first post here was [In Defense of Caitlin Clark](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a6f69a58-3ea2-4ab8-849c-2a36d715cd83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for a reason: her objective excellence in a sport I _love_ , juxtaposed against the subjective treatment she gets simply for being white, alerted me to the insanity of the academic/Very Online left.
Now, I see: universities, Hollywood, big corporates, and legacy media are infected by an _obsession_ with race and racial identity.
It's lovely to be woke in the OG sense of that word: alert to injustice. That's why I went to law school and spent my time there studying poverty and doing civil legal aid.
**But if woke means** _**the color of your skin is the most important thing about you and must be noticed and talked about at all times**_**, well, I 'm getting the fuck off that crazy train -- and so are most Americans.**
Kamala ran from wokeness, but there were enough clips from 2019 to tie her to its absolutely decadent idiocy.
### 6\. Woke gender ideology is an electoral loser**.**
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/69262fa6-05d7-4f22-b925-d75a7293657b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_French philosopher Albert Camus and actress Maria Casares, at the start of their relationship -- now a viral Gen Z meme._
**a. Feminism is perfectly compatible with traditional masculinity. Wokeism is not.**
Yes, most women care a lot about reproductive rights. Most Americans are supportive of trans rights. And sure, per HBO's _Euphoria,_ gender may indeed be somewhat fluid.
But SEX and GENDER are _not_ the same thing.
And is quite impossible to own the mantle of feminism when you [can't define what a woman is.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a7434415-90d6-4ca1-975b-8a551806767a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Or what a man is, for that matter.
**b. There 's more to sex equality than abortion rights.**
Surely, I'm not the best spokesperson for this truth. But it's worth saying anyway: what happened to [eliminating the gender pay gap? Fixing child care?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3c686580-6761-42b6-aa3d-bfcf33922341?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Protecting female-only spaces like sports and women's liberal arts schools such as Scripps and Wellesley, which launched a confident 21-year-old Hillary Rodham into the world?
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/91767053-8c2c-408c-941d-63fbdf7992dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Reproductive freedom is paramount: if women cannot control their pregnancies, they cannot control their lives.
But that is only _one part_ of a broader vision of female empowerment Democrats have failed to articulate.
**c. The boys are not alright, in part because they 're not being allowed to become **_**men**_**.**
[Young men today are struggling](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9d08e5d8-a3cb-46ba-a1fd-d5519cd95d91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in part because of our confused discourse and poor leadership on gender.
In particular, it's now clear that the daily scrutiny of what's wrong with masculinity, without a celebration of all that is right with it, has taken a serious toll.
Some men _love_ being masculine. We are willing to confront its 'toxic' downsides: sexual violence, crime, misogyny, etc. But _only if_ we are also rewarded for its major upsides: fighting America's wars, building our roads and bridges, and in most families, for better or for worse, providing for spouses and children.
The left must respect masculinity and femininity as _sexes_ -- not just as genders.
Until we do, we're out of touch with most Americans.
**America** _**will**_**elect a woman president, even a feminist woman. But not a woke one.**
### **7\. Prosecuting Trump elected him.**
I've tried to warn my lefty lawyer friends, in particular, that going after Trump for things Bill Clinton _clearly_ got away with would be [a conviction Democrats will probably come to regret](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/83fb3906-3836-4c2a-9aa8-83985632c0a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and reflected a wider [abuse of prosecutorial discretion](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8274876c-06b1-4819-9e35-b2a359fb0bc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of which Trump is only the most prominent -- and now profitable -- victim.
DeSantis was beating Trump by 23 points at the start of the GOP primary.........
Then, Trump got indicted.
And the rest, it seems, will be history.
Democratic leaders made a martyr of Trump by prosecuting and persecuting him with _tortured_ interpretations of the law, at best, and Banana Republic witch hunts, at worst.
What we should have been doing is cleaning house, putting Biden out to pasture, and holding a presidential primary.
### **8\. Rigging primaries in 2016 for Hillary and 2024 for Biden/Kamala is an electoral loser.**
Party primaries exist for a reason: to figure out what voters want and battle-test a nominee who can win the general.
Say what you want about Trump, but he won two competitive RNC primaries.
The DNC, by contrast, _[cancelled](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3751faa3-f8eb-4ef8-b9d7-b8bd74fcc945?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ primaries](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3751faa3-f8eb-4ef8-b9d7-b8bd74fcc945?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to protect a president who probably has dementia -- aka ["Operation Bubble Wrap"](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9a12308f-a186-47c6-83b9-3e27fd7f72bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- and then anointed as his successor a vice president who got 0 votes and finished almost dead last in the 2019 primary, behind Andrew Yang.
Iron sharpens iron.
Competition is good for everyone.
And if 'democracy is on the ballot,' then you have to let me vote.
### **9a. Democrats are a threat to democracy, too. Voters see this. The DNC, apparently, does not.**
_See_ ICYMI, [The dual threat to democracy.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d8fb03f7-b1b1-4a6a-8b2a-48f56a15ea43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### 9b. The legacy media is a threat to democracy -- and the best friend Trump has _ever_ had.
There are some early signs that the legacy media's [comically biased ABC debate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6b769b18-f84c-4502-b5c5-ad75ca712759?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), brutal scrutiny of Vance, and frequent [misrepresentation](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c3e67221-1f96-4844-95a1-06d564cb9c36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Trump vs. a 'kid gloves' treatment of Harris and her allies actually drove some voters to Trump.
In particular, national media's failure to cover [credible allegations of assault made against Second Gentleman Doug Emhoff](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/aad05576-6e65-45d3-82c9-d1110121da23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or to press Gov. Walz on his [many lies](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/83d99f6a-476c-4c1a-811b-f96dda7c92c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) lost them a ton of credibility.
So when they turned around and [called Trump a fascist](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3151d4ed-1355-4739-a316-25c75e10e3af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), no one believed them.
### **10\. The best check on Trump is a constitutional renaissance, not an online #resistance.**
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/09298f9e-de8f-4107-8b02-2f9071a059b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_The New Yorker, circa Sept. 2024._
Is it time to [torch the constitution?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6c9f12b2-b9c7-48a6-b6c8-a5da4ce40a19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) No, it's not. It is actually the worst possible time to do that.
The best guardrails on Trump are the timeless ideas of the American founding: federalism, separation of powers, bicameralism, judicial review, civil rights and civil liberties, and [a little section Tim Walz never bothered to read](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c50c0ed1-c5f5-45ed-bb31-2b30ce19fae0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) called the 1st Amendment.
Yes, Trump, Elon, and Vivek might dismantle the administrative state and much of the permanent bureaucracy. That's not in the constitution. So it's a legal and policy debate we have to have.
Beyond that, if you don't like [Project 2025](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d75e3767-a5a2-40c8-b68e-276aafa41af2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), read up on a much deeper and more formidable book called _The Federalist Papers_.
--
America is a truly great country if we allow it to be.
Democracy is a process -- not an outcome -- and the process seems to have worked.
**So I want President-elect Trump to succeed and I pray for his success.**
I agree with his focus on securing the border, growing the economy, and bringing peach through strength without endless wars.
And where I disagree with him, I know my best hope lies the practice of law and the pulpit of politics -- exactly as our founders intended:
> _**" Ambition must be made to counteract ambition. The interest of the man must be connected with the constitutional rights of the place.** It may be a reflection on human nature, that such devices should be necessary to control the abuses of government. But what is government itself, but the greatest of all reflections on human nature? If men were angels, no government would be necessary. If angels were to govern men, neither external nor internal controls on government would be necessary. **In framing a government which is to be administered by men over men, the great difficulty lies in this: you must first enable the government to control the governed; and in the next place oblige it to control itself. "** -_[The Federalist, No. 51.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d2bdc572-37a9-4a84-820b-31e6028f840c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Hillsdale College via American Defense News
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgugkkpjm99qkcg2v4b5pvin68kkj03b7omll130_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji68pb0cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp7r4pjh9rsvipghibturukb4lieu5dp9joo020o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji68pb0cdh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z358oh0cnavhvc4pdfr8um60bvvu9ps4u06sone0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji68pb0cdh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4cp3fag5mam5q715ui07lbdq9qrtmu5qqke9p8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji68pb0cdh2bs)
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztp2l1cluu04ttd3djltpq2uqciutocef4oopp70_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj5cpie9o7246h22sh2s8i6epj0cji68pb0cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpu68dd5jl3qjt0328chm1m2qc24n3dv2uvt9qp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji68pb0cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqk56g6jvo8sb48nlc94r4aakfcc1g0q30gr4p7o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c1ie8p35c1hm49fg)

name: Zach Nunn
subject: We won the Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Iowans For Zach Nunn
body:
A victory for all of us

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document | |
Friend,

Wow - we won the Election!

I couldn't be more thrilled and honored to continue serving as Congressman for the Iowa Third Congressional District.

The past two years were a whirlwind of hard work and dedication, and I'm grateful that faithful grassroots supporters like you were on my team. Together, we knocked on hundreds of doors, rallied supporters, made phone calls, and spread our message far and wide.

We absolutely crushed it on the campaign trail this year, and it's all because of you. Thank you, Friend.

Now, I'm ready to get back to work fighting for America by putting our community first, defending your individual liberties, restoring fiscal discipline, and cutting the red tape in Washington.
_**I 'm honored to continue my mission. Simply put - I'll get it done!**_ | [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znaecanmojpfopq0f86fgju1g8t4prusk71f5jko_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji64ob2chh2bs)
---

Thank you once again for standing by my side, and God bless,

Congressman Zach Nunn

[**DONATE NOW >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z34afoamjn8jsqeb35cd0m583bohcndatga7uu4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji64ob2chh2bs)
