subject: Thank President Biden for his leadership >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Folks, with Election Day behind us, we've reached the beginning of the end of President Biden's Presidency.**

So we’re sending a HUGE Thank you letter to Biden for all of his service to our country.

[**We need 20,000 good Democrats to sign it with us — read below and sign the letter »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84561?t=6&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84561?t=7&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84561?t=8&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD)
---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: Thank you.

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

You capped prices on prescription drugs.

You protected good-paying union jobs.

You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: _You will go down as a truly GREAT American President._

**I respect your decision to step aside from the race, and I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do.**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. It's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84561?t=9&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD) | [20,000 GOOD DEMOCRATS NEEDED: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT END-OF-DAY TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/84561?t=10&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
-The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=17973%2E878179%2EUaGJBD)

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgabr4m264hfcgg1rvlu1ab7cer02fl5i0h93a30_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji6cpj6cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv6m81pqsek67o5pnh4a2uan5d8s6r85bp401o6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji6cpj6cjh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrqa0ie8jcja50a8h3u94ltjvfrkl15qs3imbtio_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji6cpj6cjh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6p74akmlatfti5e39tvg3a1gefod8hgptronvb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji6cpj6cjh2bs)
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: MassGOP
subject: Governor Healey’s Campaign Gambles Leave Massachusetts Behind
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fD_fhumHG08HtcU9jmFTPfRTPdpQa8uo5QkvkTzK8MAFbKPtMdlaqsmIoaVKyzReHJ5gJuTDdE-vdEfi3sYFK6WGYHfNfaTAeJhymfy0W_dzDUsh_JrSrOaYAQvgWBmtz4U-R_yW1uPX28meikp9Pw==&c=G6Bc-mbyXaaV2T86L8TEPCA3FgjbUj1Y6zAYd7dF3r1_LcHICvq_5g==&ch=J_h2f5E5oK5Z21_dUx9n117C4JbePw_qr5QrOpmiSy521xIbWjH1wg==)
---
| Governor Healey's Campaign Gambles Leave Massachusetts Behind
---
---
| BOSTON, MA- As Massachusetts Republicans celebrated historic victories in last night's elections, Governor Maura Healey returned to the Commonwealth with little to show after a campaign season marked by political blunders and missed opportunities for real change. Rather than addressing the urgent issues facing Massachusetts - from the costly migrant crisis to affordability and transparency in government - Governor Healey has spent recent months on the campaign trail, gambling with her political capital only to watch her efforts collapse.
In a historic achievement, Massachusetts Republicans flipped multiple seats in a presidential election year - a feat not seen in over 40 years. MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale commented, "While Republicans have reason to celebrate, Governor Healey has little to show for her time away. Instead of focusing on the pressing issues of the Commonwealth, she chose to campaign in Pennsylvania, supporting Kamala Harris, who ultimately lost her presidential bid. She also headed to New Hampshire, deploying tired and inappropriate attacks against Kelly Ayotte, who subsequently secured a victory as Governor."
Meanwhile, Healey's alignment with the MassGOP on Ballot Question 2, which impacts Massachusetts students, was half-hearted at best. In the critical final days of the election cycle, she was conspicuously absent from the conversation, leaving students and parents without a strong advocate. Additionally, Healey's silence on the psychedelics question, which was soundly defeated, only underscores her disconnect with the voters on key issues.
Adding to the list of concerning developments, it was announced that October's revenue collections fell $86 million short of projections - yet another indicator of the Healey-Driscoll Administration's mismanagement. "Governor Healey, along with the Democratic supermajority, is failing the Commonwealth," said Carnevale. "Her inaction on the migrant crisis has led to skyrocketing costs, her administration's relentless push for new taxes and strict regulations is driving residents out, and her refusal to bring transparency to her office has made her the least accessible governor in the country."
Massachusetts deserves a Governor who prioritizes the needs of residents over political ambitions, and in 2026, the MassGOP stands ready to provide a strong alternative to Maura Healey. The people of Massachusetts deserve better.
###
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Governor Healey's Campaign Gambles Leave Massachusetts Behind | BOSTON, MA- As Massachusetts Republicans celebrated historic victories in last night's elections, Governor Maura Healey returned to the Commonwealth with little to show after a campaign season marked by political blunders and missed opportunities for real change. Rather than addressing the urgent issues facing Massachusetts - from the costly migrant crisis to affordability and transparency in government - Governor Healey has spent recent months on the campaign trail, gambling with her political capital only to watch her efforts collapse. In a historic achievement, Massachusetts Republicans flipped multiple seats in a presidential election year - a feat not seen in over 40 years. MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale commented, "While Republicans have reason to celebrate, Governor Healey has little to show for her time away. Instead of focusing on the pressing issues of the Commonwealth, she chose to campaign in Pennsylvania, supporting Kamala Harris, who ultimately lost her presidential bid. She also headed to New Hampshire, deploying tired and inappropriate attacks against Kelly Ayotte, who subsequently secured a victory as Governor." Meanwhile, Healey's alignment with the MassGOP on Ballot Question 2, which impacts Massachusetts students, was half-hearted at best. In the critical final days of the election cycle, she was conspicuously absent from the conversation, leaving students and parents without a strong advocate. Additionally, Healey's silence on the psychedelics question, which was soundly defeated, only underscores her disconnect with the voters on key issues. Adding to the list of concerning developments, it was announced that October's revenue collections fell $86 million short of projections - yet another indicator of the Healey-Driscoll Administration's mismanagement. "Governor Healey, along with the Democratic supermajority, is failing the Commonwealth," said Carnevale. "Her inaction on the migrant crisis has led to skyrocketing costs, her administration's relentless push for new taxes and strict regulations is driving residents out, and her refusal to bring transparency to her office has made her the least accessible governor in the country." Massachusetts deserves a Governor who prioritizes the needs of residents over political ambitions, and in 2026, the MassGOP stands ready to provide a strong alternative to Maura Healey. The people of Massachusetts deserve better. | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbhatokh0kubisos5sgmcqunpe3mti08sion2mm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji62oj4c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zncpkq7vj141s20eb1tci8hqrukfk7fiaaqv8cno_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji62oj4c1h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9u85vfbfnm6sd8tgeh8ermlhg5umith2kuif9qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji62oj4c1h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zso5pc2pqoh7u6df60ndpfgbrnb4b33tr78641lo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji62oj4c1h2bs)
---
| |

name: Save the Children
subject: Check out this powerful photo essay of images captured by Syrian children
body:
Open to view the powerful images.
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://click.alerts.savethechildren.org/?qs=4cf9328672b250d1b7cc9b954e429a9751b64d821b3a840ea06d927f4b31df7d6400721c7a5dae2ce607982848cca820c81219b87c6b30eed65268b75d375f64)
---
| | | | [](https://click.alerts.savethechildren.org/?qs=4cf9328672b250d1989a45f0580c9fad87ec4df726123af0d5d1939c0f275c417f090bddab0eb5ddb30581472449b50da2eaffa84f6434f35f2523d238ba8ff0)
---
| | | When conflict strikes, it tends to be most devastating for the least responsible - a nation's children.

Nowhere is this clearer than in Syria. After over a decade of war, more than half of the country's kids have seen their childhood consumed by violence, fear and uncertainty. **Last year, the situation became even more dire when multiple 7+ magnitude earthquakes struck the T urkiye-Syria border, displacing many Syrian children for the second or third time.**

But children are remarkably resilient. And thanks to the generosity of champions for children like you, we're working to help Syrian children confront their grief, address their trauma and begin to recover from their harrowing experiences. Since the earthquakes, we've helped many of them take photos that capture their environment and share their experiences with the rest of the world.

**[Today, we're honored to share their photos and their words with you in this child-led photography exhibit: Click here to view "Out of the Rubble: Earthquakes, conflict and destruction through the eyes of Syria's children."](https://click.alerts.savethechildren.org/?qs=4cf9328672b250d19b86f61057f983f49a8d6bdd26999e302bffc34b1c79b9eb6042c30c0b6262b7b256d0475d68100c027db45d362bd1932c91424e6372a3b8)**
---
| | | | [](https://click.alerts.savethechildren.org/?qs=4cf9328672b250d1989a45f0580c9fad87ec4df726123af0d5d1939c0f275c417f090bddab0eb5ddb30581472449b50da2eaffa84f6434f35f2523d238ba8ff0)
---
| | | Thank you for taking the time to learn more about the experiences of Syria's children - and for everything you do to support and uplift children around the world.

Save the Children

| | | | |

Save the Children | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|--- (C) 2024 Save the Children Federation, Inc. 501 Kings Highway East, Suite 400 Fairfield, CT 06825 1-800-728-3843 Photo: Save the Children __

name: Sen. Marco Rubio
subject: WE DID IT, FRIEND!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
2024! 47! 47!!

| |
---
| | | Last night, we made history. We shocked the legacy media and showed the world that we _**WILL NOT**_ be divided.

Not only that, but we are building a political movement focused on putting Americans first. We won't allow the radical left to divide us anymore because we are, above everything else, **[AMERICANS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbk3nba4ffth6sk1q970hi064m3jmuemital7p1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji66o30cth2bs "AMERICANS!")**
---
| | [CHIP IN TO SUPPORT AMERICA >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8c2goi6rerf5s27o2p0nuq6j9q9k9ql3evc3310_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji66o30cth2bs "CHIP IN TO SUPPORT AMERICA")
---
We proved that when we come together, united by our shared values and love for this great nation, there is nothing we can't achieve.

We showed the doubters and naysayers that we _**WILL NOT**_ be deterred by their attempts to tear us apart.

**This election was about the future of our country --** what we want to leave our children and grandchildren. **[Last night, we said loud and clear: We want to be a country with secure borders, safe communities, good jobs, and low prices.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3sk98fe9vklp18j8pcs4qsq42i9tcff9gavalv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji66o30cth2bs "Last night, we said loud and clear: We want to be a country with secure borders, safe communities, good jobs, and low prices.")**

---
I am honored that you, the people of the United States of America, have chosen President Donald J. Trump to restore our country to its greatness. **[We promise to work tirelessly to ensure that our state and nation remain a land of freedom, prosperity, and opportunity for all.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqh5ie9schkfsfgnqnq0ehe85mptdkt4c9lipb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0cji66o30cth2bs "We promise to work tirelessly to ensure that our state and nation remain a land of freedom, prosperity, and opportunity for all.")**

Thank you for your support, your hard work, and your trust. We did this together, and now it is time to get to work saving this great nation.

\- Marco Rubio

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This race, and its stakes, are higher than ever.
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1dbe1f17-40c8-4bd9-b730-120ab4dbc3bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Here's where things stand, Peter: Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes. We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: [Please, will you split $10 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T208ef123-1c9c-449f-b49f-ce8d809d2580/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3d30d57-cb46-4066-8027-8d1bc56a4ce1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win. [So please, Peter, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment: Split $10 or more right now to help my campaign get across the finish line.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8724bcaa-9b93-41e6-819b-86a6d3e1faf4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10 →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdcfa5c31-c17a-43c7-8d2c-64e71879a159/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | Thank you so much. Jacky
---
| | |

| | |

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: History Facts
subject: This is the oldest photo of a U.S. president
body:
On March 8 and 16 of 1843, former U.S. president and then-congressman John Quincy Adams trudged to the Washington, D.C., studio of Philip Haas to sit for a portrait of his likeness. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68be9c9z9l9syg7179urz0m5e7loi7icsyewep4r173rea18z6ivp5f6es13irydh2idkzllizsgfd7me4eafqy36ldyd1no8ryncm8d3nqmteomd61ctau5fsk9tqbydyrc8m491g56p3ltb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [The oldest photo of a U.S. president is of John Quincy Adams.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O n March 8 and 16 of 1843, former U.S. president and then-congressman John Quincy Adams trudged to the Washington, D.C., studio of Philip Haas to sit for a portrait of his likeness. Portraiture of wealthy and esteemed individuals was nothing new, but these particular visits involved the novel technology of the daguerreotype, an early form of photography in which the exposure of light on a copper plate coated with silver iodine and treated with a salt solution produced images that proved spellbounding to people of the era.
---
This wasn't the first time the venerable congressman had posed for a photo: During a trip to Boston the previous September, he paid a visit to the studio of John Plumbe, though he [struggled](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to stay awake during the hour-and-a-half session. Fortunately, the March 1843 experiences were more fruitful for both the sitter and photographer. Adams' March 8 diary entry reflects his amazement of the process, which he [described](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) as "yet altogether incomprehensible to me... It would seem as easy to stamp a fixed portrait from the reflection of a mirror; but how wonderful would that reflection itself be, if we were not familiarised to it from childhood." Returning the following week, Adams interrupted the session of fellow congressman Horace Everett to have his photo taken again. He later gave one of the resulting daguerreotypes to Everett, perhaps as a token of appreciation for allowing him to cut the line; it remained hidden from the public until being [unearthed](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in the 1990s, and today sits in the National Portrait Gallery as the [oldest](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) surviving photo of a U.S. president.
It's worth noting that Adams was not the first president to be photographed; that honor goes to William Henry Harrison, who sat for a daguerreotype shortly after his inauguration in March 1841, although that image has been lost to history. And as the Adams administration had been over for more than a decade by the time the former president posed for Haas, it is also not the oldest photo of a sitting U.S. president. That distinction belongs to James K. Polk, who posed for his piece of history in the White House in 1849.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Samuel Morse helped popularize photography in America.
Although he's primarily remembered for his work with the electric telegraph, Samuel Morse was also an accomplished painter, and he was intrigued by the visual and commercial possibilities of the medium of photography. Upon learning of the invention of the daguerreotype in early 1839, Morse visited its French inventor, Louis-Jacques-Mandé Daguerre, to see this new contraption for himself. His description of the experience, the first firsthand account of the technology to appear in America, was [published](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=smj6t1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in the _New-York Observer_ in April 1839, and soon reprinted in newspapers in Philadelphia, Boston, and New Orleans. The following spring, Morse teamed with a colleague to open New York City's second portrait studio; along with capturing images of wealthy clients, Morse taught the process to students that included famed Civil War photographer Mathew Brady. Although he ultimately turned his attention back to the telegraph, Morse's early interest in the camera and its ability to produce startling lifelike images helped spread the gospel of photography in America.

name: Trey
subject: Concession Statement from Trey Hunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trey Hunt for U
body:
|

|

|

|

|

|

[Fort Worth, 05 Nov 2024] – Today, I acknowledge the results of this election and remain firm in my belief that the missed opportunity to win Texas’s 12th Congressional seat is a consequence of Gilberto Hinojosa and the Democratic National Committee’s lack of meaningful investment in purple counties like Tarrant County, Texas. The consistent absence of support from the broader party apparatus has limited our progress in Texas politics and contributed to underperformance when real change was within reach. I appreciate the efforts and diligence of Parker and Tarrant counties parties to move the needle.

|

|

|

After significant personal sacrifice, including exhausting my savings, missing time with my son, and postponing plans to expand my family, I have decided not to pursue a Congressional seat in the foreseeable future. I entered this race in the hope that state party and national Democratic leadership would make a real commitment to moving the needle in CD-12, but without adequate support, I am refocusing on my family, completing my Ph.D. in Experimental Psychology, and building the resources necessary to invest in future North Texas candidates—particularly those brave enough to seek the CD-12 seat.

|

|

|

In the meantime, I will continue contributing to our local progress through volunteering. I am also developing a mobile app, an engaging educational tool designed to raise awareness about wealth inequality and its effects on our economic and social challenges. I encourage the constituents of CD-12 and others across the nation to follow my updates on social media and my website, TreyOnTheHunt.com, where they’ll be able to offer feedback when the app is released.

Thank you for your continued support and commitment to the future of Texas and our nation.

|

|

|

|

|

|

[**We will not stop defending you and the people you love.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96663604/510765064/2141984067?sourceid=1150017&utm_campaign=25emage-1101aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGZlNzhjMC00MzljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e471HaRVA2j0l9DmJ3rZoYs1AUKgFsXYaWJIWxLmU5o=&emci=dc140059-b09b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=04fe78c0-439c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237) Peter,

Today we share the heaviness of this loss and a profound concern for what lies ahead for our democracy, the rule of law, and a range of our rights—especially reproductive rights.

We all know that Donald Trump's re-election is a grave threat to reproductive freedom: anti-abortion policies jeopardize and endanger lives every day, in every community. It's not an exaggeration—it's the Trump administration's promise, and it's unfortunately familiar territory.

[**We're ready to go head-to-head with anti-abortion extremists, and we need you with us today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96663605/510765065/2141984067?sourceid=1150017&utm_campaign=25emage-1101aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGZlNzhjMC00MzljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e471HaRVA2j0l9DmJ3rZoYs1AUKgFsXYaWJIWxLmU5o=&emci=dc140059-b09b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=04fe78c0-439c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237) | [**FUND EMERGENCY ACTION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96663606/510765066/2141984067?sourceid=1150017&utm_campaign=25emage-1101aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGZlNzhjMC00MzljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e471HaRVA2j0l9DmJ3rZoYs1AUKgFsXYaWJIWxLmU5o=&emci=dc140059-b09b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=04fe78c0-439c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237 "FUND EMERGENCY ACTION")

**Our team of lawyers, advocates, and our broad coalition of allies are already preparing to do what we do best:**
* Challenge harmful government actions in court to protect access to care
* Track and counter harmful policies and appointments that put health at risk
* Defend patients, helpers, and providers facing investigations or prosecution
* Protect interstate travel rights and shield laws

[**WE NEED YOUR HELP**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96663607/510765067/2141984067?sourceid=1150017&utm_campaign=25emage-1101aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGZlNzhjMC00MzljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e471HaRVA2j0l9DmJ3rZoYs1AUKgFsXYaWJIWxLmU5o=&emci=dc140059-b09b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=04fe78c0-439c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237 "WE NEED YOUR HELP")

We know the road ahead is a hard one, but today we're taking solace in what we know right now: **the American people support reproductive freedom.** Yesterday, voters in 7 more states reaffirmed their commitment to abortion access. That's 11 state constitutions amended and 3 restrictive initiatives defeated since _Roe_ was overturned—and we have no intention of slowing down.

[**Trust us when we say this fight is far from over. With every case we bring, and every brave client we represent, we are one step closer to safeguarding reproductive freedom for all. Can we count on your support?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96663608/510765068/2141984067?sourceid=1150017&utm_campaign=25emage-1101aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=election&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGZlNzhjMC00MzljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e471HaRVA2j0l9DmJ3rZoYs1AUKgFsXYaWJIWxLmU5o=&emci=dc140059-b09b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=04fe78c0-439c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=954237)

clean_body: We're taking on Trump's agenda—will you join us? | | | ---|--- Peter, Today we share the heaviness of this loss and a profound concern for what lies ahead for our democracy, the rule of law, and a range of our rights—especially reproductive rights. We all know that Donald Trump's re-election is a grave threat to reproductive freedom: anti-abortion policies jeopardize and endanger lives every day, in every community. It's not an exaggeration—it's the Trump administration's promise, and it's unfortunately familiar territory. | "FUND EMERGENCY ACTION" Our team of lawyers, advocates, and our broad coalition of allies are already preparing to do what we do best: Challenge harmful government actions in court to protect access to care Track and counter harmful policies and appointments that put health at risk Defend patients, helpers, and providers facing investigations or prosecution Protect interstate travel rights and shield laws "WE NEED YOUR HELP" We know the road ahead is a hard one, but today we're taking solace in what we know right now: the American people support reproductive freedom. Yesterday, voters in 7 more states reaffirmed their commitment to abortion access. That's 11 state constitutions amended and 3 restrictive initiatives defeated since Roe was overturned—and we have no intention of slowing down. Together, Center for Reproductive Rights P.S. Join us for a call TOMORROW, November 7, as we discuss the fight ahead for reproductive rights in the U.S. "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. **For almost a decade, the country has been screaming at the top of their lungs that they despise The Swamp. With President Trump's overwhelming victory last night, their voices are now a mandate for strong, unapologetic government reforms. The State Freedom Caucus Network is ready to work with President Trump to help reduce the size and scope of the federal government and return our rights back to the 50 states where they belong.**
- **Andrew Roth, President**

name: Gov. Phil Scott
subject: Thank you, Vermont!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Scott for Vermont
body:
We did it, together! |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f800ac3f49&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| What we achieved last night in Vermont was historic, and we could not have done it without your continued support.

Here in Vermont, the election was about one basic question: Can you, your aging parents, your grandparents, your kids, your grandkids, and your neighbors afford to live and thrive in Vermont if we don’t make a course correction on the path set by legislative leaders over the last two years? The answer was clear, because yesterday, Vermonters voted and sent a strong message: They voted overwhelmingly for balance, and they voted for moderation.

They told us they can’t afford the direction we’ve been going. And they want lawmakers to set clear priorities focused on the needs of all working families, small business owners, and communities large and small.

I’m sure it comes as no surprise that making Vermont more affordable will be a top priority. And I’m very pleased to have more moderate, commonsense legislators who will be willing to work with me on this goal.

Over the last two years, I’ve heard from many, many Vermonters from all walks of life and all political parties who no longer feel like they can afford to live here.

They’re struggling to get by, and they’re worried about their future.

So, to each and every one of you, I want you to know, I hear you, and I hope legislative leaders heard you too.

Just as I have for the last eight years, I will use every tool I have to make sure the message Vermonters sent tonight is brought into the State House next year.

Because we cannot continue to spend more than Vermonters can afford.

To all the candidates across the state who were successful last night: Congratulations. And it’s okay to take a few days to celebrate. You’ve worked hard.

But this isn’t the time to spike the football because our challenges are too great and we need to get to work to address the cost of living, fix the structural problems in our education system, enhance public safety, focus on real housing solutions, not band aids, and to stop pushing the county economic centers in the rural areas of Vermont further behind.

Tackling each of these challenges will take a lot of work, creative ideas from all sides, the courage to make hard decisions and compromise.

So, here’s my commitment to you: I’ll always be willing to come to the table, put party labels aside, and work with anyone to make Vermont a better, more affordable place to live.

And here’s my ask to lawmakers: While you were elected with an “R” or a “D” next to your name, when we arrive in Montpelier in January, we need to put that aside because at the end of the day, we’re all on Team Vermont.

All I’m asking lawmakers of both parties is to always vote in the best interest of your communities, not your committee. And for the people you represent, not your party leadership.

Believe me, I know it’s not easy to cross party lines. I’ve been doing it my whole political life.

But at the end of the day, character and integrity are what you’ll be remembered for.

Doing what you believe is right, even if there are political ramifications within your own party is always the right thing to do.

I also want to talk a bit about the state of politics across the country.

We simply can’t go on like this for much longer. I’ve always believed most Vermonters, and most Americans, are somewhere in the political middle.

Sometimes our voices are just drowned out by the extremes of both parties.

It’s up to us to change that. And I think yesterday’s results in Vermont show we can once again set the example and put party labels aside to do what’s best for our state and our nation.

The fact is, our democracy can’t thrive if both sides believe the other side is the enemy.

Most Americans are good people who are just trying to do what they think is best for their families and their communities.

We can’t look at each other just through the lens of politics. We need to look at each other as people first.

That’s what I think most Americans want. That’s how I’ll continue to lead, and that’s the example we should all set for our kids.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart for once again placing your trust in me.

I’ll always do the best I can for you.

\- Governor Phil Scott

---

It’s up to us to change that. And I think yesterday’s results in Vermont show we can once again set the example and put party labels aside to do what’s best for our state and our nation. The fact is, our democracy can’t thrive if both sides believe the other side is the enemy. Most Americans are good people who are just trying to do what they think is best for their families and their communities. We can’t look at each other just through the lens of politics. We need to look at each other as people first. That’s what I think most Americans want. That’s how I’ll continue to lead, and that’s the example we should all set for our kids. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for once again placing your trust in me. I’ll always do the best I can for you. \- Governor Phil Scott | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Phil Scott for Vermont P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

Today, November 6, 2024, I am announcing my candidacy for the U.S. House of Representatives in New York's 21st Congressional District.
I thank the many supporters, volunteers, group, town, and county chairs for their efforts in the 2024 race. You inspire me and you hold me accountable. Together, we can continue the work we began and move with intention toward the goal of electing a Democrat to represent the North Country in 2026.
I look forward to the journey ahead.
Sincerely,
Paula Collins, Candidate for U.S. House of Representatives, New York's 21st Congressional District
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: A Message of Reflection and Hope
body:
| | | | | |
---
# **A Message of Reflection and Hope**
---
| | | | Hello folks, This is not the message I was hoping to write to you today. Last night was a wake-up call for us, and we are looking at a very difficult couple of years for our country. The blame game has already started. That is the nature of DC politics, but that is also why we lost. DC politics dominated this election cycle, and it is the furthest thing from what Americans across the country are concerned with. I do not want this message to be filled with excuses and resentment; we lost, and now we have to own it. I know many are angry—you donated, you supported, and we didn’t deliver. We will do better, we will gather the information, we will learn from our mistakes, and we will continue to fight on. Our Vice President stepped into one of the toughest battles in political history, launching a presidential race on an accelerated timeline. Unlike Trump, who had years to prepare and consolidate support, she had mere months to rally the country. In the next couple of days, staffers across the country, including us at No Dem Left Behind, need to regroup. We need some rest. You need to regroup, and we all need to prepare ourselves for what is to come. I won’t lie to you—it’s going to be hard. If we go at it alone, we will be crushed, but if unity gives us a fighting chance—and we have shown in the past that it’s all we need—then America will soon remember why they disliked Trump so much. When that time comes, we need to be prepared to provide the country with an alternative path forward. This starts with going back to our roots and winning back Rural America. No Dem Left Behind is proud to be one of the leading organizations in the Democratic Party that caters to rural America. We do this exclusively backed by grassroots supporters like you, and for that, we thank you. We are going to be offline for the next couple of days. When we come back, we will have a lot to share with you. Please stay tuned, and please remember—we have survived one Trump MAGA presidency, and we will do it again. In solidarity, Hassan
---
|
---
| | | | |
---

name: Victoria Spartz
subject: Thank You!!!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/spartzforcongress/must_govern_now?e=57d5bacdc3)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

Last night, the American people sent a resounding message that they are tired of lawlessness, radicalism, elitism, identity politics, open borders, failed economic policies, and a government that is not serving them. I am very honored and humbled to have the support of my fellow Hoosiers and will do my part to make my party deliver on our promises. We MUST govern! May God bless our great Republic!

Thank you so much!
Victoria

name: Laurel & Weston Imer
subject: We were victorious!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Team Imer PAC and is not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee
body:
Our President, Donald J. Trump has retaken the White House, We did it! ...
| | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RCM0jIhE3IsMmDeRV3E_o3j747s0G39lDWiiihO7rrVOlxPWsN9uXxGX4xi440m4u_BI1M5wECdlEuSx0EULLShHVA3Nmxs8Hbp1-Y9N4rK-qzdt8_zlNCwxPuigHTuaMxqtCyXZdNISrhj_ALbZbA==&c=deq3602Vr1ZXKNKRq6C7_lzFWManGCnC6ekqVj07uGiT_iubxomB8A==&ch=FG6e_rebNUUolRqqen1eZ9HWooXM0jPRV-8ZjQd1ZotSXt4GFruyUw==)
---
---
| Friend, What a night! We watched on last night from Baldoria On the Water as President Donald J. Trump re-took the White House, and our mission to Make America Great Again was victorious.
It is time for President Trump to lead our great country into its "Golden Age," and we are proud to stand with him.
Over the last two weeks, as we launched the Team Imer PAC, we chased over 2000+ ballots across Jefferson and Custer County, and campaigns that we were proud to support chased tens of thousands more in Denver and other areas.
Last night, at our Victory Party at Baldoria On the Water, we were thrilled to be joined by dozens of Generation Z attendees, many of whom were first-time voters in this election. They all shared our passion for Making America Great again.
Many of these Gen Z attendees are pictured below.
---
---
| Here at Team Imer, we are committed to this fight to Make America Great Again and continue to increase the gains we have made in Generation Z's support of this movement.
According to the Fox News Voter Analysis, President Trump and the RNC Youth Advisory Council increased the Under 30 vote to over 47% Republican.
We must continue this incredible work to secure our future generation.

clean_body: Our President, Donald J. Trump has retaken the White House, We did it! ... | | | | == | Friend, What a night! We watched on last night from Baldoria On the Water as President Donald J. Trump re-took the White House, and our mission to Make America Great Again was victorious. It is time for President Trump to lead our great country into its "Golden Age," and we are proud to stand with him. Over the last two weeks, as we launched the Team Imer PAC, we chased over 2000+ ballots across Jefferson and Custer County, and campaigns that we were proud to support chased tens of thousands more in Denver and other areas. Last night, at our Victory Party at Baldoria On the Water, we were thrilled to be joined by dozens of Generation Z attendees, many of whom were first-time voters in this election. They all shared our passion for Making America Great again. Many of these Gen Z attendees are pictured below. | Here at Team Imer, we are committed to this fight to Make America Great Again and continue to increase the gains we have made in Generation Z's support of this movement. According to the Fox News Voter Analysis, President Trump and the RNC Youth Advisory Council increased the Under 30 vote to over 47% Republican. We must continue this incredible work to secure our future generation. Will you join us in this effort to secure Gen Z? | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | We want to thank over 40+ people who attended last night. Even with the major snowstorm that hit, we still had a packed house! We will send all attendees the photo links soon. We thank you for your support as we start this new venture and continue working to Restore Patriotism in America, one step at a time. Let the real work begin! MAGA! Our Best, | Laurel Imer Chair, Team Imer PAC | Weston D. Imer Co-Chair, Team Imer PAC Member, RNC Youth Advisory Council | == | == | | == | == == == | == | This email was Paid for by the Team Imer PAC and is not authorized by any candidate or candidates committee. www.TeamImer.com This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC, with authorization and approval by Team Imer PAC. | | | | Team Imer PAC | 16606 W 9th Ave | Golden, CO 80401 US | | | | | |

Team, Thanks to the dedication of volunteers, organizers, and grassroots supporters like you, the voters of Illinois' 13th District have reelected me to continue the fight for our working families! Your unwavering support has been pivotal. Together, we've strengthened our coalition, and now, it's time to roll up our sleeves and get back to work. I’m committed to protecting our reproductive freedom, supporting our veterans and small businesses, and ensuring that we’re investing in good-paying union jobs that provide the benefits we need to keep our families fed. This is how we'll continue to grow the middle class and stand strong for our community. This election offered a clear choice: A future focused on results for Illinois, or an extreme, right-wing agenda. The people spoke, choosing progress! Your belief in our shared mission made the difference. As we move forward, your continued support is crucial. Let's keep this momentum going and ensure we deliver real results for every family in the 13th District. With heartfelt thanks, — Nikki [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96673645/510796337/-1981500466?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC120_20241106_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTMxZTRiMS00ZDljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kX4gnNrHhaa4nvgjrGtqnPjCHeiGBA4kNElZ-vk9Uy8=)

name: Lindsey Williams Drath
subject: We’re needed more now than ever - we supported 125+ candidates in the 2025 cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
See how they did!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=1)
---
Wednesday, November 06, 2024 | Dear Forward Party supporters, It has been quite a year, both for our nation and for the Forward Party. We have celebrated successes and learned from significant setbacks. We stand today, more than ever, steeled in our resolve to build a new political party from the ground up in order to introduce real competition into the political process. Each time we experienced challenges along the way we were inspired by the resolve of our incredible candidates. This morning we continue to draw strength and resolve from their determination and are so grateful for their commitment. Thank you to each and every Forward-aligned candidate that ran this year. In the wake of the election yesterday, I wanted to write to everyone to give an update on outcomes from this cycle. Today, I’m focusing on the results of the election, for our candidates and supported ballot initiatives. Tomorrow, I’ll write about the infrastructure we built over the past year. **Presidential Race** The Forward Party decided early on not to engage in the presidential race. Too many other efforts start with the presidential and collapse under the weight of it. However, just because we didn’t engage in it doesn’t mean we don’t have thoughts about the election and the outcome. In the wake of Donald Trump’s victory, it’s important to reflect on how, after his first term and his rhetoric during the election season, the American people decided to return him to power. It shows how truly broken our political system is, and a Democratic Party that isn’t able to build a winning coalition of voters. It reflects an electorate that feels increasingly left behind and desperate for anyone they believe will rebuild the American dream. Just think about what happened during this cycle: The presidential nominee for the Democratic party was not subjected to a national democratic process. Debates were canceled, and frontrunners refused to participate in them. Parties funded extremists in the other party to have an easier path to victory, only to see that backfire when the extremist won. Legislatures tried to strip the power from the people to vote on ballot initiatives, removing a direct path to self-governance. The Forward Party is fighting to build infrastructure to run candidates who want America to work again. We need to provide an alternative from this insanity to the American people, and we need each and every one of you to help us build a new home for those just like us. **Our Candidates** The primary purpose of a political party is to find and run aligned candidates. In this cycle, after considering thousands of candidates, we ended up endorsing over 125 that lived up to the values cited in [our pledge](https://www.forwardparty.com/pledge/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=2) These candidates ran as Forwardists or affiliates from other parties. They ran in races from school board to US Senate. They ran representing views from across the ideological spectrum. But, if they won, they all agreed to respect the rule of law and the Constitution; act with ethics and integrity; and work with all potential partners on common ground solutions, no matter their ideological source. We are thrilled to congratulate the following candidates who at the time of this email have been declared winners:
* Don Davis, US House from North Carolina
* Dan Rayfield, OR Attorney General
* Dave Larson, WA State Supreme Court
* Lydia Hernandez, AZ State Representative
* Steve Eliason, UT State Representative
* Rosemary Lesser, UT State Representative
* Dr. Jermaine Johnson, SC State Representative
* Jim Palmisciano, Richmond (RI) Town Council
* Nathan Hochman, LA (CA) County DA
* Vanessa Grossl, KY State Representative
* John Curtis, US Senate from Utah
* Carolina Jewett, Charleston (SC) School Board
* Michael Lai, San Francisco Board of Supervisors
* Scott Bright, CO State Senate
* Lisa Feret, CO State Representative
* Rhonda Fields, Arapahoe County Commissioner
* Tony Hwang, CT State Senate
* Cynthia Borrego, MN State Representative
* Kathleen Cates, MN State Representative
* Joshua Hernandez, MN State Representative
* Jonathan Cooper, Las Vegas Justice of the Peace
* Phyllis Bernard, Clallam County (WA) Public Utility District
* Kyle Curtis, Yakima County (WA) Commissioner
* Bob Marshall, CO State Representative
* Amy Roeder, ME State Representative

Here’s what some of our candidates had to say: “The Forward Party guide is truly energizing. All that I have sought to share in meet & greets, candidate forums, you name it - the principles are all there. My thanks to everyone who contributed to this effort. It might raise peoples' spirits to know that a more inclusive, non-partisan approach even exists.” -Phyllis Bernard
“I am grateful for the [endorsement]. I am excited to have the support of Forward Party and to close this race out so we can begin to work on strengthening our democracy and making it more equitable for us all.” -Tyrell Hicks **Ballot Initiatives** State legislatures are seemingly taking every opportunity to attack the ballot initiative process, but the American people are fighting back. When legislatures try to take power away from us, the American voters, we are stopping them in their tracks. Look no further than Utah’s Amendment D, where a last minute initiative attempted to give the legislature power to edit or ignore amendments voted on by the people. These types of initiatives are one of the purest ways Americans exercise self-governance, and they are important to keeping our government open, transparent, and honest. In this cycle, a number of initiatives that would implement good government reforms such as ranked-choice voting and open primaries were on the ballot.
* DC passed an open primaries and ranked-choice voting initiative
* Peoria, IL, voted to implement a ranked-choice voting system
* Oak Park, IL, did, as well
* Bloomington, MN, defended a challenge against their successful use of ranked-choice voting

This year was truly momentous for the Forward Party, and none of it could have happened without the help of our state leads and volunteers across the country. Tomorrow, I’ll be writing to look at this work and the infrastructure we built out while supporting good people for office. Best, Lindsey Williams Drath Forward Party CEO [](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=3)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=4)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=5)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_candidate_outcomes_24&n=10) Copyright © 2024 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. name: Jen Schultz
subject: I’m proud of the campaign we ran together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jennifer Schultz Volunteer Committee
body:
logo [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/97907/images/Schultz_Logo_web.png]
Friends,
I am so proud of the campaign we ran together as Team Schultz. I want to thank all of our volunteers and supporters for helping us build stronger DFL connections throughout the district.
We had honest conversations about how we could build a better way forward for our community and for our country. We knocked on thousands of doors, hosted over 50 meet and greets, attended events in every part of the 8th, marched in dozens of parades, and raised the resources needed to communicate with thousands of Minnesotans.
While we didn’t win this particular race, I am confident we built a strong foundation in the 8th district to continue to build on.
Thank you again for everything.
Jen
https://www.facebook.com/JenSchultzForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/JenSchultzForCongress] https://twitter.com/RepJenSchultz [https://twitter.com/RepJenSchultz] https://www.instagram.com/jenschultzforcongress/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y= [https://www.instagram.com/jenschultzforcongress/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=]
Paid for by the Jennifer Schultz Volunteer Committee

name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: Thank You From the Bottom of My Heart
body:
| | | | | [](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=b00e67d418&e=395a33a3d2)
---
| | | | |
# We lost the race
# but won a familia
---
| As a scientist, I understand the importance of failing. Each failure is a lesson, and it brings you closer to solving the problem at hand.
Although last night’s outcome isn’t what we hoped for, I want you to know how deeply grateful I am for each and every one of you who believed in and supported this campaign.
Running as your Democratic nominee in Texas’ 21st Congressional Districthas been a truly remarkable experience, and I’m so grateful for the opportunity and proud of what we built TOGETHER.
---
| Y’all helped fueled this campaign with your passion and dedication.
To everyone who volunteered your time, donated, knocked on doors, sent kind and encouraging messages,introduced me to your networks, opened up your homes, shared our message, and encouraged others to vote:
**Thank you from****the bottom of my heart****for running with me****every step of the way.**
We are powerful and blazed a trail. We made it clear that every voice deserves to be heard and that we will RAISE HELL and will stand up to extremists like Chip Roy.
Our work doesn’t end here.Today we mourn and rest, but tomorrow we organize.
We must keep fighting for what we believe in— a fair healthcare, education, and economic system for all Texans, regardless of what we look like, who we love, or what our zip code is.
This Texan is forever grateful for your support. It’s our home too.So let’s keep fighting for it!
All My Love and Gratitude,
---
|
---

name: Rob Mercuri
subject: A New Chapter Begins
body:
|
---
Friend, Friends - today begins a new chapter for all of us. I would first begin with a heartfelt Thank You for your strong showing, steadfast support, and excitement for our campaign. Thank you for your trust in me as a candidate and support for our message of doing better by being better to each other. I am proud of our efforts! Now. . . . It’s time to move forward. Let us unite with our fellow citizens and stand together as Americans for Western Pennsylvania and our Country. We are grateful for all we have and what lies ahead. I will continue to lead in our community and with your help, we will continue to make a difference for us all and contribute to shaping public policy for a renewed prosperity, a more secure Country, and a more united community. There are, of course, challenges on the road ahead. Economic stagnation, ongoing inflation, fiscal challenges, divisive partisanship, chaos overseas and misinformation. . . . tests of our resolve. There is no doubt that we are up to the challenge — and more. Let’s begin a renewal of America’s prosperity, a reunification of our people, and a revival of our American Values. Let’s do this together. Rob Mercuri[](https://robmercuri.nationbuilder.com/?e=3e5e734082f1493d27255edb80fe3a63&utm_source=robmercuri&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_06_24_email_to_supporterts&n=1) [](http://www.robmercuri.com?e=3e5e734082f1493d27255edb80fe3a63&utm_source=robmercuri&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_06_24_email_to_supporterts&n=2)
Mercuri for Congress · PA 15222, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://robmercuri.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=3e5e734082f1493d27255edb80fe3a63&utm_source=robmercuri&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_06_24_email_to_supporterts&n=3).
You can also keep up with Mercuri For Congress on [Twitter](https://robmercuri.nationbuilder.com/r?u=en3xSujlv8Ugmatfbc5cGG-oeDcX0Vigpng6Yrm8vjo&e=3e5e734082f1493d27255edb80fe3a63&utm_source=robmercuri&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_06_24_email_to_supporterts&n=4) or [Facebook](https://robmercuri.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JX96XlrFg8PvAgAUFhwKHzf-J6M7ykVQEHhVP7GsRAJaLrM4yX3AK12JL5Tyttoe&e=3e5e734082f1493d27255edb80fe3a63&utm_source=robmercuri&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_06_24_email_to_supporterts&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://robmercuri.nationbuilder.com/r?u=L9iWmSJhqpjLcJzPcu6_PgnVgyIT8LtFiKZoZ7fdC3E&e=3e5e734082f1493d27255edb80fe3a63&utm_source=robmercuri&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=11_06_24_email_to_supporterts&n=6), software for leaders.

**Dr. Michael Goldstein Issues Statement on the Results of Yesterday 's Election**
**November 6, 2024**
Thanks for reading Michael's Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..oIbUJlPWWKtbonng32bkW2q2xWnvzfCm-NgzQauiCvM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151274691)
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**WEDNESDAY, November 6, 2024**
**Republican Congressional Challenger, Doctor Michael Goldstein Issues Statement on the Results of Yesterday 's Election**
GREENWICH, CT
Dr. Michael Goldstein M.D., J.D., Candidate for Congress for Connecticut's 4th Congressional District has issued the following statement on the results of yesterday's election:
An election is about "We the People" making their voices heard at the ballot box. While we are disappointed at the results, we are not disappointed by our efforts and the journey that we took over the past year. Why?

Because elections are a two-part process. The first part is to listen to the concerns of a voter and to find out what keeps them up at night and what the government can do regarding their issues. The second part is about engaging the voters and trying to inform them about the choices they make, and how they will impact their futures and future of the next generation.

We listened to the voters we met throughout the district and used our platform to raise attention to others to tell them that they were not alone. For some, that influenced their decision at the polls. For others, we just did not reach them.

We have reached out to Congressman Himes' office to congratulate him, and I am sure we will speak over the next few days.

Congressman Himes has another two years in office, and we hope that he will address some of the issues that we raised which were issues of the people. While Connecticut has gone more democrat in representation in local offices and has maintained the same federal representation, we hope that over the next two years that Mr. Himes shifts some more attention to using federal solutions to solve the local problems facing Connecticut residents in our district.

That was a bedrock issue of our campaign and our efforts were largely spent on bringing attention to our campaign.

Despite the presidential race, voters were very locally focused due to the pocket book issues. One would hope that voters know that federal issues impact the local level.

It is my prescription to the residents of this state and of this nation that they start to have conversations with their neighbors regardless of their party affiliation, especially in Connecticut where most voters are unaffiliated. Doctor's Orders!
We thank all of our supporters and will reach out over the next few days. We will continue to use our voice and platform to help where we can and bring issues to light.
Connecticut is a great state with huge potential. Let's all work together to ensure that the younger generations are afforded the opportunities to lead prosperous and fulfilled lives here in Connecticut.

Doctor Michael Goldstein
For More Information:
Please contact Dr. Michael Goldstein's Campaign Manager, Jonathan Goldstein at [info@goldsteinforcongress.com](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ca4474f2-38a8-40b0-a3ad-c838cbc9304f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or by phone at 914-980-9696 for any additional information.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7a7da7a6-b2b2-4716-ac28-e254db0a7b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Thank you for your continued support.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein
[www.goldsteinforcongress.com](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/39c19367-9cf2-4f7f-8de6-3dd3f391bee9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: The day after
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
This is not our first rodeo.
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3011784/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend,

I'm heartbroken this morning—but I am not despairing.

I have been here before, in the dim pre-dawn hours of a Trump presidency, as have so many of you, and it gives me great comfort to remember how we held the line then, and refused to give in to apathy and despair.

And this time around, we have the advantage of experience and a bigger climate movement. **Evergreen has a plan to hold and gain ground—check out my message below to hear more.** |
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3011785/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| We're ready to protect the hard-won progress of the last four years, and to fight on every front we can for further progress. In fact, we'll send you an email soon with a key opportunity to stop five super-polluting fossil fuel projects.

But today, take care of yourself and your people. The movement will need you tomorrow.

With steadfast solidarity, |
---
| | |
---
### Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action
---
---

name: John Avlon
subject: The Good Fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://johnavlon.com [https://johnavlon.com]
Friends,
Democracy depends on respecting the results even if you don't win. Patriotism means loving your country no matter who is president.
I ran for Congress because I was so concerned about the stakes of this election for our country and our community. That still stands.
I'm proud of the campaign we ran and the team we built. We fought the good fight. But not every good fight wins the first time. Don’t lose faith.
I have nothing but the deepest gratitude for your support and your enthusiasm. This was a people powered campaign driven by the tireless dedication of all of you who wrote thousands of postcards, knocked on two-hundred thousand doors, and made countless phone calls. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
We outpaced the top of the ticket in our district and won more votes than any previous Democratic congressional candidate in NY-01 history - but we lost this race. That does not mean the good fight is over. In fact, it’s more important than ever before.
The core ideas of this campaign remain urgent. We need build a broad bipartisan patriotic coalition to defend American democracy. We need to rebuild the middle – the middle of our politics and the middle of our economy.
I've worked my heart out over the past 250-plus days and left it all out on the field. When I left CNN to get into the arena, I did it because Margaret and I didn’t want to tell our children that we could have done more when it mattered most. It is some consolation to know that we did just that.
I love Suffolk County. I love the extraordinary people I've had the honor of meeting and working with over the course of this campaign. I only wish we could have delivered a better result at this time. We will learn from this experience and emerge stronger and wiser.
Now we must try to move forward together. We have a lot of work to do to reunite our nation, our country, and our community. We need to find the strength to keep forming a more perfect union. I still believe in finding common ground over chaos. I will always remain a happy warrior in my heart, and I know that we will continue fighting the good fight because our country and our community are worth the fighting for.
Thank you and God bless you and may God bless America. Thank you for fighting the good fight with me.
–John Avlon
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/111890/images/JAimg.jpg]
PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
John Avlon for Congress
PO Box 1200
Sag Harbor, NY 11963
United States

name: Congressman-Elect Troy Downing (MT-02)
subject: Victory is ours!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress

I’m honored and humbled to announce that, thanks to your loyal support, we have officially secured the victory for Montana’s 2nd Congressional District! As we embark on a new journey, I promise to serve you honestly and transparently to ensure a brighter future in America. As a former USAF/ANG combat veteran, I pledge to always put our country first in Congress. I am committed to eliminating the corruption that has allowed officials to betray the American people for personal gain. Together, we’ll stop the policies that have opened our borders, indoctrinated our children, and made us dependent on our adversaries for energy! Thank you again for your steadfast support, and I look forward to representing our great state of Montana in Congress. Sincerely, https://click.updates.troydowning.com/?qs=2250342bccb1112493a40df6ffd2aef379ec62419143f0a36421334770e5a889a301914664ddaf38309271d6d11d3a42eab52cfdb09fa592 Troy Downing, Congressman-Elect (MT-02) Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. # [A Short Reflection Before Response](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=151274923&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjc0OTIzLCJpYXQiOjE3MzA5MDc2MzMsImV4cCI6MTczMzQ5OTYzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2i5B9o86MAxBpV4djgQjYeG4zj566qfPIS1b4Ox_vBI)

| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Nov 6
---

---
---

---
Dear readers and subscribers,
Asked during an interview, "_Are you still in despair about the world_?" James Baldwin responded: "_I never have been in despair about the world. I 've been enraged by it. I don't think I'm in despair. I can't afford despair. I can't tell my nephew, my niece. You can't tell the children there's no hope_."
Later tonight I will post a detailed analysis of what happened in last night's election. But I wanted to send this brief note for two reasons.
One, as a short reminder to not lose hope, and that it is okay to take time to reflect before responding. Many people are hurting. Many are confused. Many are angry. There is no rush to respond. And be not hopeless. I say this both to those hurting, and to those looking to point fingers. Already this morning I've received notes telling me to "_f*ck off_ " or "_enjoy the camps_ " or "_hope you like being deported_ ," even making genocidal statements about Palestine. And to be sure, these aren't from MAGAs--but sadly from folks on the left. I don't take it personally, but I do take it seriously.
Two, I want to make a clear ask for your support as we go into these next four years. We've sadly seen the failure of legacy media, the refusal of the fourth estate to hold accountable those in power, and the capitulation to fascism. Meanwhile--with your support--I have built the _Let 's Address This_ community to now more than 75,000 thoughtful people on the promise to speak truth to power and uphold justice in all matters. If you're reading this, you are a member of that community, and I am grateful to you for choosing to partake. **So, my ask is that if you are in a position to[become a paid subscriber](https://substack.com/redirect/22ccb4c5-5f3c-4c5b-961b-8fb35f31e1c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as we build into this next year, now is a crucial time to join this movement.**
Thank you for the trust you have in me. My commitment is to reciprocate that trust with consistent, thoughtful, fact-based analysis and insights on the key human rights and civil rights issues that impact us all.
Sincerely,
Qasim
