name: Amanda Chase
subject: Special Election to Fill John McGuire's State Senate Seat to be called
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
I'm Running
| | | | SPECIAL ELECTION TO BE ANNOUNCED I'm Running for State Senate (Republican run-off in December)
---
---
| Greetings!, A Special Election will be called to fill John McGuire's state senate seat, once the results of yesterday's results are certified.
Republican Party of Virginia attorney Chris Marston advised that a Republican Mass Meeting would most likely take place mid-December 2024, which is next month.
Last night, Senator John McGuire won against his Democrat opponent and is now Congressman-elect John McGuire.
While I'm thankful that the seat remains securely under Republican control, I am thankful for Congressman Bob Good's service as the most conservative Congressman in Virginia. It was under his leadership that we secured regular order in Congress and ousted Kevin McCarthy as speaker, which took courage and old fashioned guts.
McGuire's win leaves open the Virginia Senate Seat in State Senate District 10, which encompasses Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, part of Prince Edward, Goochland, Hanover, Louisa, Powhatan and Fluvanna. I live in and own a home in historic Appomattox.

---
|
---
Once John McGuire's election is certified, a Special Election will be called and Republicans have 5 days to choose a Republican nominee.
December 2 is the day the State Board of Elections meets to certify the November 5th general election results.
Once the general election is certified, a Special Election will be called. So please stay tuned.
If you support me, please donate. If you live in Senate District 10 and support me, please reply back to this email that you will vote for me so that we can keep you up to date on voting instructions once they are released.
Thank you for your support! Amanda
---

December 2 is the day the State Board of Elections meets to certify the November 5th general election results. Once the general election is certified, a Special Election will be called. So please stay tuned. If you support me, please donate. If you live in Senate District 10 and support me, please reply back to this email that you will vote for me so that we can keep you up to date on voting instructions once they are released. Thank you for your support! Amanda | | == | | == | | | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811 | Midlothian, VA 23112 US | | | | | |

name: Ty Pinkins
subject: Together, we took a very important first step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ty Pinkins for Congress
body:
I can’t thank you enough, Peter.

Over the last few months, we’ve come together to address the issues facing folks across Mississippi, and we’ve done incredible work.

**Despite this progress, I know the election results did not go in our favor.**

But, I am still immensely proud of the work we've accomplished together. This campaign was built on the dedication, passion, and belief of people like you, who stood by me in our fight for a better future. I am deeply grateful for your support and commitment.

**We worked tirelessly to bring attention to the issues that matter most in our community, and while we may not be celebrating a victory today, our journey doesn't end here.**

The conversations we've started and the connections we've made will continue to make a difference in our neighborhoods, because knocking on doors in all 82 counties made a difference, Peter.

For the first time in a really long time, people across Mississippi feel heard, and we can’t take that for granted. So, like I said this is just the beginning for us, and from here, this movement is going to continue to change Mississippi for the better.

Thank you for being a part of this movement,

_Ty_

* * *
| The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta.

Frustrated by the lack of action from lawmakers on the issues facing people in Mississippi–and believing that the hard-working voters of Mississippi deserve much better–Ty Pinkins decided to run for office: the United States Senate in 2024.
---

name: Russ Vought
subject: Monumental change is coming.
body:
My thoughts on President Trump’s resounding victory. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10707360?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Good morning,

As I write this, monumental change is on the horizon.

A second administration of President Donald J. Trump will begin in January, and with it, a new direction for our country that could last for generations to come.

President Trump’s defeat of Kamala Harris was not only a decisive electoral victory, but a resounding endorsement of his agenda by the American people for the country.

In anticipation of this moment, we’ve expended enormous time, effort, and resources over the past several years to lay the legal and policy groundwork to support the President’s agenda. An agenda that secures the border and restores our national sovereignty, stops the weaponization of government agencies against the American people, ends endless wars, and puts American workers first.

With this victory, a new Trump administration must move quickly and decisively to turn the tables on the Left. To do this, we must arm the President with every constitutional power at his disposal. These powers include impoundment, which we’ve championed, that would restore the President’s authority to "impound" unnecessary funds from Congress.

I’ll leave you with this. Months ago, I told a small group of trusted supporters that this presidential election could very well decide if we become the victors or the vanquished.

President Trump’s re-election is the turning point in the battle to save our country. Monumental change is coming, and long-term victory is on the horizon.

Let’s get to work.
---
|
---
| Russ Vought
President, Citizens for Renewing America
---
| | |
---

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: You have an important role to play right now, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.
#

Peter —
When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back.
It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together.
Here’s where we’re at in Arizona:
I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close.
Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down.
Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it.
[**If you’re looking for some way to have an impact and help us fight back against Kari Lake as we work to ensure the votes are counted, please make a donation to my campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov24-overtime.lIuiiG&refcode=em241106-1-160&t=1&akid=3543%2E734936%2EcPzFIL)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

clean_body: I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. Peter — When I first launched this campaign, I never would’ve dreamed that this many people would have my back. It’s unbelievable, and I’ll always be grateful for everything we built together. Here’s where we’re at in Arizona: I’m confident that — after all the votes are counted — we’re going to win. But it’s going to take a little while until that happens. And I can tell you this, for sure: Whatever the result is, it’s going to be close. Unfortunately, my opponent has a history of fanning the flames of conspiracy and disinformation. She’s already done a ton of damage to my state and to our country, but I’m not about to back down. Maybe it’s the Marine in me, but I’ll always fight for our democracy. And you have a critical role in that fight, if you’re up for it. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks again, and Semper Fi. body:
| | | [](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=093baa5cd0ab4ddeb13ecb92b502180d&_e=mjIAN_Q2f5uRLVEyRBR8e-hH_PGfZY6WCuuuFVAfY0L69XJsWroFRsMfBtRnX1IkaLJQ84VImN7hzP7-XXcTMyG3Ngn3rkjxZgw9VNIU_4MU3LAsSofqayawTkYJWk5Tu35NUjASi2htASs1Yfrh_welS9jGQeV6jce7poIl8k05SKGsxX7Bikq6IE6LR_aScNWXKzTGTrKCOvXpy9ALj0bGNQQ6MTWSE684ZfRy_gnR-kb6e1TxJ-k5Q6y__uYUVGDQgWd91s_GfaUsigaq6nGAMFozEdN35P2GyLJkhul-papvOckyYLX1boTpLnatt_myUoGTtxuBEgGThBPsAwf299aKcdfuyfih_ETx8ZoZ2A2BF410o5rVRGXkBPFY4GT7ej5wId9Yo9naUwS72C0VP4Z0z043SbI1wbVoQfz-2Wto-JtlJxky-fr0dZcu) Here's where things stand, Peter: **Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.** We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: **[Please, will you split $25 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Defeat Boebert PAC to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=093baa5cd0ab4ddeb13ecb92b502180d&_e=mjIAN_Q2f5uRLVEyRBR8e-hH_PGfZY6WCuuuFVAfY0L69XJsWroFRsMfBtRnX1IkaLJQ84VImN7hzP7-XXcTMyG3Ngn3rkjxZgw9VNIU_4MU3LAsSofqayawTkYJWk5Tu35NUjASi2htASs1Yfrh_welS9jGQeV6jce7poIl8k05SKGsxX7Bikq6IE6LR_aScNWXKzTGTrKCOvXpy9ALj0bGNQQ6MTWSE684ZfRy_gnR-kb6e1TxJ-k5Q6y__uYUVGDQgWd91s_GfaUsigaq6nGAMFozEdN35P2GyLJkhumTN5dPT04QWRrB3aik0MdpMAqVlqBjVzwFA5fqUfQlGJ9M5cuazVfNUZVv6hEPXPXEBLO8DnHHSi5fVjT8h0l_ghR0ZCo3Kdb298hlQDDgWmA03_-zZnD44JXyMfE3wjjX8HT9PnqcEmqxhmwL60Dh)** **[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=093baa5cd0ab4ddeb13ecb92b502180d&_e=mjIAN_Q2f5uRLVEyRBR8e-hH_PGfZY6WCuuuFVAfY0L69XJsWroFRsMfBtRnX1IkaLJQ84VImN7hzP7-XXcTMyG3Ngn3rkjxZgw9VNIU_4MU3LAsSofqayawTkYJWk5Tu35NUjASi2htASs1Yfrh_welS9jGQeV6jce7poIl8k05SKGsxX7Bikq6IE6LR_aScNWXKzTGTrKCOvXpy9ALj0bGNQQ6MTWSE684ZfRy_gnR-kb6e1TxJ-k5Q6y__uYUHNByCXeAACYSNOQ3XhtPHBKs5UGS-yL5eRGYEbB_H1d-CF_axxPVSspWi9GrVeZJvfAy3KbY1KZ58q2Kmc3kqfix3p0bkZ4WLgD6QtFR1VGpHlWSfinXormq9DjW6BX65CF1NpAPNC7TNSfAKd7LL4BNbnf4HyAjAuHRPhxLuTA%3D)** We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win. **So please, Peter, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment:** **[Please, will you split $25 – or as much as you can – between my campaign and Defeat Boebert PAC to help me reach my important end-of-month goal, win in Nevada, and defend our Senate majority?](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=093baa5cd0ab4ddeb13ecb92b502180d&_e=mjIAN_Q2f5uRLVEyRBR8e-hH_PGfZY6WCuuuFVAfY0L69XJsWroFRsMfBtRnX1IkaLJQ84VImN7hzP7-XXcTMyG3Ngn3rkjxZgw9VNIU_4MU3LAsSofqayawTkYJWk5Tu35NUjASi2htASs1Yfrh_welS9jGQeV6jce7poIl8k05SKGsxX7Bikq6IE6LR_aScNWXKzTGTrKCOvXpy9ALj0bGNQQ6MTWSE684ZfRy_gnR-kb6e1TxJ-k5Q6y__uYUVGDQgWd91s_GfaUsigaq6nGAMFozEdN35P2GyLJkhunzF1oIFeuiA6e1qD6mnXs57ZpOqtl7ful0YxyOdwVudjJmdM5wJNWIaXH8cNLMZI-flwRJnOJbI64jxg2lDt1a5akdN3pCbXjcqrJNw_kp3AU5C66ZNjKOoUaE9E5NObtY35WRU57yszaxJl4uf4lS)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[**RUSH IN $25**](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=093baa5cd0ab4ddeb13ecb92b502180d&_e=mjIAN_Q2f5uRLVEyRBR8e-hH_PGfZY6WCuuuFVAfY0L69XJsWroFRsMfBtRnX1IkaLJQ84VImN7hzP7-XXcTMyG3Ngn3rkjxZgw9VNIU_4MU3LAsSofqayawTkYJWk5Tu35NUjASi2htASs1Yfrh_welS9jGQeV6jce7poIl8k05SKGsxX7Bikq6IE6LR_aScNWXKzTGTrKCOvXpy9ALj0bGNQQ6MTWSE684ZfRy_gnR-kb6e1TxJ-k5Q6y__uYUTO5TI-cECwZ-yhnkcj-5x0UkgCs3igHeX2FOoJ1UKbEDhDH7zYPjm19MQ_OYiVjvYpCNAtPG9VeYy3kBznqZhf7NcH8PfP682J4Xa7qUbJYSAy91fiIicm9zr2f8TPC5QvnsRZik25bTW4V1HqzLgLyI81gH5Q4nF6Npm41k-BTo8T4E-Pl3nNNuc-79Lo390B4Zxow9xvlRze9obbC6Qg%3D%3D)**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Can I send you my new book?
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Fellow American,

We're in a moment of national reflection.

And for many Americans, it's a question of how we reset and
reshape our culture, institutions, and daily lives-for the
better.

Fellow American, over the past year, I wrote my new book, Right Wing
Revolution, as a guide for a return to an America where…

We are united with a national spirit of love of country and
belief in American Greatness.

We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for
our Constitution.

We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a
nationwide spiritual renewal.

We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and
don't have to lock our doors at night.

We bring up the next generation to love our country, to
live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright
future for all Americans.

Can I send you a FREE copy of Right Wing Revolution to read
today? All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to support
Turning Point USA-and our critically important work to make kids
LOVE AMERICA again.

Make your gift & get your FREE book

Fellow American, I'm proud to say that Right Wing Revolution is like NO
OTHER book you've read from the Right before:

It's NOT a history of political tactics and the
back-and-forth between Left and Right.

It's NOT a list of only political goals or policy to-dos,
although I do discuss key issue areas that are important to every
American.

It's NOT a call for our leaders or lawmakers to make a
difference - instead, its focus is on how all Americans can
improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on
improving ourselves.

I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as
possible-which is why I'm offering to send you a hardcover
edition for FREE.

All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help
support Turning Point USA's work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!

Make your gift & get your FREE book

In this defining moment for America's future, let's come
together in a spirit of FREEDOM and with a firm belief in
AMERICAN GREATNESS to find all that's possible in the days ahead.

Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and continued
support of Turning Point USA.

For America,

Charlie Kirk

Founder & CEO

Turning Point USA

Support Turning Point USA

4940 East Beverly Road

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

TheFederalistWire.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

today@thefederalistwire.com

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Thank you for standing with me
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Despite our regrettable loss, and Donald Trump’s return to the White House, I remain optimistic about America’s future.
Team,

I knew from the results in 2022 that this race would be an uphill battle, but with American democracy on the line, I had a responsibility to do my part to defend it from MAGA extremism.

Together, our grassroots movement organized the Lower Hudson Valley like it has never been organized before. We made over one million phone calls, knocked on over 220,000 doors, raised over $10.6 million, and organized over 4,000 volunteers.

We focused on lowering costs, protecting Social Security and Medicare, restoring reproductive freedom for women, securing our border, and making our communities safer.

Unfortunately, the environment hasn’t changed much in New York since 2022, and it is always extremely difficult to unseat an incumbent. The data clearly show that this is not the same district Biden won by 10 points in the last presidential election. At this juncture, it is unclear whether Vice President Harris will win this district at all. Then there’s the Congressional Leadership Fund, the top GOP super PAC for House candidates, which spent more money against me distorting my record than against any other congressional candidate in the country.

**Despite our regrettable loss, and Donald Trump’s return to the White House, I remain optimistic about America’s future.** Our nation’s history shows us that _progress is not linear. Progress comes in fits._ As we continue on America’s long march towards freedom, I am ever grateful to the thousands of volunteers who poured their hearts and souls into this race, and to the thousands of Lower Hudson Valley voters who share my vision of a better world.

It was the honor of my life to represent the last version of New York’s 17th Congressional District, the same communities that elevated me from poverty all the way to the House of Representatives. **My commitment to public service, and to pragmatic leadership in these times of extremism and division, is as strong as ever.**

Finally, I wish Congressman Mike Lawler, whom I have known for years, the very best in his next term.

Thank you for standing with me in this fight,

Mondaire

| PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
---
P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591
---
If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://actions.mondaireforcongress.com/a/unsubscribe?unsubscribedata=9YsM9roS7bKdw3lMTcDxfLyU%2FY7bQRG7nJxEY1%2BY5nLa63kf49WupVXj6tYMgmxBMOx58gak%2FEg37HZQRm2%2BDJhIY1qrpmSEUjGZAAvmW%2B%2FjfIhNyyS6vyHvnPRkwdTdra0INegT4BjEO8g0ZNfb0M6%2F8OXsUn7Uja%2B6XSSuWCo%2FZ8vj1wabAPOq%2BLBrDlIPkYm%2BWtcB6fCU4qV63UtcG2oUwTXTzdYHC6C9JfqkFdSjrqq3BfFuDzD4PMR4FB8%2FNUfjdCZVjGWfeO3to61G0e5nyBbynP12bSXt9hlRU3RufgxN8zCf0%2BWuyGFN0ghsD5HGgl7ZsFfV4svv%2FWkewvIN7mlrgxG36I1AI7h1sNbQ4H0orN0Lv%2B0J8RiHADUXULmyfEWQ11PJb9qfvOdbiLakRFjAtu1yrtjxRMD6OOWZZ2abIJpqUgjKNEA1gBTj).

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82e5fbb1ce5b42d0a329893e307b51da&_e=LVSI4c3uvNWrb0AOIpjKidDe8-4SfFDecovdYFs30f8O_WCbGJ7AaJY9l_LeMOPDmJEi7pzPcY-gl4cJcAd_2I4YAb2f3opewv4dlLAfFvxdTP-I2j1DqFxSKQyg4ucIOd2BmwAmCOZRlxZk_x7FcZa986LeIRD4fDtHEsG7VM3_CLcYkAIqeSYdBcbRYldAp6qEJRQciRYBrmRODsRdHlr85TFUCpwMB0akBrkHy3gdr2eolo4WYaYOn5E9k0BCHrNeYrCQzM6yoZlsJn8JEMupEgtPdCsL_ibgjL-cr2OyuRiO0gZg7Gwq9Kju6szdYYGr6wqk9VwfKAqCBueWpiczFFS-qlbiwLmvaKVqZOzIDu5Ij4axHbE4x98MN7-p)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82e5fbb1ce5b42d0a329893e307b51da&_e=LVSI4c3uvNWrb0AOIpjKidDe8-4SfFDecovdYFs30f8O_WCbGJ7AaJY9l_LeMOPDmJEi7pzPcY-gl4cJcAd_2I4YAb2f3opewv4dlLAfFvxdTP-I2j1DqFxSKQyg4ucIOd2BmwAmCOZRlxZk_x7FcZa986LeIRD4fDtHEsG7VM3_CLcYkAIqeSYdBcbRYldAp6qEJRQciRYBrmRODsRdHlr85TFUCpwMB0akBrkHy3jKDXsfEBKKdioT5XWWe-1v1V0Q6GJxEc6r7eNHzF2wW5ih1qjSI_YqAOp5lsXNi-fTX7JM_xi0KJoNCowitxgwSJYOyGEmgJJExxyySt1Kz671c6QZ-i7q1nKv6D01ZInmIyPAQH77Hr_DYDoOID9r)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82e5fbb1ce5b42d0a329893e307b51da&_e=LVSI4c3uvNWrb0AOIpjKidDe8-4SfFDecovdYFs30f8O_WCbGJ7AaJY9l_LeMOPDmJEi7pzPcY-gl4cJcAd_2I4YAb2f3opewv4dlLAfFvxdTP-I2j1DqFxSKQyg4ucIOd2BmwAmCOZRlxZk_x7FcZa986LeIRD4fDtHEsG7VM3_CLcYkAIqeSYdBcbRYldAp6qEJRQciRYBrmRODsRdHlr85TFUCpwMB0akBrkHy3gflZk1iBZXOXxhM8lIH0lJtzUqjD-j4M61A3Ip1pLS1xWQSoHQ5tEuMEmnAfpq5yS6JXl3jkEkKa1zjCnbSpAum3TOQhBgkNYZYdVvymZRtKep5IgrbL_UtcxksUa5Xmm0m63uOhMlK9C6boBa2ZG1)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82e5fbb1ce5b42d0a329893e307b51da&_e=LVSI4c3uvNWrb0AOIpjKidDe8-4SfFDecovdYFs30f8O_WCbGJ7AaJY9l_LeMOPDmJEi7pzPcY-gl4cJcAd_2I4YAb2f3opewv4dlLAfFvxdTP-I2j1DqFxSKQyg4ucIOd2BmwAmCOZRlxZk_x7FcZa986LeIRD4fDtHEsG7VM3_CLcYkAIqeSYdBcbRYldAp6qEJRQciRYBrmRODsRdHlr85TFUCpwMB0akBrkHy3hYCZi_Xm5P6alP66ZxRoR7NRIbdJV7Kl_gThEH3e44l7xxsvJENXPUEumq1eCQ7LnJAIr8uSDMkGUZvlApdBgqr4MRpexRrlPjFijLyB426QCreYJraUM2iYwgFCqyT2x07dZhpHQ9Wml93moFXm1Y)

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96685000/510832810/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_20241106_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjdmYmEwYS01ZjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsRF72OvPW7Vk9kdtJYQSymt5pgKRWn1sZs6eXEo9HA=&emci=2f7081f5-5b9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=4f7fba0a-5f9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=15529135) | Friend, _thank you._ In 2018, I ran for Congress for the first time and made a promise that I would leave no one behind. **And today, I reflect with pride and gratitude that I can continue to work toward that promise in a fourth term in Congress.** **__Thank you.__** I am honored to accept the responsibility of representing you for another term in Congress. I am grateful for the trust that so many of you have put in me, and I am eager to continue serving as your representative in Washington. This is not about me. It is about YOU. It is about our volunteers and supporters who mobilized voters across the district amid a tumultuous presidential campaign and always kept the faith. It is about everyone who believed in my positive message and cast a vote to make their voice heard. Because of YOU, I remain optimistic about the future ahead. Together, we will work to codify the right to choose for every woman nationwide, protect hard-earned benefits and affordable health care, protect our planet, protect our democracy, protect our children, protect our basic rights to safety and security, and continue our quest to form a more perfect union. I am so excited to be heading back to Congress for another term to work on these issues and more. _We have so much more work to do!_ Ever grateful, — Jahana
---

clean_body: | | Friend, thank you. In 2018, I ran for Congress for the first time and made a promise that I would leave no one behind. And today, I reflect with pride and gratitude that I can continue to work toward that promise in a fourth term in Congress. Thank you. I am honored to accept the responsibility of representing you for another term in Congress. I am grateful for the trust that so many of you have put in me, and I am eager to continue serving as your representative in Washington. This is not about me. It is about YOU. It is about our volunteers and supporters who mobilized voters across the district amid a tumultuous presidential campaign and always kept the faith. It is about everyone who believed in my positive message and cast a vote to make their voice heard. Because of YOU, I remain optimistic about the future ahead. Together, we will work to codify the right to choose for every woman nationwide, protect hard-earned benefits and affordable health care, protect our planet, protect our democracy, protect our children, protect our basic rights to safety and security, and continue our quest to form a more perfect union. I am so excited to be heading back to Congress for another term to work on these issues and more. We have so much more work to do! Ever grateful, — Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Diane
subject: We defeated Liz and Dick Cheney -- we can't stop now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241106&n=1)
---
Friend - We have a precious moment of opportunity. I wanted to start by thanking all of you, but then hesitated because "Thank You" emails from candidates usually mean the end of a campaign, and I have no intention of ending this fight to save our Republic and the future of humanity as a whole. I know that many of you not only voted for me, but mobilized hundreds and even thousands of other New Yorkers to do so. I don't believe that the 0.5% "official" result reflects that effort, and will be looking into it, but fundamentally my campaign was never about chasing after votes. I launched my first New York campaign against Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer late in 2019, because it was clear to me that our nation needs qualified leadership, and after 32 years of working with America's greatest statesman, Lyndon LaRouche, I believed that I could offer a standard of leadership which could serve to hold our so-called "representatives" accountable. Bronx Congressional candidate Jose Vega and I succeeded in doing that over the last couple of years, and as we saw at the October 26th Manhattan event, we have now assembled a team of top American retired military and intelligence experts, as well as some top social media influencers who are committed to the cause of ending these murderous wars, and upholding our Constitution. It would be irresponsible and immoral to stop fighting now. President-elect Donald J. Trump has promised to end the forever wars, emphatically including the Russia Ukraine conflict, which was completely avoidable, and both he and J.D. Vance have stated that a war with Iran "is not in our interest." Let's hold them to that. Let's also insist that AIPAC register as a foreign lobby group and demand that the genocide agaisnt the Palestinian people be halted immediately. Because the billionaire interests pushing these wars would like to hand the incoming Trump Administration an intractable military conflict, we must be particularly active and vigilant during this "lame duck" period, while the senile Joe Biden remains in the White House. The fact that the Space Force chose to launch a "routine test" of a nuclear-capable Minuteman III missile in the middle of the election results coming in last night is not a promising signal. Therefore, my Friday Symposium will continue, as will the Vega/Sare Monday night conference calls. We will also be mobilizing for a major Schiller Institute online conference to be convened on December 7 and 8th, where the need for a whole new economic and security architecture will be taken up by a panel of American and international representatives. I would urge all of you to stick with us as we seize this moment of transition to shape the policy of the incoming administration. Thank you so very much for your actions and your support in this campaign. Now is not the time to stop! \--Diane Sare
* * *
| [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=_Yu7LlQMSXincgftWDulKCYC0S2Dt0oLcofefbzZ5yf8Tic3-0_QvN9jXZzDm6kq&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241106&n=2) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=k0pTmfQ9SsQrtTReNCFnw_KTV1UusxxUCOgNwkzGP6Q&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241106&n=3) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=VeyYM6z1DeESIV43A1Ry2dDV_491o2X1sbKvmSG7FAOr8Iek3rlVZbvwpRvAYt8v&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241106&n=4) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=7jxhUfqQaPYxsxZioBvLIgBNlF_X3_78BgRoZcUiBGVzD7_J_3kkcslTtfJs-Sh2&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241106&n=5) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=XCQjXK2gfZavpXeHUbAHDNZMv6gy5vC_K7Sr3Y4ZikgOsRT33eNVJcTKEb-weN8r&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241106&n=6) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=cWgbLvmFQ2PvtnKwJ1wKJHhQjPkLwYt0QVv2FkuEPb2JBcE0jozZD-gqWBC9G2UL&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241106&n=7)

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Thank You for Your Trust and Support
body:
| | | |
---

Thank you for standing with me and believing in our campaign. It’s because of supporters like you that we’ve achieved this victory for Minnesota’s 1st District. Across the country, Americans have chosen a brighter future by rejecting the radical Left. I’m confident we’ll maintain our Republican majority in the House after all votes are counted. With President Trump winning the White House and a Republican Senate secured, I look forward to getting back to work for the American people. I’m honored to serve you and our district, upholding the values that make our nation great. Thank you again for your incredible support.
---
Thank you,
---
---
Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District

| | Dear Fellow American,

Every day there is a story in the news about voter fraud. Most of them are from the leftists in the media telling you voter fraud doesn't exist. But they are lying to you.

Not only does it exist, but it is a very real threat to the future of our republic.
---
|
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4c20604ce5e346ba8d4c08e1578d56bb&_e=VO2jbgXAGCJuJg2q8bI20VClHr7ArDl1AqmofZlmEJIydXYM9xxkEQOVcgaoiu8p1kK5cwi1yqXl-js51tn1yEoPH5i7CWllRYA8ow-qh4d7otgpOnEYGjIjIG_K27o7DrEArfcI5CrZHv3eUMQIOa5NYRjw9EQT27A99shLaFmfpsmEfqEbE9RQWOds0boiaMeX9faaBKNtwBpap6KtDxTYWMLulSCxfx7CPasDe1k83OJ4MRQqUNQu5CAr53Xkv03DRQdRf0vFW6AYe1tP6B4IuqxdCs8kha0-WSCnyk_UYmzurZrYoDpJCO_bKUVP5VTkPiKsqtA6B-jW9LoXqq03-4RAdvXgo1SMAe04DGNMjDwFi2I8CTf9BsMzQ-71GRiLHTkiKmOvjiEjiXp6Dg%3D%3D)
---
| | In response to this, The Heritage Foundation created the Election Fraud Database. This database contains 1,500 proven instances of election fraud. This is not an exhaustive list of election fraud cases across the country, but they do prove that election fraud is a major issue.

At The Heritage Foundation, we work with conservative policymakers to create the best policy solutions to reduce voter fraud and improve election integrity across America.

To help you navigate difficult conversations surrounding election fraud, we want to share five of the most shocking cases from our database. These cases include fraudulent ballots, ballot harvesting schemes, and more.

If you care as much about election fraud as I do then please get your FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's latest eBook, _**5 Shocking Cases of Election Fraud.**_

In the eBook, you'll read about
* Different schemes people used to get their candidate elected
* The steps our government took to correct the elections
* The criminal consequences people face for their illegal actions

**You 'll get instant access to your FREE eBook right now using this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/free-5-shocking-cases-of-election-fraud-ebook/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4c20604ce5e346ba8d4c08e1578d56bb&_e=VO2jbgXAGCJuJg2q8bI20VClHr7ArDl1AqmofZlmEJIydXYM9xxkEQOVcgaoiu8p1kK5cwi1yqXl-js51tn1yEoPH5i7CWllRYA8ow-qh4d7otgpOnEYGjIjIG_K27o7DrEArfcI5CrZHv3eUMQIOa5NYRjw9EQT27A99shLaFmfpsmEfqEbE9RQWOds0boiaMeX9faaBKNtwBpap6KtDxTYWMLulSCxfx7CPasDe1k83OJ4MRQqUNQu5CAr53XkjVkCIRdYi3cZNP7Yktl49UYa4VTVUoxQ-fcIS11CxqLHXanhPVVk15WBrtVmkoIpMgdjFrE9naikb73nhCiCR8ekBlJDBenKos_5PLMULc8oSXtuWc5bCt-EIZGPo1XDJPnkFOsbJG905eNhxbFxOw%3D%3D)**

Please use these stories to educate yourself on the destructive impact of election fraud and spread the word to help safeguard our country's future.

**To get your free copy of "5 Shocking Cases of Election Fraud" today, please click this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/free-5-shocking-cases-of-election-fraud-ebook/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4c20604ce5e346ba8d4c08e1578d56bb&_e=VO2jbgXAGCJuJg2q8bI20VClHr7ArDl1AqmofZlmEJIydXYM9xxkEQOVcgaoiu8p1kK5cwi1yqXl-js51tn1yEoPH5i7CWllRYA8ow-qh4d7otgpOnEYGjIjIG_K27o7DrEArfcI5CrZHv3eUMQIOa5NYRjw9EQT27A99shLaFmfpsmEfqEbE9RQWOds0boiaMeX9faaBKNtwBpap6KtDxTYWMLulSCxfx7CPasDe1k83OJ4MRQqUNQu5CAr53XkYizj-jtFKzgJ9g5Z3NouUXCdCAFqjckEYgdpnnwQyM3NWPFnnuY57pLeoiuPIQXkMLAo7OuWZWeIib1te4nEeo7wdEN4mWeUODP5ryRW7WGlE4mB5i0H52Xz1TXDQi4It-08HP0ScIZulAeC9xizHA%3D%3D)**

Thank you for being involved in the fight to uphold the conservative principles that make our nation great.

All the best,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.

If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Fellow American, Every day there is a story in the news about voter fraud. Most of them are from the leftists in the media telling you voter fraud doesn't exist. But they are lying to you. Not only does it exist, but it is a very real threat to the future of our republic. | | | In response to this, The Heritage Foundation created the Election Fraud Database. This database contains 1,500 proven instances of election fraud. This is not an exhaustive list of election fraud cases across the country, but they do prove that election fraud is a major issue. At The Heritage Foundation, we work with conservative policymakers to create the best policy solutions to reduce voter fraud and improve election integrity across America. To help you navigate difficult conversations surrounding election fraud, we want to share five of the most shocking cases from our database. These cases include fraudulent ballots, ballot harvesting schemes, and more. If you care as much about election fraud as I do then please get your FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's latest eBook, 5 Shocking Cases of Election Fraud. name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: From the bottom of my heart, thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter,
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=0975a06c96b04038adeaf921c8ac2330&_e=AlNtnE1KiDEwqgVhLT7nvS2EvgSbMbWo5CejLPPUmL6c5T_U-LmS1j6O9EqJ0yHHMPRtRkRDEqsdoQu7WrPxnDDw6uq1hqhiDZFD1twau84k81t7KxmJozRGJJ4ONY6X0e_GlWs26ch0boHf0IpS_r6OUmZrTBV9hhvkcxG08IsWQ6buap5ERph_C3asZAIhc-mk_bnpviU7Pw3DIA85DFaalCqFvtDFQSDKeWXun_x2LFuKhxJXoZTG0mGzq-UUwHdfjvKquRVJKcD9qapI5jCX2m3PAtVBmM896a9oFfj4KOt4zZcL1pM17n1pYAZ4NiL0_O24jclBVU8Yzv9xWk8bBejVQhTSHPXgWxsXyq5SI4u9WTkVOeThhplSQ64mkqp6v6WO32Pefn8UzQrP7Q%3D%3D)
---
Even though last night’s results did not go how we wanted, I want to thank you so much for your support. I’m proud to have represented so many patriots in Virginia. We’ve been to every corner of our commonwealth, and so many of you saw hope and believed in me. We had no support from the political establishment. The only support I got was from 120,000 different donations that averaged about $25, and we were able to raise just about ten and a half million dollars. I want to thank my wife April, my children, and my family, who have been incredibly supportive on this journey. And finally, I want to thank all the supporters who believed in us. We took this race down to an extremely slim margin, and that is because of people like you. Even though this race is over, I’ll be proud to serve my Commonwealth and country in any capacity they need me. I’m so incredibly grateful for this team, and I’m honored to have been on this journey. God bless you and God bless America.
---
In Liberty,
---
---
CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d196d3f9fb534e08ba83bec9eba450dc&_e=ikV3P1PAjyTBXG4AKWv1tZKWNzxFJ8ODvEf4k8LJgmvITVHxiX7ApoSv969BPomJVu6wI6WErbEhYiZ2to3JQjecZruluLD2A_TelecHlCnvdYGYSGuqzX9fsAOAhy-7nssx95ZnNoTFS_6DoWuPHDqOTVyNhWR-23tcU4rHw-1DXPadMS6-qHxriMao05anhVz8aNpNB_ShqkWL1bKqX10N6z3G-X8dcTaq6JJ3hrydoIs7InbkHcDu1SyZRPZhrL5gYxy7oYp246YQtvqtTe-0zw7z2huJsAtnpiMRrSHsdtfkUMMKQqUQz-qZcQWTV6rDlM1CxEt-8GtZ0tdrVKPqZQd7SIF0DJv5rCsDah5WvXfRFDn_sti1kp2cPkcI)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d196d3f9fb534e08ba83bec9eba450dc&_e=ikV3P1PAjyTBXG4AKWv1tZKWNzxFJ8ODvEf4k8LJgmvITVHxiX7ApoSv969BPomJVu6wI6WErbEhYiZ2to3JQjecZruluLD2A_TelecHlCnvdYGYSGuqzX9fsAOAhy-7nssx95ZnNoTFS_6DoWuPHDqOTVyNhWR-23tcU4rHw-1DXPadMS6-qHxriMao05anhVz8aNpNB_ShqkWL1bKqX10N6z3G-X8dcTaq6JJ3hrw1EaiS4uLvmIG1ZKqlm1IiYEL-FGia7IytmI49hky9_xsU9sG391zS4Q1ZhmRCz1OMcBuj1_4XUKGnc9sUNPy3Kdl0dEuHqeTJQ3MRWzBg8wZ8pjBAyfeeC7TjZH_7gz4n5T_BDGbjtBsXcy8MQZU6)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d196d3f9fb534e08ba83bec9eba450dc&_e=ikV3P1PAjyTBXG4AKWv1tZKWNzxFJ8ODvEf4k8LJgmvITVHxiX7ApoSv969BPomJVu6wI6WErbEhYiZ2to3JQjecZruluLD2A_TelecHlCnvdYGYSGuqzX9fsAOAhy-7nssx95ZnNoTFS_6DoWuPHDqOTVyNhWR-23tcU4rHw-1DXPadMS6-qHxriMao05anhVz8aNpNB_ShqkWL1bKqX10N6z3G-X8dcTaq6JJ3hrxMPGm5xFR4mJ0lY__HZdhrMPiIyCMaYCaN1E8rqk_grS8IoEwQIa91dH-VohKUHe0gW0K_Gn3LoTz_dS8OO6a27uh1bWO0y-nN9qz_K_FysfETeD1GNGuaC4YnHKHfc1cdv3gUbeJ0jze4s626wXlF)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d196d3f9fb534e08ba83bec9eba450dc&_e=ikV3P1PAjyTBXG4AKWv1tZKWNzxFJ8ODvEf4k8LJgmvITVHxiX7ApoSv969BPomJVu6wI6WErbEhYiZ2to3JQjecZruluLD2A_TelecHlCnvdYGYSGuqzX9fsAOAhy-7nssx95ZnNoTFS_6DoWuPHDqOTVyNhWR-23tcU4rHw-1DXPadMS6-qHxriMao05anhVz8aNpNB_ShqkWL1bKqX10N6z3G-X8dcTaq6JJ3hrwihG-HMmzgg9jCYfMIor-BkNJQ6walZwPg70QRD1TQ1CnXS6q2l7qs9RkmWsLB67EBrNJJD-y-X_Sd4zC0qYzLCcWgkhn9rd07uOiAfDatuvubWe8TpDrgQ2OKiJSqXYRFpbARUOVJ15xI7CTAt3L-)
---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
body:
We can’t afford to lose another Senate seat.

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, [click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96687275/510840684/1079316600?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.06_Rosen-TooClose_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTEzZTRmMy02MTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=im8VT8lLpch09-PvKYGGfJsDnW7wZVbnsA_2huv296I=&emci=36987f72-5a9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=0a13e4f3-619c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=11913588) To unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/_6DeEby01kOvxTWj8qzW6A2?unsubscribedata=1hV0ZXW%2BlA4Dbf5wBhTZw535DNNv%2BC2htmDnIrdmr9B5BinUX6apuqmm2UOkCvmLHdPS1AgAZd8GVMVOKzGzoOk%2BRDDHa22%2Fexh%2BD97Z4uoI3POJ%2BSM2P3F6eIBmGViDFkmbt8xLidbRRRiNs8dL726glszEUQzmTYmYMqON2x9EYbl%2B23yhAus1cIQrtxdKIWtNius%2BcKm7nas1QayBA1mh9nfDcdnn5FqPBFZodAbR6YLPoKcY2JspnuZxlHJkGxNtqxZlRkWPwVjwV4j3mlhvl3krMUM8QLp5aJOtLIP0HjyKsKEwQhITJkOVTvKlqs632eIkPqS1W5D2Htc4FQ1G%2BvR7cMEUL0mhO1aoZMr5naZH3gcElbwttrR67GTU8d2a5eDHCrwXJd%2FSy8ZxdL1YLupffzENvHNn4H6F5P1%2FROl%2BcCOYbcmpD7f03m4B)

| | Here's where things stand, friend: **Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.** We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: **[Please, will you split $10 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96687276/510840685/345745169?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.06_Rosen-TooClose_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTEzZTRmMy02MTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=im8VT8lLpch09-PvKYGGfJsDnW7wZVbnsA_2huv296I=)** | | [**DONATE $10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96687277/510840686/345745169?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.06_Rosen-TooClose_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTEzZTRmMy02MTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=im8VT8lLpch09-PvKYGGfJsDnW7wZVbnsA_2huv296I=)
---
We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country.
Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win.
**So please, friend, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment:[Split $10 or more right now to help my campaign get across the finish line.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96687278/510840687/345745169?amount=10&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.06_Rosen-TooClose_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTEzZTRmMy02MTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=im8VT8lLpch09-PvKYGGfJsDnW7wZVbnsA_2huv296I=)**

Jacky
* * *

name: Becca Balint
subject: So, what now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
We can grieve. But then, we must mobilize. This isn’t the first time a nation has lurched to the right, and it is NOT a reason to give up on the vision of a brighter future we worked toward.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96687372/510841124/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWZjMDgzMC02MjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_35dYZjATRMLB_G8zHrR3Kq6PRY3GmAiXGjcHxDZYI=&emci=191b8404-609c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=8efc0830-629c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Last night did not go the way we had hoped. As Democrats, we organized, volunteered, talked to our friends and family, and did everything we could to present a vision for the future: one that is pro-reproductive justice, pro-climate, and pro-working class. And please know, we are still committed to that urgent work. **And today, I’m sitting with the knowledge that we fell short.** There’s no way around it: there is a right-wing shift throughout this country we saw in real time as swing states turned red one by one. I was just as horrified as you to watch it all happen, and to be honest, I’m still reeling. **So, what now? ** Today, we can grieve. **But then, we must mobilize. This isn’t the first time a nation has lurched to the right, and it is NOT a reason to give up on the vision of a brighter future we worked toward. ** **I want to encourage you to lean on your community and find connection, even when your instinct is to pull away. ** This is the time to buckle up, check in on your loved ones, stay engaged in your community, and stay alert. We will all do what we can to show up for each other and demand progress from elected officials on every level. **And Peter, you have my word that I have your back in Congress.** In my second term, I promise you that I will be relentless in pushing for the policies that Americans desperately need, from housing accessibility to reproductive justice and beyond. This is the moment we are called to act, and I thank Vermonters for placing their trust in me once again to represent their interests. I’ll be in touch soon. In the meantime, take care of yourself – Becca
---

* * *

subject: We need to make sure every last vote gets counted
body:

What if we told you that CNN has said Cruz is the MOST VULNERABLE Republican up for re-election this year?

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: THANK YOU!
body:
| | | Peter, [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=824ce06afc1343cf858d5f7eb7873ba8&_e=3EkEUqY6z3sYMlVnPfFjUHjI1PpgAPM7y_pdZKPdVj4mIg1tiDql8Om_elRq1vW6-BPNsr3xYgcZqRmSAZ-UcRniBPvC8icmxCuknhQWPMLaPcvCWJlXDFp4QnZPdPY5IwDVDvnZWpWZIMyLcIwG-qX0vtkhbHIhaIBpNzEfvDBaB_Uj3KfN8bKWnRF0BrOPzqUS_OKooAlEvPI66SpNKxbZLHnc33N2jiQ3y96AFtjJi_o8jj8orNW_Cyu6AM21QBGdpZqHF_dThym5WXwFHMaKxOqTmdnUqSqcAgMwW5z1rqCcS1kFUN1cpqrJ5lQrn2EK_s3BHF_-tF-XGB-bfuI7h1f9LiO_iRXfb9Y-um0%3D) THANK YOU to the incredible people of Florida’s 6th District for placing your trust in me to represent you for another two years. I will always be grateful and honored to be your voice in Congress. Last night isn’t just about me. Across the country, America stood up and elected so many incredible conservative veterans who know what it’s truly like to put America first. I am so proud of each and every one of them, and I look forward to working with them.
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=824ce06afc1343cf858d5f7eb7873ba8&_e=3EkEUqY6z3sYMlVnPfFjUDUAVl39rqilfkvjpl_iquMk2RRE8YTvtydWmUfH7JXVVO9LsRbNw3Ei3CH-yzkie0bEmqg4xqQTfimvZEeWizYj-ggJewb0uPZqrI3OLuNKMi06jz6GO77Qfi0YuW6RxfFIG9lmnSewnVTRG-ZRhs2tIaDV7i2DYpiC1RvJnmG5SXnMgAua1-4lfdiKsiajw4J_5F9wuwkrnSfN9JCzYCDkYG8S_Sk-yhuT3f7-svg_AGYRz8bjUC1utUAi0KIqHweQ3Ut4MdMS78iJPvZ8x7jGn6MhAGTIq6kat3uGVrbn)
---
Last night was not just a huge victory for Republicans and President Trump, but a HISTORIC victory for the USA. Being with President Trump last night was amazing. The energy of the patriots there was unmatched. The American people have spoken, and they’re ready to make America SAFE, STRONG, PROSPEROUS, and GREAT AGAIN! I can’t wait to get to work with President Trump and my fellow Republicans. Doing this job is the honor of a lifetime, and your support allows me to do it.
---
In Service,
Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
---

name: The Collective PAC
subject: 158 endorsed candidates this cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFddeX9J9g6NmQxqXFIC1Krjaog2OBsS-Sp2lifeK2UFU4q-4XKRNgwh_LpLWwampr-WvzsBpyBqaPPbEPF71wfPQ5og53J8Fy28gWyqgNVy1HqzWjgWtdEoM50hU0v_nJDNzA9bWsMhLC9_CHji2FZgctYEJJsMdhXzKKa3PkQerABktCXZdGFMOOXNDOtA2o_peMTQDqbzq6WlAkKlWd1fOgBMcvoEnQHJMb3JhyNAwvZ0ml7RY4B9LLEfWR3Xp8rWMiKEZZLU8A0VeRhkV4t33-MvOFx-9kv6rmCDofm3cjbarysM_Cxm9b6tiEwcuDI-qfVZrIDd5a6fXClx9WAZ4689he8CbIObAX0p5HBGU3V_6Wju3nSB6UbX0-T27CTA/4b8/MRRKL_QcQDyvRatTCCr7QQ/h0/h001.4VSE3wbP0OAiGDlPZYl_HaBSZ6WIK8qIU9jfzZQF3ec)
| | Peter,

Yesterday, with your help, The Collective PAC helped achieve some of the big wins after endorsing 158 candidates this cycle (see our list of endorsed candidate wins below) — including _**DOUBLING**_ the number of Black women elected to the Senate by boosting **Lisa Blunt Rochester** and **Angela Alsobrooks** to victory and electing **Monroe Nichols** , the first Black mayor of Tulsa.

We want to say thank you for all your help this cycle, Peter. Without the support from grassroots supporters like you, we wouldn’t have been able to make such meaningful strides in building Black political power across the country and up and down the ballot.

We also want to thank Vice President Kamala Harris for her groundbreaking and historic run, where she inspired hope among Americans.

And, though the outcome of the presidential race was far from what we’d hoped, this proves we need to fight harder than ever to protect Black communities from the chaos and destruction we know to expect from a Trump administration. We know the next four years will be an uphill battle and our work does not end here.

Thank you for helping us build the resources we needed to get voters out to the polls this cycle.

— The Collective PAC

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Yesterday, with your help, The Collective PAC helped achieve some of the big wins after endorsing 158 candidates this cycle (see our list of endorsed candidate wins below) — including DOUBLING the number of Black women elected to the Senate by boosting Lisa Blunt Rochester and Angela Alsobrooks to victory and electing Monroe Nichols , the first Black mayor of Tulsa. We want to say thank you for all your help this cycle, Peter. Without the support from grassroots supporters like you, we wouldn’t have been able to make such meaningful strides in building Black political power across the country and up and down the ballot. We also want to thank Vice President Kamala Harris for her groundbreaking and historic run, where she inspired hope among Americans. And, though the outcome of the presidential race was far from what we’d hoped, this proves we need to fight harder than ever to protect Black communities from the chaos and destruction we know to expect from a Trump administration. We know the next four years will be an uphill battle and our work does not end here. Thank you for helping us build the resources we needed to get voters out to the polls this cycle. — The Collective PAC Endorsed Candidate Victories: Senate Angela Alsobrooks Lisa Blunt Rochester House Rep. Don Davis Rep. Emilia Sykes Rep. Gabe Amo Rep. Herb Conaway Rep. Jahana Hayes Rep. Jasmine Crockett Rep. LaMonica McIver Lateefa Simon Shomari Figures Rep. Shontel Brown Rep. Stacey Plaskett Rep. Summer Lee Rep. Wesley Bell Statewide Candidates Justice Kyra Harris Bolden Nick Brown Legislative Candidates Aicha Davis Aisha Dew Bryce Berry Chris Rabb Corey Paris Dante Pittman Derrick Jackson Desiree Tims Erika White Harold Pope Jr. Ismail Mohamed Kamela Smith Lauren Simmons Mekyah McQueen Meredith Lawson-Rowe Michael Carter Park Cannon Phil Robinson Quantá Crews Municipal Candidates Judge Chantelle Porter Chris Middleton Judge Erica Hughes Harold Pryor Monroe Nichols Shayla Favor | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Joyce Craig
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joyce Craig for NH
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96688144/510844661/47545062?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024_header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTM5YThhMy02MzljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7ilnD93vpll3MU6GUfVXB5qaVI4GIcCxqQ2gGjV8aU=)
---
Peter,

The election results are in, and unfortunately, they are not what we fought for.

Last night, I called Kelly Ayotte to congratulate her on her victory.

I am incredibly proud of the campaign we built together. Over the last two years, we worked tirelessly to promote a vision of New Hampshire where women’s rights are respected, communities are safe, and everyone has a chance to thrive.

Our campaign ignited grassroots enthusiasm and broke records for small dollar fundraising — proving our values have a powerful voice in New Hampshire.

This campaign has always been about more than just winning an election. It’s been about standing up for what's right, supporting our communities, and building a vision of New Hampshire that reflects the best of who we are.

To everyone who was a part of this campaign — our supporters, volunteers, friends, my campaign team, and my family — I’m incredibly grateful for your support.

We may not have gotten the results we hoped for, but I am so grateful for the campaign we built.

Thank you, Peter.

Joyce Craig
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96688145/510844662/47545062?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024_footer&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTM5YThhMy02MzljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l7ilnD93vpll3MU6GUfVXB5qaVI4GIcCxqQ2gGjV8aU=)
---

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: We can’t afford to lose another Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
Here's where things stand, Peter: Nevada’s Senate race is still
too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re
expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.

We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans
flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their
destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban.

Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly

split $10

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The Job Is NOT Finished Yet...
body:
Yesterday, I was beyond excited to cast my vote for President Donald Trump along with over 71 million other Americans! We just experienced a MIRACLE
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=16947624.9284.1.c7cf85155caac237e75764deef4d8c0e) |
---
Yesterday, I was _beyond excited_ to cast my vote for **President Donald Trump** along with over 71 million other Americans! We just experienced a **MIRACLE** of _Biblical proportions_ with the greatest political comeback in US history = the victory of President Trump last night. **However**... _the job is NOT finished yet_. **President Trump** and his team now have to appoint thousands of positions in our federal government in a very short amount of time. These positions are beyond important. Please join me in praying that **President Trump** and his transition team will have _divine wisdom_ and _discernment_ of who to appoint but just as significant... WHO NOT TO APPOINT. If I were the enemy, I would try to infiltrate those appointments to hinder President Trump's agenda from the inside. Therefore, let's pray that God will direct the transition team and the right people will be appointed to the right positions at the right time! I firmly agree with President Trump that we are about to enter into America's Golden Age. Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
## Eric Trump + Alina Habba
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=16947624.9285.1.060387eca3472bae3c683c970973eed0)
---
It was a _BLAST_ with [Eric Trump + Alina Habba](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=16947624.9286.1.42bd36730ffd103c0fdf63ba2b7772a8) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=16947624.9287.1.2a2048ecdab265f6525f33053d5399ca) in Tulsa, OK! We talked about EVERYTHING... literally EVERYTHING. ICYMI: watch it here - [https://youtube.com/live/7cZneWLgSe8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=16947624.9288.1.34fdac845bbe725f4230e00f58fc6411) You will enjoy it! **God Bless America** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---

---

| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=16947624.9290.1.7293bcc4ce9adb87de325362cc6c1081)

We discussed everything from _assassination attempts_ on **President Trump** to different _conspiracy theories_ and everything in-between. You can watch last night's event with [Donald Trump Jr](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=16947624.9293.1.911fd9601b9609e3b531e9c5b8fab103) here: [https://youtube.com/live/wTh5UGzIQsY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=16947624.9294.1.ffaaa877a7eeabac67f22ea5e0c355c7)

name: Freedom in Reproduction Maryland
subject: We did it!
body:
| Freedom in Reproduction Maryland is working to build a powerful movement to ensure a ‘YES’ vote on November's ballot initiative to guarantee reproductive freedom for everyone well into the future, no matter which politicians are in office. If you do not wish to receive emails about our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0rGbPIrizkONDcUWnUJOfQ2?unsubscribedata=pzeFQDEAQFfh9Tuq3XCPNEUa0oYK1nRMI6K165elFBeltx2coBCN%2BHOAp7InEn978kMAIi1NZ0oxG5lHXIlHYSgIOi3t%2Fm1ibkvzfDNCeoAb9fkaMre9L1GazWcbbOF2BHwnXfEiS1AcPs2J9iMBOi38NNRkWfKLqqWEdIURW5mpxC%2Fa6HJWF6blnirSNLJkSU2WKjnvpPf1%2BANVboW3g5jN%2BocC84NG%2Fq5onFTG0fahSRK%2FIAkHzF8sJOIygLIQNvFi8RZBBtFmqEOQq4d%2FpAQcQDhV8Kgf%2ByriKbZIcu3Kth8UmaOUX9K6DOp47yzwoDGcdK0BRmDzpCEuCbpnQSMrQ0gP7HHHPz58N4wxq3VR2vQH7jylpmDXbSEf%2FilhLprvDm%2BBYY2pYJFZQ31LOP8hMJqyCNiItBc748G%2FVLKEg6TPf%2BBJPcpi6AX3J%2FRO). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96688598/510846412/-1637098194?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTQ4OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIyNDk5YzEtNjQ5Yy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ycLlz4fyUOOVD31B5-I0iecSOjwshgrcgXvPNqIFgk8=&emci=a56df4ad-e99a-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=5b2499c1-649c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=13547066)
---
| _**Marylanders made history by voting YES on Question 1, officially enshrining reproductive rights into our state’s constitution.**_

This victory marks a powerful declaration for bodily autonomy and ensures that the essential freedoms to access abortion, contraception, and other reproductive health services are safeguarded in Maryland.

This win would not have been possible without supporters like you, and we’re beyond grateful for every door you knocked on, every phone call you made, and every conversation you had with family, friends, and neighbors.

But our work isn’t over yet. You made a difference here. The fight to protect and expand reproductive freedoms is ongoing, and we need to keep our momentum to ensure these rights are preserved for everyone, everywhere.

Together, we are building a legacy of empowerment, compassion, and resilience. Thank you for joining us in this historic moment and for your continued support in the journey ahead.

Onward,

Freedom in Reproduction Maryland
---

* * *
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96688599/510846413/-1637098194?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTQ4OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIyNDk5YzEtNjQ5Yy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ycLlz4fyUOOVD31B5-I0iecSOjwshgrcgXvPNqIFgk8=&emci=a56df4ad-e99a-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=5b2499c1-649c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=13547066)

name: Rob Bresnahan
subject: Thank you
body:
| | | |
---
| | | [](https://rob4pa.acemlnd.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GDHJqGe5HKt0NPGUuaf1n_SitIhk~Y0ZKI3IXah55F._Uy.yeFw5X2mmNA~lek)
---
Thank you, .
Your generosity and commitment to America is what secured a victory for PA-08, and our nation as a whole, last night.
Today, I am humbled and honored by the trust the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania have placed in me to serve as their voice in the House of Representatives.
Our race was critical in the fight for our American way of life and I couldn’t be more thrilled to celebrate this victory with you.
Now the real work begins.
Now we get to work clearing out the rot and pushing our commonsense agenda.
One that will ensure peace, prosperity, and freedom for all Americans.
You were integral to this victory, and I hope and pray that you will be integral as we work to support President Trump over the next 2 years.
Let's get to work, Rob Bresnahan PA-08
**__**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Now, my primary residence could be “seized”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
BREAKING: A federal judge is now considering...
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b7ff19aa8b4645ad8c97d9cb85651d80&_e=esFrdt74XmvnIclCl7vQN_PGmGZyxCNyBe7FqohnwIbJozWJkO7z4CzHr0kgg5M8ZjS6lCluJ6dz9H6BkgRSQR9X7BmNCEhDnnwgUv0Ix7agrCZZmHXgdX6RpWQETKa8R7vqCWznEHEQjxm1T0ISUoSyoCrSBfAegzlW0c0R9J1Srf-b6bvWBIyAg6Wr_3HPtekxG7qnLYGH6R9HCfEsz8fjvWkIohZ0M2vQrUSXTPsn8voWVtC8gMAs6Ja4PBC1lfaIfmANehwdTbdmO74gspMM9FPV3u43lf35Vcvxjz9WVJvMAfeqyJQJKX_hsPWylOzG9Ajheh45MaxvQ15M4PPnewPbUcXBeDcitHKdUYCOIQJChrzWYFFnUkYxlCbqNsbMUf3p-V5TREUKbYtUIF9gVt4NRGpZQL2C0ea7jrEVEnVOJysgo0ABsnoPxc43gIV-CSDG1iMZC7NeLJuPcg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
On October 22, a federal judge decreed that I had 7 days to hand over my home in New York - as well as my only car and sentimental keepsakes and heartfelt gifts that I collected over the span of 80 years.
---
_I thought that would be the end of the damage ..._
---
Kamala's Deep State _truly_ wants to ruin me with all they've got. They're now considering dealing one final blow to me.
---
**A judge may now order me to give up my _remaining_ home in Florida - __my primary residence.__**
---
As my lawyer inquired: _**do they truly want me homeless?**_
---
Over the last few days, we've heard ridiculous claims about President Trump being a "fascist."
---
Let me tell you what fascism is... Fascism is weaponizing the legal system to punish your political opponents. Fascism is having your home taken from you. Fascism is taking the law license away from your opponent's lawyer. Fascism is trying to turn your enemies into political prisoners.
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b7ff19aa8b4645ad8c97d9cb85651d80&_e=esFrdt74XmvnIclCl7vQN_PGmGZyxCNyBe7FqohnwIbJozWJkO7z4CzHr0kgg5M8ZjS6lCluJ6dz9H6BkgRSQR9X7BmNCEhDnnwgUv0Ix7agrCZZmHXgdX6RpWQETKa8R7vqCWznEHEQjxm1T0ISUoSyoCrSBfAegzlW0c0R9J1Srf-b6bvWBIyAg6Wr_3HPtekxG7qnLYGH6R9HCfEsz8fjvWkIohZ0M2vQrUSXTPsn8voWVtC8gMAs6Ja4PBC1lfaIfmANehwdTbdmO74gsncizYJg6t8HQxJwAer0yolQZHIIReVYqHHZbWH28PmPcDaziJWK9Sjn8ak5Q-ejzoXu9JOJKK_Ta1QIiuWrSQ_I5ZmBDlyuIlsNuR1uS9S73euOXPP-fTOWTfFhdjKPqh0PcFopf_rmoMqod68nCRdw3WTnCOiJ4zZz54tjMcsx)
---
_**I am _living through_ the Democrats' fascism right now.** _
---
I sincerely pray that freedom, justice, and the truth prevail - or the damage done to me will spread like wildfire to the rest of our great Republic.
---
**But, as I wrote to you in an earlier letter, the Bible reminds us that our earthly possessions will always fade, but greater "heavenly treasures" await us.**
---
_The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than a car or a home. Possessions come and go, but I could _NEVER SURRENDER_ my fight for freedom and for what I know to be _true.__
---
I would be tone deaf if I didn't acknowledge that times are tough right now for _all_ Americans, not just me, so please stop reading here if you cannot give at this time.
---
_But funding my Legal Defense Trust is my last remaining hope of fighting for my freedom and for the liberty and justice of all Americans._
---

clean_body: BREAKING: A federal judge is now considering... | Dear Peter, On October 22, a federal judge decreed that I had 7 days to hand over my home in New York - as well as my only car and sentimental keepsakes and heartfelt gifts that I collected over the span of 80 years. I thought that would be the end of the damage ... Kamala's Deep State truly wants to ruin me with all they've got. They're now considering dealing one final blow to me. A judge may now order me to give up my remaining home in Florida - my primary residence. As my lawyer inquired: do they truly want me homeless? Over the last few days, we've heard ridiculous claims about President Trump being a "fascist." Let me tell you what fascism is... Fascism is weaponizing the legal system to punish your political opponents. Fascism is having your home taken from you. Fascism is taking the law license away from your opponent's lawyer. Fascism is trying to turn your enemies into political prisoners. I am living through the Democrats' fascism right now. I sincerely pray that freedom, justice, and the truth prevail - or the damage done to me will spread like wildfire to the rest of our great Republic. But, as I wrote to you in an earlier letter, the Bible reminds us that our earthly possessions will always fade, but greater "heavenly treasures" await us. The pursuit of truth, freedom, and justice are worth infinitely more than a car or a home. Possessions come and go, but I could NEVER SURRENDER my fight for freedom and for what I know to be true. I would be tone deaf if I didn't acknowledge that times are tough right now for all Americans, not just me, so please stop reading here if you cannot give at this time. But funding my Legal Defense Trust is my last remaining hope of fighting for my freedom and for the liberty and justice of all Americans. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

Hey Friend —
By now you’ve probably heard that Donald Trump has retaken the White House. And we're not going to lie, this is a serious blow to our democracy.
You might be angry.
You might be scared.
You might not know what comes next.
However, this loss isn’t going to stop us from fighting for our rights. The fight for our future is still ongoing.
We can’t allow our focus on protecting our rights and future to be distracted. Right now, Trump and his cronies are working hard to divide us. They want us to scapegoat immigrants, Black and Brown communities, and so many others.
_But we have to stand together._
Young voters are STILL the largest, most diverse voting bloc in the nation. Together, we make up one-fifth of the electorate. Together, we are still powerful. Together, we can still make a difference.
Today, we reaffirm our commitment to amplifying the needs of young voters and defending our most vulnerable communities.
**Tomorrow, the fight continues.**

clean_body: Mourn today. Fight tomorrow. | Hey Friend — By now you’ve probably heard that Donald Trump has retaken the White House. And we're not going to lie, this is a serious blow to our democracy. You might be angry. You might be scared. You might not know what comes next. However, this loss isn’t going to stop us from fighting for our rights. The fight for our future is still ongoing. We can’t allow our focus on protecting our rights and future to be distracted. Right now, Trump and his cronies are working hard to divide us. They want us to scapegoat immigrants, Black and Brown communities, and so many others. But we have to stand together. Young voters are STILL the largest, most diverse voting bloc in the nation. Together, we make up one-fifth of the electorate. Together, we are still powerful. Together, we can still make a difference. Today, we reaffirm our commitment to amplifying the needs of young voters and defending our most vulnerable communities. Tomorrow, the fight continues. | Together, Tzintzún Ramirez President & Executive Director NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | |

# [The Reckoning](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151282070&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjgyMDcwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzA5MTUzMzQsImV4cCI6MTczMzUwNzMzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BYnKzwQfk2OhR9mx-5TYe7k48vf5rChAONembRO0fGA)
### Shame on America
Nov 6
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151282070&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjgyMDcwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMDkxNTMzNCwiZXhwIjoxNzMzNTA3MzM0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.wcYMyMXaAPAN_ikfXRO41RT0DoDy8u2VPRR8Padi6S0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151282070&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjgyMDcwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzA5MTUzMzQsImV4cCI6MTczMzUwNzMzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BYnKzwQfk2OhR9mx-5TYe7k48vf5rChAONembRO0fGA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=151282070&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxMjgyMDcwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzA5MTUzMzQsImV4cCI6MTczMzUwNzMzNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.BYnKzwQfk2OhR9mx-5TYe7k48vf5rChAONembRO0fGA)
---
| | [](https://substack..IJ4QA1OnBNds3I9KOAEY_UzWRCB7AsB6hxBSVIMqOxM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/the-reckoning?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
I thought the election would be razor-thin, but that Harris would ultimately come out on top.
We know that every accusation from MAGA is a confession. Reality Winner spent four years of her life in prison for sharing intelligence detailing how Russia hacked voting machines in 2016. Was this a "free and fair" election? Do you trust we'll ever have a "free and fair" election again?
There is blame to go around, surely. The media ecosystem should bear the brunt of that.
The white male rage bolstered by the new media ecosystem has taken control. Come January, there will be a reckoning.
I know I said I wouldn't do this again. That's not who I am and that's not why you follow me or listen to me, and you probably knew that as soon as you read it.
What I was really doing was begging you not to force me to keep fighting. Not to force Alexander Vindman to keep fighting. To not force the people who have spent years fighting fascism to have to _keep fighting it_.
I'll likely be spending the next few days going over the data and sharing my analysis of how things went wrong this election.
But right now I want to share with you what happened at work this morning.
I float between four or five different offices in Maryland, partnering with local non-profits who work with underserved communities - mostly immigrants - on climate change education and research
This morning, the founder of the agency I work at on Wednesdays came in to speak with the larger-than-usual crowd waiting at the center.
He explained what the organization's goals would be, their plan to start a public education campaign to make sure immigrants know their rights "when they start knocking on your doors," and asked others to share how they felt.
Some were optimistic.
"We have to be strong. We have to make a better future together, walking together," said one man from Algeria who came to America during COVID to work in the medical field.
Others were scared.
"It's going to be difficult for many of us, because the current President did a lot to help us, and Trump is probably going to eliminate that. Before, many occasions of immigrant officers coming to your home and arresting people -- even people who are documented," said another.
"Yesterday made it very clear that we don't have enough power to elect somebody who will protect us and work with us," said another.
Most of the people here have been in the United States since before Trump's racist "birthergate" entry into politics. They're here legally and are going through the process of obtaining citizenship.
Their entire futures just became question marks shrouded in fear and uncertainty.
You did that, America.
You had the choice to deport Jose, who's paying more in income tax than Trump ever has, and force 10-year-old Mary to give birth to her rapist step-father's offspring... or to vote for a better economy, a sustainable future and human rights.
You picked deportation and child rape babies.
