**THIS IS INSANE. ** This week, Meta/Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg published a letter admitting the Biden-Harris administration pressured Facebook to censor content they didn’t like, **and wait till you see what was included. ** Here’s the letter from Mark Zuckerberg:
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfb78ddbbd884fc88c6bf4e3ec9fcc02&_e=6zClyzyFDIcqssWCm-s7V7EilQFtJLm8nfLTVFRJ16aI0SyGCiAdUp1PSLuQkgRrssANHEz20RzC_b_KoJ2yJQzBFvTu9UjvNrDzNWn_JlaEAU4noe_3ctk7Spni6KxEJnF78KwYuNVx2lhijyz6D_XO_eQ-bzGLanlDq_YmfNrT-gePuzCUAVQQn76V_Psa_hV_SzwTiMClo3GYSSa8oc_cE0-vtnMf_495EW2qfpErIxqwbArpB0NON0U2bmdQQASo-W8eo0tl_ceepAl4wg%3D%3D)
---
**Included in the content that the government pressured Facebook to take down was “humor and satire.”**
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfb78ddbbd884fc88c6bf4e3ec9fcc02&_e=6zClyzyFDIcqssWCm-s7V7EilQFtJLm8nfLTVFRJ16aI0SyGCiAdUp1PSLuQkgRrssANHEz20RzC_b_KoJ2yJQzBFvTu9UjvNrDzNWn_JlaEAU4noe_3ctk7Spni6KxEMx56ui1wjNAn5u2e9dRKyWiiHI6zlrxArDtkQMbHnRqBnC1KrIAR-vCKWsE82BI1dXwp2LyVA4RT4HhrfklS0071SUlq2fYvZubCoyCzw1ttIeLFGVkQ_N-srfNa4lBIzs7HJTlYYWt5FLK5hEaHdg%3D%3D)
---
**Do you think maybe the most popular satire site in the world, which relentlessly made fun of the COVID narrative, was in the crosshairs? ** Over the last four years, we’ve seen our engagement on Facebook get inexplicably squashed. We often heard from fans that they could no longer see our content. We even heard from a few that they were locked out of their accounts and penalized for even sharing Babylon Bee jokes. It’s not hard to draw the conclusion that the satire Zuckerberg was targeting included us. **These relentless attacks on our right to tell jokes that question the narrative are exactly why we depend on our subscribers for support.** We can’t count on revenue from Big Tech. **[We rely on you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfb78ddbbd884fc88c6bf4e3ec9fcc02&_e=6zClyzyFDIcqssWCm-s7V7EilQFtJLm8nfLTVFRJ16aI0SyGCiAdUp1PSLuQkgRrssANHEz20RzC_b_KoJ2yJQzBFvTu9UjvNrDzNWn_JlaEAU4noe_3ctk7Spni6KxE9J8L1l10-IKRs5Q9RmrQuSQNOekh4OlyJPSX-LSWaSwLNGnRuRCcPEzrJQgjGxvLk4xLApxPi1kKrJ_ZX5YwzwLL51FspIaEVCOyzqpI0uw7ig4YAhzRM1SnTZrH5400Vtlgtuz2eOrhQJeGP2o6tQ%3D%3D)** **[**Would you become a subscriber to The Babylon Bee and help keep us on the internet?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bfb78ddbbd884fc88c6bf4e3ec9fcc02&_e=6zClyzyFDIcqssWCm-s7V7EilQFtJLm8nfLTVFRJ16aI0SyGCiAdUp1PSLuQkgRrssANHEz20RzC_b_KoJ2yJQzBFvTu9UjvNrDzNWn_JlaEAU4noe_3ctk7Spni6KxEh2wZmk8U0dsHUcBKFrpGxlYzfTGMkBQrJdWvhoSJnASnyIbvso_b_qTLCfjhfhcP2lxPGxQYwjP5PInqiazHJkxbE00LFKmY8ZznjFklf8QV-riHlKHG6IXzlrBHHIZxAwhv9W39XGHqOiK2ztXDig%3D%3D)**

name: Laura Friedman
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96699681/510888392/158001685?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzM5ZDk2YTgtOGE5Yy1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAwZDNhOThmYTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4USTijd7rMVsPjG5MXnY-WtdlnIdjBDJLll23eqEGSU=) We did it, team! **Election results are in, and I am excited to share that I have won the race for California’s 30th Congressional District!** I want to thank each of you for your support for my campaign, and express how grateful I am for this grassroots team. With your help, we have made history electing the first woman ever to represent this district. I am also so grateful for the support of my community. I know many of us, myself included, are extremely disappointed at the results at the top of the ticket. But if I’ve learned anything in my career in public service, it’s that action is the best antidote to anxiety. There's a lot of work ahead of us, and it starts now. I promise that I will serve Los Angeles, California, and our country to the very best of my ability. I will listen to all voices and try to do the most good for the greatest number of people. I look forward to our continued partnership. Thank you, Laura

clean_body: | = We did it, team! Election results are in, and I am excited to share that I have won the race for California’s 30th Congressional District! I want to thank each of you for your support for my campaign, and express how grateful I am for this grassroots team. With your help, we have made history electing the first woman ever to represent this district. I am also so grateful for the support of my community. I know many of us, myself included, are extremely disappointed at the results at the top of the ticket. But if I’ve learned anything in my career in public service, it’s that action is the best antidote to anxiety. There's a lot of work ahead of us, and it starts now. I promise that I will serve Los Angeles, California, and our country to the very best of my ability. I will listen to all voices and try to do the most good for the greatest number of people. I look forward to our continued partnership. Thank you, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Chris Deluzio
subject: America is worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://chrisforpa.com/ [https://chrisforpa.com/] Derek,

I want to thank the good people of Western PA for once again trusting me to represent all of us in Congress. It is the honor of my lifetime.

Last night, my opponent Rob Mercuri offered a gracious and patriotic concession, and I commend him for a spirited campaign.

No matter what, in every day and in every decision, I will always put the good people of Western PA and this country first.

Today was hard for so many, and the results of the presidential election were not what we were hoping for.

But here’s one thing I want to make clear: I was willing to risk my life for this country because America was worth fighting for. It still is.

Today, and every day, we continue the fight for America.

Thank you again,

Chris
Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@chrisforpa.com to your address book. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/z5DxLUzOH0Cbr-Ed1epOKA2?unsubscribedata=lV0pyG7GzSM5apBwCHH%2BAH1%2FUb3G2v7hxiWx%2F7cFyjuG0AahAYJRHZ9CzcN5aH%2BAsgD8kTNCfeloILpxGkeEhpDN5EeC60sa0naZxf0dXDJhQBsmSrYMY1otlfTGaH28Tw%2B19MEfuJz9gBlTEIaXMDBG9Yc3S4Y8v8gqNNnGHeplis7Pf%2FrvCe4P6m3WdIsEcmc79sr76Hqx3H%2F6CPsOH%2FrgHyHEMNR7qy%2B%2BUQl73GYvXKo7v%2BuYQDBh8aJ3tYo1%2FkFt5k6HdPYmKvlWr178vFwptDZxjRQrFz%2FuJsa1mi4s%2FSEKoEOtdkd0SCwql3P7%2Bdxi%2BJJxICLePCHAdlR13BDzLwuwUFut26gYeWEuBgHjobDL1KJn%2FQUZJZFWT8TSsr26i3kHdt0XniO7TEYbfJzJWgAoGbXlmbAyGEJXntGHGynenNjuHBO3WokW4QUU .

body:
| | | [](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=2bcd16002f664793a9dadcfc19047d1e&_e=qSWkBx310VtEBc_hAfvvrwK_JwpJxAIPY-9U6MvHiNGgOJchDEcZzElbMmZuz1MiALEKO5ulEKxyCi4ClpPRDwxUJMQtdJxKPerTwgeUwxVaFvN2UNhQTJjUYeMaB5fDXmj-4zxPVlnl6XuqtqK6n-yngOStzAMYGNNMxYHlu9bUz2HU9z0eGL_ow1e-n6SD1sosStYALJ_um1Sc3NKjBkrPG8L1YlvvHDc3oH9Odl8tA-HinfroZEl9Wr6YzevrVPd36GRUEZBNrpJpJR8bSoWXV4CkmTmdgxU2C350KsXi28wrgk90iJm58tYsrt5rYe3raS6K_5jV1aLp40_2zBSTV_AzrueJQjLoc0BDydKJX4fTT3FBjveq0RK8GC4GUPFzl7_sZCC2Xc0oIUm06t8xQXwlK9RWV1DkeNSGvtet2eOiUDhLf-d9KJ3klZd1) Here's where things stand, Peter: **Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes.** We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: **[Please, will you split $25 now – or whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Defeat Boebert PAC to show the huge wave of support we need to keep Nevada blue?](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=2bcd16002f664793a9dadcfc19047d1e&_e=qSWkBx310VtEBc_hAfvvrwK_JwpJxAIPY-9U6MvHiNGgOJchDEcZzElbMmZuz1MiALEKO5ulEKxyCi4ClpPRDwxUJMQtdJxKPerTwgeUwxVaFvN2UNhQTJjUYeMaB5fDXmj-4zxPVlnl6XuqtqK6n-yngOStzAMYGNNMxYHlu9bUz2HU9z0eGL_ow1e-n6SD1sosStYALJ_um1Sc3NKjBkrPG8L1YlvvHDc3oH9Odl8tA-HinfroZEl9Wr6YzevrVPd36GRUEZBNrpJpJR8bSoWXV4CkmTmdgxU2C350KsW72PlvkWb1x34LcdqXUVSQb3wDjY0sFaG6JNvbRkjdIkisRjqmmgNCWIlFT0wxOCyGkBsuiOvjqn-DBJtYyQkVrqH5vykiJvmL3leGla8jCaSWKme75cNgjzdWVsvuC2SnEMM-t8JWVG3dzL96Ee09)** **[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.defeatboebertpac.com/u/click?_t=c3d87ac674644038b5146447a156028d&_m=2bcd16002f664793a9dadcfc19047d1e&_e=qSWkBx310VtEBc_hAfvvrwK_JwpJxAIPY-9U6MvHiNGgOJchDEcZzElbMmZuz1MiALEKO5ulEKxyCi4ClpPRDwxUJMQtdJxKPerTwgeUwxVaFvN2UNhQTJjUYeMaB5fDXmj-4zxPVlnl6XuqtqK6n-yngOStzAMYGNNMxYHlu9bUz2HU9z0eGL_ow1e-n6SD1sosStYALJ_um1Sc3NKjBkrPG8L1YlvvHDc3oH9Odl8tA-HinfroZEl9Wr6YzevrmmFaBHXEBujzpGxhNtRfgek9b3K3enH1ITaclFe5EkLUS-4Oj2ZAWz33jF0Y7u5MqqlBARRX13gGp-QzGGWeFTgIPAFe5tNQQSBu0o-88BxEwcW6yXpKuHVyB5P4HuVf7P9npGc5bfdLw81tAS1BsBOqpOtoMvILQKtCz2iFmUk%3D)** We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. clean_body: | | | Here's where things stand, Peter: Nevada’s Senate race is still too close to call – which means our work isn’t done yet. And we’re expecting my race to come down to a handful of votes. We cannot afford to lose a single additional Senate seat. If Republicans flip Nevada red, they’ll have even more power to plow through with their destructive agenda – including passing a nationwide abortion ban. Winning is going to require ensuring that every last vote gets properly counted. So today, I need to make the most important ask I've ever made of you: We laid it all on the line to counter their attacks and turn Nevada blue. In order to do that, we had to spend every last dollar we had just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Our work isn’t done until every vote in Nevada is counted. But today, we’re starting all over again from scratch, which is why we’ve set an emergency goal to raise $500,000. And now, the stakes are higher than ever – we absolutely need to reach this goal to win. So please, Peter, I'm counting on you to come through in the most pivotal moment: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you so much. Jacky Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Our work mattered, and this is not the end of this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96699963/510889251/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzIxZTMyNS04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQLAGWTC4czecwx46_PWCF-or5tHPG9pEoeQ9xviEYk=)
---
Hey Peter, Last night stung. I know we all worked so hard and gave our whole selves to winning the White House and building a better America. The selflessness, energy, and hope I’ve seen over the past several weeks reflected the very best of North Carolina — and to see it end like this is heartbreaking. But hear me: **Our work mattered, and this is not the end of this fight.** Because of our work, North Carolina chose Josh Stein as Governor, Jeff Jackson as Attorney General, Rachel Hunt as Lieutenant Governor, and Mo Green and Elaine Marshall for the Council of State. Because of our work, the Republican supermajority in Raleigh has been broken; their ability to ram through extreme veto-proof bills is no more. Because of our work, Don Davis will hold North Carolina’s last swing seat in Congress, preserving Democrats’ path, albeit narrow, towards flipping the House of Representatives. What we did mattered, even if it doesn’t feel that way right now. North Carolina is in position to fight the worst excesses of a second Trump Administration because we stood up, fought back, and won key races up and down the ballot. If you need a little time before you get back in this fight, that’s OK. Right now, what’s most important is taking care of ourselves and each other. But soon enough, we’ll need to dust ourselves off and get ready to fight again. **We can’t let Donald Trump’s 2025 agenda go unanswered or unopposed, and in 2026, we have the opportunity to help take back the US Senate by flipping a seat here in North Carolina.** That’s what I’ll be working towards next. That is what’s keeping me going. Our democracy is in danger, but it’s still standing — and it’ll stay standing as long as there are enough of us willing to fight for it. Thanks for standing and fighting with me. More to come soon. — Wiley
North Carolina Democrats won five key statewide races in 2024, and in 2026, we can help stymie Trump’s agenda by taking back the Senate and House. **If you’re looking for a way to make a difference right now, please consider chipping in to prepare for the fights ahead.** [**Your donation will fund organizing, infrastructure, and other things NC Democrats need to fight Trump and win in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96699964/510889259/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzIxZTMyNS04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQLAGWTC4czecwx46_PWCF-or5tHPG9pEoeQ9xviEYk=) | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96699965/510889266/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20241106_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzIxZTMyNS04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQLAGWTC4czecwx46_PWCF-or5tHPG9pEoeQ9xviEYk=)**

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: We’re still fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marie for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

**First, I want to thank each and every one of you who have stepped up and supported our campaign. Whether you donated, volunteered, or even just read one of these emails – it all makes a huge difference.**

Together, we’ve built an incredible movement committed to keeping extremism out of Southwest Washington, and giving rural communities and working families a voice in Congress. It’s been a tough fight – and it’s not over just yet.

There are still a lot more votes to be counted and we may not know the final outcome for several days. _Here in WA-03, voters are poised to reject dangerous extremism – but with the House majority still undecided, it’s likely that our race could decide control of Congress._

**Right now, we’re facing the real possibility that this race will remain too close to call, even after more votes are counted. That means we’ll need serious resources to ensure every voice is heard.**

[Will you make a $10 contribution today to our Campaign Defense Fund to help us finish this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700066/510889700/1892105723?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_241106_1_1&refcode2=26c3d76f-8b9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmMzZDc2Zi04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTgeWA9biiSygbXABcXwVaI8fuH4BCAvudPKvOHEnZo=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $10 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700067/510889701/1892105723?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_241106_1_1&refcode2=26c3d76f-8b9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmMzZDc2Zi04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xTgeWA9biiSygbXABcXwVaI8fuH4BCAvudPKvOHEnZo=)**

clean_body: | | Peter, First, I want to thank each and every one of you who have stepped up and supported our campaign. Whether you donated, volunteered, or even just read one of these emails – it all makes a huge difference. Together, we’ve built an incredible movement committed to keeping extremism out of Southwest Washington, and giving rural communities and working families a voice in Congress. It’s been a tough fight – and it’s not over just yet. There are still a lot more votes to be counted and we may not know the final outcome for several days. Here in WA-03, voters are poised to reject dangerous extremism – but with the House majority still undecided, it’s likely that our race could decide control of Congress. Right now, we’re facing the real possibility that this race will remain too close to call, even after more votes are counted. That means we’ll need serious resources to ensure every voice is heard. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for everything. name: George Whitesides
subject: Our race is too close to call.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700114/510889936/-613562098?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODY4NWJmYS04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIqWc_c0KhiPMZJcIM2y4puZ-gZm5i1xnp2zzcDeaJM=)
**The race for CA-27 is too close to call, while control of the U.S. House is still in limbo.** Peter,

Polls are closed and ballots are now being counted in the race CA-27. While we await further results, I want to take a moment to say**thank you.**

You made this campaign possible, and we are still on the cusp of making history in this race. But it’s not over yet, Peter.

**The first batch of ballots have been counted, and we currently trail by just over 2% with tens of thousands of votes left to count. It’s too close to call.**

There is still a path to take control of the House as later ballots are predicted to break toward Democrats, but after pouring every dollar into flipping this seat, we're starting over with zero cash in our account.

**[We need to raise $20,000 in the next 24 hours to prepare for a potential recount. Will you chip in $3 now? This is urgent.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700116/510889938/-613562098?refcode=em-11.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODY4NWJmYS04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIqWc_c0KhiPMZJcIM2y4puZ-gZm5i1xnp2zzcDeaJM=)**
| ****[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700118/510889940/-613562098?refcode=em-11.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODY4NWJmYS04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIqWc_c0KhiPMZJcIM2y4puZ-gZm5i1xnp2zzcDeaJM=)****
---

We can still win this race.

Tens of thousands of ballots remain to be counted, and as a reminder, CA-27 has been decided by just a _few hundred votes_ in past elections.

I know the results at the top of the ticket and in the Senate were disappointing. And I know you've worked so hard, and that it’s been a taxing election cycle. But a recount is looking likely, and the expense associated with that will fall directly on our shoulders.

Our campaign account is empty, and if we're going to ensure every last ballot is counted fairly and accurately, Democrats everywhere need to step up -- right now.

**[Please help us raise $20,000 in the next 24 hours to prepare for a potential recount. Rush in an urgent $3 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700120/510889942/-613562098?refcode=em-11.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODY4NWJmYS04YjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IIqWc_c0KhiPMZJcIM2y4puZ-gZm5i1xnp2zzcDeaJM=)**

clean_body: | = The race for CA-27 is too close to call, while control of the U.S. House is still in limbo. Peter, Polls are closed and ballots are now being counted in the race CA-27. While we await further results, I want to take a moment to saythank you. You made this campaign possible, and we are still on the cusp of making history in this race. But it’s not over yet, Peter. The first batch of ballots have been counted, and we currently trail by just over 2% with tens of thousands of votes left to count. It’s too close to call. There is still a path to take control of the House as later ballots are predicted to break toward Democrats, but after pouring every dollar into flipping this seat, we're starting over with zero cash in our account. = | **= We can still win this race. Tens of thousands of ballots remain to be counted, and as a reminder, CA-27 has been decided by just a few hundred votes in past elections. I know the results at the top of the ticket and in the Senate were disappointing. And I know you've worked so hard, and that it’s been a taxing election cycle. But a recount is looking likely, and the expense associated with that will fall directly on our shoulders. Our campaign account is empty, and if we're going to ensure every last ballot is counted fairly and accurately, Democrats everywhere need to step up -- right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Thank You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
Congressman-Elect Ryan Mackenzie | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | **THANK YOU!**
It has been a hard-fought campaign to bring the change we need to the Greater Lehigh Valley and I am proud to say that, because of your support, we were able to secure victory.
I’m incredibly proud of the campaign that we ran, and I’m grateful to each and every one of you who put in the work on our behalf. Because of you, our team overcame the long odds of defeating an incumbent, defied the polls, and sent a clear message to Washington: we want change! Thank you to all of those who worked alongside us in this fight, and thank you to the people of the 7th district for giving me the opportunity to represent them.
Now we turn to delivering results for the people of the Greater Lehigh Valley. I’m looking forward to taking up the charge on the issues that our communities are concerned about: tackling the high cost of living, securing the border, protecting Social Security, and working towards peace abroad. This is a challenge I look forward to, and a challenge from which I will not shrink.
**YARD SIGN COLLECTION INSTRUCTIONS**
With the election behind us, it’s time to clean up. If you are able to collect any yard signs that you spot on public property, we would greatly appreciate it. Signs can be returned to any of the offices listed below at your convenience. If you currently have a sign on your property, please feel free to keep it for future use. If you would like to return it, please contact Sara Baran (contact info below).
Mackenzie HQ- 1125 S Cedar Crest Allentown PA (bottom floor) Sara Baran: (484) 860- 5989
Lehigh County Republican Committee: 3055 College Heights Blvd. Allentown, PA 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM
Northampton County Republican Committee: 2523 Willow Park Rd. Bethlehem, PA
Thank you again for your trust and support. I am excited to get to work on your behalf and the behalf of everyone in the Greater Lehigh Valley.
Ryan
---
|
---

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: Update from EMILYs List
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96700467/510891123/-784138815?refcode=WTENEW38_JMUpdate_PL_v2&sourceid=1055424&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjAxODQ2Zi04ZDljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bz-egqYJjHLZSaRXKU1vfjxvDYGICK-n1L0iMOq5mQI=&emci=1c39ec39-869c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=9f01846f-8d9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=5177934) To the EMILYs List Community —

Going into this election, the polls predicted an historically close race. Now that the results are in, it's clear that our country is painfully divided. In a devastating setback, Donald Trump has once again been elected president.

Like you, I wanted to believe that the American people would choose to turn the page on the chaos and division that Donald Trump has wrought. I wanted to believe that his campaign of hate and disinformation would fail. I wanted to believe that, together, we would begin to chart a new path forward.

From the beginning, we have been clear about the stakes in this election. The threat to our fundamental freedoms, including democracy and abortion rights, is real — and we must continue to fight for them. I know that this fight will be led by the courageous Democratic pro-choice women who won their elections this week, and who will be the fiercest and most determined advocates for the American people in the months ahead. After all, and across time, it has been women at the forefront of some of the toughest fights humanity has ever faced.

While we await results in several races and to learn the outcome in the House, I'm grateful to all of the Democratic pro-choice women who put their name on the ballot across the country, like Senator Tammy Baldwin (WI) and Senators-elect Angela Alsobrooks (MD), Lisa Blunt Rochester (DE), and Elissa Slotkin (MI), who won their races. Over the past eight years, we've also made tremendous progress in the states, including last night when we expanded the Democratic majority on the Michigan Supreme Court and broke the Republican supermajority in the North Carolina state House.

We will continue to share updates with you as we get more information. For now, it's too early to make firm conclusions about exactly how specific voting blocs behaved and what drove last night's terrible result, but it is clear that voters were extraordinarily dissatisfied with the status quo. We are in the field now with a large post-election survey and will be digging deep into what went wrong. I do firmly believe that the wins we did have down ballot (and there are some really important ones to note), were driven by reproductive freedom.

I am also profoundly grateful to Vice President Kamala Harris for stepping up to lead and running an incredible campaign in just 13 weeks. She faced significant headwinds in addition to a candidate willing to lie and divide in order to win.

Finally, I'm grateful to you for always believing that a better future is possible, and for investing your time and resources into making it a reality. For nearly 40 years, EMILYs List has fought against all odds to prove that women can run, women can win, and women can lead. That fight continues. In difficult times, the EMILYs List community has always been a source of comfort and a fount of strength. I'm counting on that now, and I hope you know you can count on us too.

With determination,

Jessica

Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
President, EMILYs List EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. clean_body: | To the EMILYs List Community — Going into this election, the polls predicted an historically close race. Now that the results are in, it's clear that our country is painfully divided. In a devastating setback, Donald Trump has once again been elected president. Like you, I wanted to believe that the American people would choose to turn the page on the chaos and division that Donald Trump has wrought. I wanted to believe that his campaign of hate and disinformation would fail. I wanted to believe that, together, we would begin to chart a new path forward. From the beginning, we have been clear about the stakes in this election. The threat to our fundamental freedoms, including democracy and abortion rights, is real — and we must continue to fight for them. I know that this fight will be led by the courageous Democratic pro-choice women who won their elections this week, and who will be the fiercest and most determined advocates for the American people in the months ahead. After all, and across time, it has been women at the forefront of some of the toughest fights humanity has ever faced. While we await results in several races and to learn the outcome in the House, I'm grateful to all of the Democratic pro-choice women who put their name on the ballot across the country, like Senator Tammy Baldwin (WI) and Senators-elect Angela Alsobrooks (MD), Lisa Blunt Rochester (DE), and Elissa Slotkin (MI), who won their races. Over the past eight years, we've also made tremendous progress in the states, including last night when we expanded the Democratic majority on the Michigan Supreme Court and broke the Republican supermajority in the North Carolina state House. We will continue to share updates with you as we get more information. For now, it's too early to make firm conclusions about exactly how specific voting blocs behaved and what drove last night's terrible result, but it is clear that voters were extraordinarily dissatisfied with the status quo. We are in the field now with a large post-election survey and will be digging deep into what went wrong. I do firmly believe that the wins we did have down ballot (and there are some really important ones to note), were driven by reproductive freedom. I am also profoundly grateful to Vice President Kamala Harris for stepping up to lead and running an incredible campaign in just 13 weeks. She faced significant headwinds in addition to a candidate willing to lie and divide in order to win. Finally, I'm grateful to you for always believing that a better future is possible, and for investing your time and resources into making it a reality. For nearly 40 years, EMILYs List has fought against all odds to prove that women can run, women can win, and women can lead. That fight continues. In difficult times, the EMILYs List community has always been a source of comfort and a fount of strength. I'm counting on that now, and I hope you know you can count on us too. With determination, Jessica Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. name: Tara Johnson
subject: Tara & 96th Assembly Results
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TARA FOR WISCONSIN
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/108061/images/Email%20Images%20-%20October%2028%20%281%29.png]
Hi Friends,
We won.
Thank you for being an important part of Team Tara and for helping get us across the finish line with a victory! Our win ends a 73 year drought of Democratic representation in Madison for the 96th Assembly District and means I will join at least 44 others in our growing caucus - so exciting!
Eight months ago, we started on this journey together. And, together we have knocked on thousands of doors, traveled many, many picturesque miles to visit voters in every corner of the 96th and attended countless events throughout our new, beautiful district including parades, ice cream socials, farmers markets, forums and so much more! You have been with me every step of the way and I am deeply grateful for all of your support, hard work and encouragement. Campaigns are team endeavors and I could not be more proud of all of us. Congratulations and thank you Team Tara!
Here’s my official statement on our victory: https://www.wispolitics.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Tara-Johnson-2024-Election-Release.pdf [https://www.wispolitics.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Tara-Johnson-2024-Election-Release.pdf]
Forward,
Tara Johnson
Representative Elect for the 96th Assembly District
https://www.facebook.com/Tara4Assembly [https://www.facebook.com/Tara4Assembly] https://www.taraforwisconsin.com/ [https://www.taraforwisconsin.com/]
PAID FOR BY TARA FOR WISCONSIN
Tara for Wisconsin
PO Box 260
Stoddard, WI 54658
United States

###
Tara Johnson has spent more than 30 years bringing people together to tackle some of her community’s most challenging and urgent issues. Tara is now running against a MAGA Republican incumbent in a district that hasn't been represented by a Democrat in decades. Now with fair maps, he has lost his gerrymander protection and holds one of the must win , flippable 15 seats we need to turn Wisconsin and the Assembly blue!

name: Sarah Elfreth
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
I am deeply humbled by and grateful for this opportunity to represent Maryland’s 3rd District in Congress!

| I am deeply humbled by and grateful for this opportunity to represent Maryland’s 3rd District in Congress!

When we started this journey a year ago, I was determined not to wake up the morning after election day, wishing I had done more. It was quite a thing yesterday morning to vote for women up and down the ballot. It proves that while progress isn’t promised, it is possible.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700648/510891910/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZTIzMi04ZjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r1HSa84Ho1_KIi8OqRY-cv_ZHOB_NbH_SokzOGxZ8_g=&emci=f50a3c42-6f9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=1ccfe232-8f9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=30237190)
I ran on the basic premise that we can’t complain about the chaos of Washington and not be willing to be a part of the solution. We bet on the idea that people wanted to be represented by someone who knew how to bring people together. Who knows how to solve big problems. Who put people above politics.

I ran because I truly believe that just like doctors have a Hippocratic oath to do no harm, elected officials need to have one that says simply: do not divide.

We believed that if we could bring people together – that if people could reflect on their “whys” of what motivates them to be and stay engaged – we could make a meaningful difference. The “whys” of curbing gun violence, ensuring abortion access, standing up for democracy, fighting climate change, and so many more critical issues important to families across our community matter. Our “whys” will not change by who is elected: I promise that they will fuel us during setbacks and will push us forward during victories.

We ran on the idea that a rising tide can – and should lift all ships – which is why I’m particularly proud of the truly coordinated campaign that we’ve run alongside Senator-Elect Angela Alsobrooks and our incredible Board of Education candidates.

Progress isn’t promised – but it is possible.

Like many of you, I woke up this morning feeling angry, frustrated, and anxious. I’m not going to tell you not to feel that way. And while my heart is broken that Vice President Harris did not win, I’m proud of the race she ran, the values she championed, and our commitment to accepting the results of this election.

There are also many more votes that need to be counted before control of the House of Representatives is determined. I am grateful that our Framers saw fit to create a system of necessary checks and balances – and that Congress, the People’s House, is prioritized in Article I of our Constitution. I am optimistic that, when every vote is counted, I will be entering into a House with a Democratic majority. And that means much, much more work ahead.

While those votes are being counted, I’ll leave you with two final thoughts:

First: Despite the dark day nationally, we have a lot to celebrate in Maryland. For the first time in 8 years, we are sending women back to represent us in Washington. Question 1, enshrining that abortion decisions are made between women and their doctors, passed overwhelmingly with 76% of the vote. And decent, compassionate, pro-public education candidates won in Board of Education races in Anne Arundel and Howard Counties.

Second: Thank you. My heart is full that you have put your trust in me to be your voice in the House of Representatives. Candidates can’t do this on our own - in fact, we can do very little on our own. Thank you to everyone who leaned in during this election cycle. Thank you to my incredible team, to my family, and to my partner Eric. All of you know that nothing is given, it has to be earned.

Progress isn’t promised – but it is possible. And it’s possible because of each and every one of you.

In solidarity,

Sarah Elfreth

* * *
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700649/510891911/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2NmZTIzMi04ZjljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r1HSa84Ho1_KIi8OqRY-cv_ZHOB_NbH_SokzOGxZ8_g=&emci=f50a3c42-6f9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=1ccfe232-8f9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=30237190)

---

Annapolis, MD 21403
United States

Hi Friend, Today, I am delighted to extend my personal invitation for you to take our brand-new free online course, _**[The Gospel of John.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=26b18415bf764f75b58f20007e2fa8f8&_e=tnwBCDq7VRuVBGPHAhRwgfqcf3MJ5VYXPa568bymxUl3R9Gr5zVSQfri-QGNpTt4WY-Ijc-8YFZyh6vIcbaOUu4aArUyd8RK3Ffs0z_Zc0hRRNyNXfKRNoR7ryTVBBcGicQEdJUy-SpmhBpMU4sWa2-MVNL6j6LrJlD_KPN7SbmeRVtEHjMihhCkMj-jhPcc5YycelIE4GG87Np3RgGt9Ur8ClMHcteZUrl9ew3LzdPHVn_GF2696s4m3bYiTggtx3120todh5c1wjIcT8WS788etX0aVevaj9hlhmdA_nK0pVk_10aZVzDkl9yHbUNnwb1ovg8fWeAmzWjzfkByvJt65V4DrMf_NebAgkDi7ck%3D)**_ [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=26b18415bf764f75b58f20007e2fa8f8&_e=tnwBCDq7VRuVBGPHAhRwgfqcf3MJ5VYXPa568bymxUl3R9Gr5zVSQfri-QGNpTt4WY-Ijc-8YFZyh6vIcbaOUu4aArUyd8RK3Ffs0z_Zc0hRRNyNXfKRNoR7ryTVBBcGicQEdJUy-SpmhBpMU4sWa2-MVNL6j6LrJlD_KPN7SbmeRVtEHjMihhCkMj-jhPccDJkad7WDyReit7_syuec0A0xIU-H_yOVn299gdNlJCXO3r1ArD1rqJqt9TKohcYP6RjPKHeB4Ay19Y8F3QPieLDKTZ_Bywjdx8mC7k8OajMr0IclexIROC2Hfm9_dpBE5837KhIqsVkM651-de6or3U07N-xBdtss6B16rm2534%3D)
__ You'll get to experience the powerful teaching of Dr. Mark Bailey, DTS Chancellor. We believe that the whole Bible, as Paul says in Timothy, is "useful for teaching, rebuking, correcting, and training in righteousness". That's why we've made our course, The Gospel of John, free for the first time. The course is delivered by email, one lesson per week for 8 weeks. name: Emily Randall
subject: I'm taking your voices with me to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
Thank you to all of you who made a donation, knocked on doors, made calls, spread the word on social media, or sent a supportive note. Thank you for the hard work, the time, the hope, and the joy you have invested in this campaign. I can’t wait to get to work and bring ALL your voices into the halls of power in the “other Washington.”

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96700803/510892643/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.11.06_WeWon_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjVjYzVjOC05MDljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gX-IxGK_vMNlgCWZh3hVRaCUppAV_IiYEcvspVzpbGo=&emci=c1e1f414-8a9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=a25cc5c8-909c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=23483442) | **We won.** The _Associated Press_ declared us the winner; we currently lead with more than 57 percent of the vote. Last night, my Republican opponent, State Senator Drew MacEwen, called to concede our race in Washington’s 6th Congressional District. _**Peter, I will have the distinct honor and privilege to serve you in Congress!**_ Since we launched our campaign nearly a year ago, I’ve been overwhelmed and overjoyed by the outpouring of grassroots support. We assembled an unbeatable team of motivated volunteers. We knocked on 10,000+ doors and made 20,000+ phone calls, including 6,000+ to swing states. And with nearly 10,000 grassroots donors, we showed that you can run a robust race for federal office without a dime of Corporate PAC money. **It’s not lost on me that we did more than win this election: we made history. Together, we shattered _three_ glass ceilings.** When I take office in January, I will become the first woman and first person of color to hold this seat, the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent Washington state in Congress, and the first ever queer Latina member of Congress. But representation isn’t the only reason I ran for this office. I ran to improve my neighbors’ lives. I ran to protect our abortion rights and expand access to quality healthcare. I ran to lower the cost of living and make housing more affordable. I ran to create new jobs and new educational opportunities. I ran because I know our best days are ahead of us, but only when we are willing to work together to find real solutions for our neighbors, friends, and families. The news nationally is more grim. Shortly after I take office, Donald Trump will return as the 47th President of the United States. His victory is a threat to the fundamental rights and liberties of countless Americans. Among other issues, he represents an existential threat to abortion and birth control access. The 6th District elected me to fight for their rights no matter who the President is, and I will join my colleagues in holding Trump and his administration accountable every day I am in office. **Thank you to all of you who made a donation, knocked on doors, made calls, spread the word on social media, or sent a supportive note. Thank you for the hard work, the time, the hope, and the joy you have invested in this campaign. I can’t wait to get to work and bring ALL your voices into the halls of power in the “other Washington.”** It is the honor of my life to serve the people of Washington — first in the State Senate and now in the U.S. Congress. Thank you to everyone who has supported our campaign, and thank you most of all to my wife, Alison, who made this victory possible. In service, — Congresswoman-elect Emily Randall

name: Greisa, United We Dream Action
subject: Undocumented and Freedom Bound!
body:
Let’s regroup at our post-election debrief next week! | | | Hey Peter, I want you to know that**you are deeply loved and supported.** Today is a difficult day, and we know you’re feeling sad, angry, and the multitude of emotions in between. But know this - we stand with you! And know that the results of this election do not define the value of our community or reflect the strength of our community. Another four years of a Trump administration is not what we envisioned, but we cannot let fear or frustration define us. It’s okay to feel, to grieve, and to process, **but we must also rise above despair**. We are resilient, and together, we will build the power to keep pushing for change we know we deserve. History is on our side, and this is one moment in our longer arc towards justice. **Yes! This moment is scary but resilience and resistance flow in our veins.** We as immigrants have had to prepare for hard, extraordinary circumstances all our lives. We didn’t back down when Trump won for the first time in 2016, and we won’t back down now. Despite today’s loss, we know there are more of us who want to unite our home with compassion than those who want to divide us with hate. We will continue to fight for our vision of the future—where everyone is free to thrive and live unapologetically. Together, we are unstoppable, and we will rise again, stronger and more determined than ever. **Our community has always been a powerful force against the hatred and bigotry aimed at us and our loved ones. Time and time again, we’ve stood strong, supported one another, and fought back against those who seek to divide us. We’ve built a network of care, courage, resilience and POWER—and we’re ready to protect one another.** Alongside you, we will practice radical hope, be bold and courageous, will not be afraid to speak truth to power, and refuse to live in isolation. 🫂 Can we take a collective breath together? On Wednesday, November 13, at 7 pm ET/ 6 pm CT, we’ll be hosting our “We Create The Moment: Post-Election Debrief” Community Call to feel the power of being in community and make meaning of this moment together. Will I see you there? **[RSVP NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN7DE37muk7CuwvBiD2hAXP6B3QfJz1F9plf-oTFkiJWwumNpvYQ6SE9msSnnuX72uyutckPIoJvNOvwFHsVTqiBK2rFIqOmjnOY0NxP-SjFJ1zGBeFc8aiPd-4b0xEV9VISbWzFlEU4HBXX0v4lGNSaDs252gRA25DTm9gSMr0aPQ-DyflF_s3SefFyc4k7LQgYPX5FvflLyLSgVstJBp5icfyVcV4clIcZL9xnh4umg/4b8/trHJvqOqQ7uUSt93x3pczQ/h0/h001.9UYpQBKEeApV5I3RN-oFF8TF6CVmwdfZv2nExrFKszc)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMchKqTlnDL9HV9V-hz_r8qN7DE37muk7CuwvBiD2hAXP6B3QfJz1F9plf-oTFkiJWwumNpvYQ6SE9msSnnuX72sIfQQSBfjydMGJrt8zQzLRIE-evM9yvhoBJmHW3n_ax9-vjkNCM83OcMwSfwBcvMt8MzSFCqYTF6shBiSjn5xtmkSo85AFJllf8oIcYjsguNXVdCpAD7aPTcfVoDXgEPlLpeGBD9SlGi7gqgy7L5Kho9an54BTHn_lWXma6rkwiw/4b8/trHJvqOqQ7uUSt93x3pczQ/h1/h001.u1rl6aftY2pJ6UtWOPTP2viR0X_JcNZoKzTi0sR_Sxw) 🧡 As we take care of our community and stand up for one another, know that it’s important to replenish our mind, body, and spirit. Remember: Our power has always come from our care and love for one another and ourselves. No politician can force us into the shadows. We at UWDA have been proudly declaring that we are Undocumented and Unafraid, Queer and Unashamed for 16 plus years. We’re ready to fight, and together, we will win! In solidarity, Greisa and the United We Dream Action team P.S.: 📲 Need a break from scrolling? Request a Love Note on Demand from our sister organization, United We Dream. Text ‘MINDFULNESS’ to 787-57 to receive an instant note of encouragement & mindfulness tips via SMS, or [click here if you’re reading this on your phone!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3seAPjtg6hvvK2zY-gvvQCKiUS-c4lWOSX7oxh1QsFVg1cAJQnjroxrFvFVz3FNg6eg5_kIqcmH_uYpq0gyNxnwtBmkdybN4QobThrkgiee7Jj7R8eYB2BPOPgPRs6l5F3yO4i1-KkX3WLXlu92pkIdYv57XPMqaeZUDcTZC0AjdW_q1DsA8Z5Ow9xueKwpQfWUvk7tlifnw_WBjXxIvBuu2TixmA2VFpOlIZUe9BRBNj9Fb7GlTHNc8H4ItaZZUr7cUqYkHrs8OJdCh1hgjJX7nAHkHv_gmLYVLG4JaKSShiP_kIknG_GgnrjYbRGDufoYqL4oGEq34G1bV-V36or_L6km7dsuwjS3bIJzfZimDVQlssL5OYzk-SeTYCQ-ZymGL4f42P_XYyWugJROJymhKjFQuCgL2fsoyjdytrIqWcRioA-2gdJKit1gY4lF9qJHnAuvXEgDpWrRpolKxJd2N4EjKQ70ZW2GJXow4YdoQW/4b8/trHJvqOqQ7uUSt93x3pczQ/h2/h001.MKEzPCmdLhX4_IEpm3grpb_5r64Q1Ogaj7tyBPuHDgE)

clean_body: Let’s regroup at our post-election debrief next week! | | | Hey Peter, I want you to know thatyou are deeply loved and supported. Today is a difficult day, and we know you’re feeling sad, angry, and the multitude of emotions in between. But know this - we stand with you! And know that the results of this election do not define the value of our community or reflect the strength of our community. Another four years of a Trump administration is not what we envisioned, but we cannot let fear or frustration define us. It’s okay to feel, to grieve, and to process, but we must also rise above despair. We are resilient, and together, we will build the power to keep pushing for change we know we deserve. History is on our side, and this is one moment in our longer arc towards justice. Yes! This moment is scary but resilience and resistance flow in our veins. We as immigrants have had to prepare for hard, extraordinary circumstances all our lives. We didn’t back down when Trump won for the first time in 2016, and we won’t back down now. Despite today’s loss, we know there are more of us who want to unite our home with compassion than those who want to divide us with hate. We will continue to fight for our vision of the future—where everyone is free to thrive and live unapologetically. Together, we are unstoppable, and we will rise again, stronger and more determined than ever. Our community has always been a powerful force against the hatred and bigotry aimed at us and our loved ones. Time and time again, we’ve stood strong, supported one another, and fought back against those who seek to divide us. We’ve built a network of care, courage, resilience and POWER—and we’re ready to protect one another. Alongside you, we will practice radical hope, be bold and courageous, will not be afraid to speak truth to power, and refuse to live in isolation. 🫂 Can we take a collective breath together? On Wednesday, November 13, at 7 pm ET/ 6 pm CT, we’ll be hosting our “We Create The Moment: Post-Election Debrief” Community Call to feel the power of being in community and make meaning of this moment together. Will I see you there? 🧡 As we take care of our community and stand up for one another, know that it’s important to replenish our mind, body, and spirit. Remember: Our power has always come from our care and love for one another and ourselves. No politician can force us into the shadows. We at UWDA have been proudly declaring that we are Undocumented and Unafraid, Queer and Unashamed for 16 plus years. We’re ready to fight, and together, we will win! In solidarity, Greisa and the United We Dream Action team P.S.: 📲 Need a break from scrolling? Request a Love Note on Demand from our sister organization, United We Dream. Text ‘MINDFULNESS’ to 787-57 to receive an instant note of encouragement & mindfulness tips via SMS, or | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Our Rev Survey
subject: Post-election survey >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

As we grapple with disappointment and the dangers of another Trump term,
it’s important that we come together to chart our path forward.

Our Revolution and our movement fought hard during this election and we
want to thank you for everything you did to support our work. We flipped
concerned voters and sounded the alarm when Democrats failed to speak to
working-class issues, but it wasn’t enough. The Democratic Party didn’t
adapt.

Now, we want to check in with you and get your input as we strategize for
the weeks and months ahead. Can you take a quick minute to fill out our
post-election survey?

First question: [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20444?source=email-20241106&t=1011&akid=7202%2E5885482%2EzYf9Et ]How are you feeling about the outcome of the election?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20444?source=email-20241106&t=1012&akid=7202%2E5885482%2EzYf9Et ]ANGRY
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20444?source=email-20241106&t=1013&akid=7202%2E5885482%2EzYf9Et ]SAD
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20444?source=email-20241106&t=1014&akid=7202%2E5885482%2EzYf9Et ]DEPRESSED
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20444?source=email-20241106&t=1015&akid=7202%2E5885482%2EzYf9Et ]SHOCKED
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20444?source=email-20241106&t=1016&akid=7202%2E5885482%2EzYf9Et ]CONFUSED

As we reflect, one thing is clear: The Democratic Party didn’t prioritize
issues important to the working class. That allowed Trump to build support
amongst young voters, Latinos, people who make below $100K, and many other
demographic groups.

We know part of our work will be to fundamentally change the Democratic
Party and the way Democrats run elections. Our work going forward relies
on your input and support. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20444?source=email-20241106&t=1017&akid=7202%2E5885482%2EzYf9Et ]Can you share your feelings and perspectives
on the election?

Thank you all,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Kamala Harris
subject: You can and will make a difference
body:
While I concede this election, I do not concede the fight that fueled this campaign. | | |
---
[ ](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtlGpBLNM9DdY-TrFptiHSq-L9c1ri9sVau_yBdU3bjlcgt11yaiPOxQivUjcB0wPJ7iVBr1KD5Kw_Au8YlZRNISvbRqmnpC5FHTydhRX9UzdPO5OFb8ro1RLgK5SB1PHGk_tR88FEYU8_tcCfXI1ekfJADp_KPGd7JVor3teve762tdfPTwuncN9SJyyXQWs1QFPpQXD2etZNI6qBnGursFEl1dtMO54DeiMfpNb26oJkPRjkdpKuVhbCAdiIE5H0NLL4T8u1TKVBckcZUPntDNfA_xPGkey3aslxY6HSEdCmk3l0W2Zldmh01jcLTe_PV3i83gtOy-sdrPerpSCBP/4b8/0qoIRSxfTry6U_02JrHS8g/h0/h001.i3LIF7FnBNmEaEb5V00lhK0ZI3vJLB1XcXZfmighM-8)
[](https://click.contact.kamalaharris.com/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jw19nK6Yk904jr2ZtjiO4RdFcI_M9LJtmDQgg6k1hTm6jQbzg-6wDxcSdomrZjR4-HbQEHdX-Z1MMnekcH0u3Ub3C7m3PaK2gU7MLt5xEBOt1FxpCk4qPCIDmItLvJl4MT2v4fU2dvxUVPhUNEFadACmAMQo70ywEM7FtMNfJy4PgMx7ZcNDp-LXF57aZMAExJ8Z99fbUcjUsmGpxz32hW2mEIANepUq2Qdaqz6zpNVPUVy1acqlQ79tHKxGLmu5aIL-2vfT9EXq_G5sxog_JXLlnnFW7lTBZ6pv0atNwW8wUij21SiZ93oxtN7F2zrthl15fC0RtInVkmRN4WbpKwb13Rntm8baGkcx6VTzUuAMIOiDxRaIyBDN8BkGcAmvSljouBhqlIltYixKzoNOe8nQ9OaDyosYM5bYdPelH9PTyor4KAfa4W3mL8CGxo4-TnlB6Px3Mz8JdjBsXB3pfjteJ0CZ7PJ8vMFfEPpKjkEn6BvcHF5wc4v-k5IcMova7MQ4atvZB9DLODmFvBHO9cx/4b8/0qoIRSxfTry6U_02JrHS8g/h1/h001.YHpnaHY54wEWNzw8CedRsnXkPKxsAIzhMbcKJW-SjuQ) My heart is full, Peter. Full of gratitude for the trust that you have placed in me, full of love for our country, and full of resolve. I know you gave so much of yourselves to this fight. And I am so grateful to you. The outcome of this election is not what we wanted. And it is not what we fought for. _But the light of America’s promise will always burn bright – as long as we never give up and keep fighting._ **While I concede this election, I do not concede the fight that fueled this campaign.** The fight for the ideals that reflect America at its best: Freedom, opportunity, fairness, and dignity. _That is a fight I will never give up_. I will never give up the fight for a future where every American can pursue their dreams. Where the women of America have the freedom to make decisions about their own bodies. The fight to protect our students and our streets from gun violence. The fight for our democracy. **Because the fight for our country is always worth it.****_And we cannot give up now_.** I know this team. And I know that you do not back down from a hard fight. This is not the time to throw up our hands. This is a time to roll up our sleeves. You can and will make a difference. Thank you, Kamala Kamala Harris
Vice President of the United States **__Our fight continues.__** With a handful of key Senate and House races still too close to call, we are keeping our organizers and volunteers on the ground in those states to see the election across the finish line. The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: While I concede this election, I do not concede the fight that fueled this campaign. | | | My heart is full, Peter. Full of gratitude for the trust that you have placed in me, full of love for our country, and full of resolve. I know you gave so much of yourselves to this fight. And I am so grateful to you. The outcome of this election is not what we wanted. And it is not what we fought for. But the light of America’s promise will always burn bright – as long as we never give up and keep fighting. While I concede this election, I do not concede the fight that fueled this campaign. The fight for the ideals that reflect America at its best: Freedom, opportunity, fairness, and dignity. That is a fight I will never give up. I will never give up the fight for a future where every American can pursue their dreams. Where the women of America have the freedom to make decisions about their own bodies. The fight to protect our students and our streets from gun violence. The fight for our democracy. Because the fight for our country is always worth it.And we cannot give up now. I know this team. And I know that you do not back down from a hard fight. This is not the time to throw up our hands. This is a time to roll up our sleeves. You can and will make a difference. Thank you, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Our fight continues. With a handful of key Senate and House races still too close to call, we are keeping our organizers and volunteers on the ground in those states to see the election across the finish line. | | | | | |

body:
President Trump will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN

|

| | | | [](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=c4328c3f9a61492f81745e37492c50ee&_e=6GiLlzw_IbsVTt-OkeCa18NDNR-jOyoQvFkY9l9HiuAASZFX8TF8aQcGtr_1A7QrXDSy-xrkBMe40GcI1EXifYlrrYlUdXPVUtAZeT2V4Wq04Tq2ANy6gus9H1Qv2FfyouYFyl274j_2MtMWDPmUxkET1j9nH3AOqgWGAbObmmlsVAmWntkORWajjPaXaKm3Mu1YLYtYlUnRjZvn6WKOF-magizq_GmlYWITZoXUbz1nlL9Gn36MqLejwsofqpdjYPBb6AJOk5Fiqp7N402ji5Koj3-6YWWuslXMaKl1ysD4qBgTVOufC2Bm4FMFvtJQdHEIbIqtM3tsBWPeDXJ_pXdMNx5IxtHi5CRnIAfWShMyVLnj_L43iZGwZA4YBnX5szNAA04eu3WnQe7j0bLenm5XPtCLb69motdQNdY-6gQ%3D)

The American people make it clear. It's time for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to **_GET LOST!_**

**President Trump has been through so much. He was put through sham trials, multiple attempts on his life, and relentless smears from the radical left and their allies in the media.

But despite everything, with your help, he will return to the White House and Make America Great Again. **

**[That's why House Republicans are sending him a congratulations card, and we want this to be our biggest EVER. Will you be the first to add your name?](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=c4328c3f9a61492f81745e37492c50ee&_e=6GiLlzw_IbsVTt-OkeCa18NDNR-jOyoQvFkY9l9HiuAASZFX8TF8aQcGtr_1A7QrXDSy-xrkBMe40GcI1EXifYlrrYlUdXPVUtAZeT2V4Wq04Tq2ANy6gus9H1Qv2FfyouYFyl274j_2MtMWDPmUxkET1j9nH3AOqgWGAbObmmlsVAmWntkORWajjPaXaKm3Mu1YLYtYlUnRjZvn6WKOF-magizq_GmlYWITZoXUbz1nlL9Gn36MqLejwsofqpdjYPBb6AJOk5Fiqp7N402ji0wrgrFKvF4w4lFqCb92QCi91O1X-i6y2ci-Xg6paDQe7hS4r9JSjB6LMYEuEozCxjxAbprnfWdK3gYRW1IPK2bvX9qYf23CWIuMbgoAc5Lh1i2W-ODt-C3gTf5aUmF2Do1kvT08Cw5YBnw7-MtLTOE%3D "That’s why House Republicans are sending him a congratulations card, and we want this to be our biggest EVER. Team, I know many of us are feeling fear, grief, and anger. Donald Trump's victory is crushing. We don't know exactly how the next four years will play out, but we can be pretty sure he'll do his best to erode our democratic institutions, restrict reproductive rights, and roll back the progress we've made. If we want to slow him down, we must do everything we can to win the House or limit the GOP majority. That starts with our race here in OH-9, where we have a narrow lead but are heading towards a recount. I need your support to fund our recount efforts and help us get over the finish line. Can you make a contribution to our recount fund today? name: Mike Thompson
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Thank you to everyone who voted yesterday, especially to the Fourth District voters who re-elected me.

It is the greatest honor of my life to serve the people of the community where I was born, grew up, and raised my own family. I am humbled and honored to have earned your trust to continue representing our community in Congress.

Please know I will work tirelessly in the upcoming Congress to ensure our community is the best place in the nation to raise a family, start a business, and retire with dignity. I remain committed to working across the aisle to find common ground and advance policies that bolster the middle class, lower the cost of housing and health care, address our climate crisis, and help keep our communities safe.

Once again, thank you and I am incredibly honored and humbled to represent our community.

Sincerely

Mike Thompson

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: My thoughts on Donald Trump’s victory.
body:
Peter, this is devastating. But it's not the end.
Peter, I hope you’ve been able to find a moment of peace following last night’s election results.
We just heard from Vice President Kamala Harris who officially conceded the election to Donald Trump. Like so many of you, I am devastated by the outcome of the election and deeply fearful of what the consequences of another Trump presidency will look like – for our freedoms, for the economy, for our reproductive rights and for our democracy.
Millions of Americans from across the country, including me and my team, poured their hearts and souls into Kamala and Tim’s campaign. We were collectively fighting for a new way forward where all Americans are afforded equal measures of dignity, respect and opportunity.
Unfortunately, the election results make clear that our fight is only just beginning. **As Vice President Harris said, when we fight we win and sometimes that fight takes some time.**
That fight starts by making sure every vote is counted in every single election across the country, then working to flip House and Senate seats in 2026 to make a Democratic majority that can defeat his extremist agenda.
From my end, I will continue to prepare to go to Congress and represent Arizona’s 3rd District. I will fight tirelessly against Trump’s Project 2025 agenda and get things done for our community. I will continue to raise funds, organize, and mobilize to support Democratic candidates and causes in Arizona and across the country.
**That’s why I’m asking you to chip into our race so we can continue pushing for a better future for our community and our country.**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96701569/510895373/2145040083?refcode=241106_ya_Trumpwin_l1&ms=241106_ya_Trumpwin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTk5NTE3ZS05NTljLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pnolBZUOD63OmILVRJaq6fdo0yRDyZd0fZXYymEZjNo=)**
In the meantime, let’s please remember to treat each other with kindness. If there’s one thing I’ve learned from this experience, it’s that we all need to do a much better job listening to each other and communicating openly and honestly, and taking care of one another.
Thank you so much, Peter.

— Yassamin
Yassamin Ansari for Congress
PO Box 13524
Phoenix, AZ 85002
United States

name: Mohan Seshadri
subject: What happens now
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Hi Peter,
Today we are facing the election results and what it means for our communities, our country, and our shared future. I know that a lot of us are feeling sad, or angry, or numb right now. A lot of us remember what it felt like in 2016 when we could not be sure what was coming for us, but now we have the experience and clarity to know exactly what the consequences are of electing Donald Trump to be the president. We know you’re likely going through a lot right now and we want to tell you that we are here for you in this moment.
API PA is the political home of Asian Americans in Pennsylvania. Our leadership is made up of people who threw down and won multiple times against Trump the first time he was in office. Our leaders defended DACA and protected our immigrant communities. Our leaders defended the Affordable Care Act and protected our ability to access and afford healthcare. And in the 2020 election, we kicked Donald Trump out of office with the expectation that he would no longer be able to harm or bully our communities.
We know what we’re up against. We know the agenda he is going to try and enact - to deport our communities, to take away our healthcare, and degrade our democracy. We are ready to fight for you, but winning these fights is going to take all of us.
And while we fight against Project 2025 and Donald Trump's agenda - we will still be working to build the future that our people need. We will be working to protect Philadelphia's Chinatown, ensure our communities can access culturally competent mental health services, expand language access in Pennsylvania, and so much more.
There is a lot of work ahead of us over the next four years, but we'll be here for you - fighting for all of you, for all of us, to be safe.
But right now, the best thing you can do is rest. In this moment when so many of us are feeling despair, we are asking you to spend time with the people you love, to take care of yourself and take care of each other because we need you in this movement long-term.
We will be here fighting for you in the coming months and years to protect our families and our futures by building a movement with you that will ensure that our Asian American communities in Pennsylvania have the political power we need so that we can make sure our communities are safe, healthy, and strong.
In solidarity,
Mohan Seshadri
Executive Director
Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance (API PA)
https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania [https://www.facebook.com/apipennsylvania] https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania [https://twitter.com/apipennsylvania] https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania [https://instagram.com/apipennsylvania] https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania [https://www.tiktok.com/@apipennsylvania]
Become a member of API PA [https://secure.everyaction.com/Icnejg76hkyS__uKsAQVfQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=QgPtQebNfZfzMdQlKFumVM7f0ncDRsQK41QXGQOCuuJ0uMwycWOl3OUhF8MPUy++wXFz9+kTrBYG/hjo8mtAxw22hl+Jv8MgMtC/gPNPsDmwSVz0kiuZsSj/FdpuHZwmJ9hgFYr0YlN+lmam52Qdx+N8U8Y5AI+AtZdWi9DtyRI=]

API PA
PO Box 22611
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/SxZcLwbmqUib9krCmDRzmw2?unsubscribedata=804q10Lh9QSL9rFI5lEkYf%2BaRZ7Zr8tCwgwCOriiJlKG6c56bo2eEnNMNsRnrOWA0B%2BDfZPr69e8RtzM5OeMXBK%2B93Ye32ICZ9BqR%2F99dDm%2FrvcKzmh8zzwGgwbMXtkVWJzt5Xq8HI3SL432IsUiOE6unPK7m1oFcE1gcedneAvYOkREMwi5t6PR3G6JhXz8%2FVh1ZGsiguac09CJQJNtIA7l%2FtJTDtlR6s8w77Em1x1Q4%2BTcKaGixCrMtleGNB%2Fsh7NeZOd6lnPvM%2BvYy%2FCUCY2P78p%2BHz3MPVUIy%2F7MMUe2kL17ChlWKijb3OsHiuvR5Nex9xwgtwbm4qHDW67p%2B%2BR0maq61RpRazLpBc63%2FSE7x%2FktCD%2F89EgXgQQamcIRx7fNdNaMIWqW8qvYAzV%2FRdq7U2AfKSwGXCtFesCkpQA%3D .

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

clean_body: I've never seen journalism so abused It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Reader,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: Emerge
subject: Statement from A’shanti F. Gholar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
After Vice President Kamala Harris' speech, Emerge President A'shanti F. Gholar released the following statement:

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/96701744/510896218/-93946384?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMjkzYjA0LTk4OWMtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMGQzYTk4ZmE2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XCcx1fLouNpLVodet7DtCby5_CrwWnLlD9re830cO-Q=&emci=82b1547f-7b9c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=62293b04-989c-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=920818)
---
| _**After Vice President Kamala Harris' speech, Emerge President A'shanti F. Gholar released the following statement:**_

“VP Harris and Governor Walz ran a historic campaign. Millions of Americans supported their message of hope – we thank them for inspiring us to envision a better America for everybody. Emerge alums are still on the frontlines of Congress and state and local governments acting as a firewall to our most critical freedoms. The result of this election doesn’t change that work and alongside our alums, we will continue to fight for the rights of every American, put forward policies that benefit everyone, and work to ensure a better future for the next generations.

The outcome of this election is just the beginning. Progress is not always easy and sometimes we have to take a step back to take two forward. We will come back even stronger in the next election. We refuse to go back.”

name: Major General Paul Eaton, U.S. Army, Ret.
subject: Peter, none of us wanted to be in this position today. But there is purposeful work ahead of us, for those who wish to do it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Those of us who are Veterans swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. I will not break that oath, even in this dark hour. I will not surrender, and I am proud to continue to protect our Constitution with VoteVets.
#
Peter, it’s Paul.
There is no utility in avoiding the difficult truth today: Now that Vice President Harris has conceded to Donald Trump, we face the grim reality that a man we did everything we could to defeat will again become the Commander in Chief.
I will not sugarcoat the results. We should not. Moving forward and regaining the initiative requires us to confront the results of this election with open eyes. But even now, even at this dark hour, we have cause for optimism.
VoteVets was the critical player last night, and we had an incredible impact around the country. VoteVets candidates outfought their opposition and won tough races up and down the ballot. Principled leaders will be serving at all levels of government at a time that we need them most — including Pat Ryan, Don Davis, Chris DeLuzio, Eugene Vindman, and more in the House of Representatives. Elissa Slotkin has been declared the victor in her Senate campaign in Michigan.
Even now, the work continues. We have a good man in the field. Ruben Gallego is locked in a tight race in Arizona, and [**if you are looking for a way to have an impact you can support him as he fights to ensure every vote is counted by chipping in to his campaign here.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov24-ruben.2eWYsn&refcode=em241106-1-30&t=1&akid=33492%2E3013755%2EpFEX_I)**
Each of us has a role to play in the coming days, months, and years. We are the legacy of men and women who risked their lives, their fortunes, and their sacred honor to live in freedom. A nation I am proud to have served in uniform.
Those of us who are Veterans swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. I will not break that oath, especially in this dark hour. I will not surrender, and I am proud to continue to uphold our Constitution with VoteVets.
You have my word that we will continue defending our democracy, and we need you with us. There is purposeful work ahead for you, should you choose to join us.
Thank you for all you’ve done, and all you will do in the fights ahead.
All my best,
Paul Eaton
Senior Advisor, VoteVets
Major General, U.S. Army, Retired
