Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... We at America First Legal have just filed an **absolutely momentous** lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws. The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on. _That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_[_**DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>** _](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0026a89a16d645c1bf8230310dad1297&_e=ySC7fRvdXmIAvYUF99xnXLlB7uyYm8gQ46F8xEWyjBJ6D5B--UsK9h76bX0n76V2qBoQo-YOLjmgDr-gwchQcsVbSebymqHtnfmHBOtG6ydmjYOk7g0kwHYSODhSHkyGiMvXVH20c96Gonkl1qLFxiptA3fKc0wJ7atfUWOiNSksEcijnxfKNxVIHOXbuBaD4DBKxIDj6Rg-dw3R0RRDsby2tbepWGNoPMd-1jiCnk85qCoRv6b_eTbm4gs5DJ-bR8AE3ObZW6QgXTd_ljP86KIOZNuvN0REF_2Gj9-ub7NBQpDHH1F0Xu4-Q4itfpsLiHvJ2h0AGIMnP7CxOrzhknyaGfPL0YjCAjYGzOiRl0oBq4i31tTkoSgmAg4fJvMAo6vz1CW-nxcPIfqe5dNXmx0cgP3ZJjO4pPabGzOizHGxrGXe-iWpvtjxVpe-c97B051xDxo4BLg_i6PIDaEhKnOeMctj4e7EGU1G86moK2MDw9n03y4YPluZJuihzrhy)**We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:****#1 -** _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots.**In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race**_**#2 -** _**Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.** The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_**#3 -** _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it.**Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting**_ For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.**Make no mistake:** Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring._Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_[_**_PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE_ >>**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0026a89a16d645c1bf8230310dad1297&_e=ySC7fRvdXmIAvYUF99xnXLlB7uyYm8gQ46F8xEWyjBJ6D5B--UsK9h76bX0n76V2qBoQo-YOLjmgDr-gwchQcsVbSebymqHtnfmHBOtG6ydmjYOk7g0kwHYSODhSHkyGiMvXVH20c96Gonkl1qLFxiptA3fKc0wJ7atfUWOiNSksEcijnxfKNxVIHOXbuBaD4DBKxIDj6Rg-dw3R0RRDsby2tbepWGNoPMd-1jiCnk85qCoRv6b_eTbm4gs5DJ-bR8AE3ObZW6QgXTd_ljP86KIOZNuvN0REF_2Gj9-ub7NBQpDHH1F0Xu4-Q4itfpsLiHvJ2h0AGIMnP7CxOrzhko2b1TwKK_nSoJM-fZygZKttIQvJH4XFv7_mWLYz4h8E5TP_ZWetHz2Eh8YJDOCkOr_unxtTNLSK8TVt8eDSx0FgRnAuL0upwbZplf_TNTY5dZd_pU-7FlZ36_4j54zDYG4cMQTwI-GtPVb5bm3RiTfZxFaaQ5XcoYpUi7woT921)_** **_ Stephen Miller _President, America First Legal _

name: Tracey Mann
subject: Thank You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
We have a bright future ahead... | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Kansan,

Thank you for giving me the opportunity to continue advocating for you and the conservative Kansas values that we share. It continues to be a tremendous honor to serve you in Washington, D.C.

In the midst of the problems that we face today, America is still a shining city on a hill because of our founding principles. This is my vision for our country: a place that protects the right to life, secures individual freedoms, upholds Second Amendment rights, values national security, and empowers local communities where small businesses are set free to do what they do best with less regulation and lower taxes. I learned this vision for America in the great state of Kansas while growing up on my family’s farm.

I like to think of the Big First District as the pilot light of America because the values that make America great are still alive and well in my hometown and across our state. Folks where I’m from live their lives by faith, family, hard work, and personal responsibility. I spent my first two terms in Congress advocating for these values, and for agriculture first and foremost. I voted against big government socialism, wasting taxpayer dollars, open borders, and federal government overreach. I promise to stay the course going forward.

In the next Congress, we have a lot of work to do. We need to reduce and reprioritize our federal spending, secure the wide-open Biden-Harris border, reign in the relentless weaponization of our federal government, extend the Trump Tax cuts that have empowered American families, and pass a fiscally conservative, five-year Farm Bill that delivers for rural America. We need to get our whole country back on track. That starts today, and it’s going to be a long hard road to undo the damage caused by leftist policies. I’m excited, however, and not dismayed. I have not lost hope - we will fix this country together.

>From the bottom of my heart, thank you for giving me the opportunity to continue serving you. May God bless Kansas, and may God Bless the United States of America.

Yours in the fight,

Tracey Mann

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Our race is undecided
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter,
Our race is still undecided . The stakes feel higher than ever — but we’re still in this.
In 2022, it took a week to determine a winner. Right now, we’re ahead by a tiny margin, but thousands of votes still need to be counted.
While we continue to monitor the returns, we must ensure that every lawful vote is counted and the will of AZ-06 voters is carried out, no matter how long it takes.
To do that, we’ll need your grassroots support. Can you donate now to help us ensure that every vote is counted fairly and securely? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110624_Wait_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_110624_Wait_act]
I am honored to have received so much support over the past two years and I wouldn’t be here without everyone who volunteered, donated, and voted. Thank you so, so much — I am so grateful for your support in our fight for a better Arizona.
I’ll continue to send updates as we learn more.
Onwards!
Kirsten

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.

name: Breaking News
subject: The future of the Senate depends on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING:** **Democrats LOSE control of the Senate.**
**[Far-right Republicans just retook Senate control. We've launched an EMERGENCY $50,000 goal to fight back _immediately_. Will you rush $5 to help elect Democrats, win back the Senate, and defend all the progress we've made?](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241106-BreakingNews-LostMajorityFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241106-BreakingNews-LostMajorityFR-Pros-sl1&akid=18859%2E9716520%2EVJxHTN)**
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241106-BreakingNews-LostMajorityFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241106-BreakingNews-LostMajorityFR-Pros-sl1&akid=18859%2E9716520%2EVJxHTN)
---

**This is an all-hands-on-deck moment, team:** **Republicans have won control of the Senate.**

**This far-right Senate will be destructive to our democracy. They'll support more abortion bans, try to kick millions of Americans off their health care plans, and do _everything_ to push their Trump-centered agenda.**
